name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: My State of the Union guest
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58467186/391173274/665653053?refcode=fl_em_na_20230208sotu_gv_90da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTJiODliYy0wY2E4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SM2ljklefdfEtaQx-QIa3tYx_qbBavoqf88Re_PdXuo=)
---
Hi team, Yesterday, I had the honor of attending President Biden’s State of the Union Address for the first time, and I brought a special guest with me: Dale Gillis. Dale is a farmer from Arrey who I visited along the campaign trail last year to ask what he needs from his representative in Congress. His family has spent generations building their farm and legacy in the Hatch Valley, growing onions and chile. |
---
Dale is one of many farmers proudly keeping up our agricultural traditions here in New Mexico’s 2nd District. I know how important the agriculture industry is, not just to our economy, but to the fabric of who we are as New Mexicans.
**As I was talking to Dale yesterday, he shared,_“I have never, ever had one Republican come to see me. This man right here came.”_**
Like I told Dale, I will always make sure that I remember where I came from and to never lose sight of where our food comes from and who digs their hands in the dirt to be able to provide for our families. As a new member of the House Agriculture Committee, I will be a leader for farmers like Dale, along with our farmworkers, truck drivers, machine operators, and every member of this crucial industry.
Too many New Mexicans live in poverty, and too many children are going to bed hungry. I am committed to bringing down the cost of living and food, and creating a future where all of our children and families can thrive — and that includes supporting our small businesses and farm workers, in addition to taking climate action.
While President Biden emphasized a message about the progress some parts of the country have made with lower gas prices, unemployment rates, and reduced inflation - that’s just not the reality for too many in New Mexico.
Dale and I agree: regardless of political party, when it comes down to the core, **we’re all New Mexico.** I promised to represent every New Mexican, no matter their party or who they voted for, and that’s what I’m doing now in Washington in order to move our state forward.
Thank you for your trust in me,
Gabe

| Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American, former City Councilor, and conservation champion who flipped New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District from red to blue in 2022 with the help of this people-powered movement. Now, he's taking his experience in office and passion for economic opportunities, the environment, and giving a voice to underserved communities in Congress to fight for the people of New Mexico.

name: Ruben Gallego for Senate
subject: Sinema sat.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Even Joe Manchin stood up when the president talked about the wealthy paying their fair share.
#

Peter -
When President Biden talked about allowing Medicare to negotiate lower drug prices... Kyrsten Sinema sat.
When the president talked about corporations paying their fair share... Sinema sat. Even as Joe Manchin stood to applaud.
Beating Kyrsten Sinema is not about a party switch — it’s about her siding with powerful interests over people time and time again.
The drug companies, the hedge fund managers, the rich and powerful, they’ll throw money at Senator Sinema to help her win. Ruben needs us.

clean_body: | | | | Destroying communities across America Friend, Biden has depleted our Strategic Petroleum Reserve. We should all be outraged. Not only is Biden selling our oil to China but his energy policies are crushing communities in Wyoming and across our Nation. We are fighting to help Harriet protect the livelihoods and freedoms of all Americans, including those in the energy sector. Biden's policies are doing just the opposite – They are hurting workers, businesses, and families. We cannot stand by and watch this happen! Harriet has been leading the opposition to these harmful policies and is taking action to put an end to this nonsense. She understands the importance of energy independence and the crucial role that the energy sector plays in our economy. But we can’t win this battle alone... | Thank you, Team Hageman | | | | |

name: Alex Padilla for California
subject: Your February 2023 issues survey
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
body:
It’s even more important now that we hear directly from you
#

Hi,
Every month or so, we like to reach out to some of Alex’s top supporters and ask about your priorities.
And as Alex ramps up his legislative work in his first full term in the U.S. Senate and makes decisions about which legislation to introduce and co-sponsor in our newly expanded Senate majority, it’s even more important now that we hear directly from you about the issues that matter the most.
We noticed you haven’t taken our issues survey yet — and we want to hear from you! If you have a minute, it would mean a lot if you could take our survey and share your thoughts with Alex and our team.
[**Take our short issues survey and let us know what issues are on the top of your mind — we’ll be looking at the results in a few days, so please fill it out now if you’re able to do so.**](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/February-Issue-Survey-2023-em/?source=em230208-1-180&refcode2=1176.159979.UMyI2E&t=1&akid=1176%2E159979%2EUMyI2E)
**[SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS](https://act.alex-padilla.com/signup/February-Issue-Survey-2023-em/?source=em230208-1-180&refcode2=1176.159979.UMyI2E&t=2&akid=1176%2E159979%2EUMyI2E)**
Thank you,
Team Alex Padilla

Paid For By Alex Padilla for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here.](https://act.alex-padilla.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=1176%2E159979%2EUMyI2E)

Fellow Conservative,

President Biden’s speech to Congress was disappointing, dangerous, and at times, downright _bizarre_.

I hate to break the bad news to him, but 70% of Americans believe our country is headed in the wrong direction. They believe the economy is weak, that energy prices are too high, and the federal government wastes the hard-earned tax money they send to Washington.

They believe Biden’s open border has contributed to a dangerous increase in crime, and that for the past two years, America has projected an image of weakness to the world when we should be projecting strength and leadership.

Contrast that reality with what we heard in Biden’s speech, where he had the nerve to say the economy was booming, the border was secure, and he was standing up to China.

Really? Does he define “standing up to China” as letting a Chinese spy balloon hover over American military assets for only a week, instead of a month?

If Biden and the Democrats had a record to run on, they would! But they don’t, so instead they dodge, distract, and deceive...and hope the mainstream media lets them get away with it.

What you won’t hear from the mainstream media are the crazy policies they DO support, like:

* letting biological boys compete against girls in sports
* believing men can get pregnant
* open borders, and
* sending free money to able-bodied people who don’t work, while defunding the police who put their lives on the line every day to protect us

They’re hiding their real agenda, but I’m glad to say our House Republican majority is stepping up to stop it.

**[What I’m very curious to know – and why I’m emailing you today – is to find out whether you trust the government. More pointedly, do you trust Democrats to be truthful with you?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d892cdf62b4a41cd8f8e0292e2e12d6d&_e=_SsR210Y5bnUQC95eg-6eanD5s_llPDxotfm39ytPjzDrTdtLnOq7Up4CQPlpRuWrMvIPBkhCqfzkELHpNRvBIqoxmnYnBq5MTG6ROoo03PYM70wgUL5WlKwbK6DkoXvx4xHVghTh36IOfRLnInLMXuNKoL28yWlK5zBnQQy_TzH4DcwY0lA74K6LvX2isDq7MIlQO7NPEkb9rHNj8Af966hVRY8tx27ZM2H2Bcn0fTwLk-dFfB4xySwG9aQBYW4Fu7bm1cLraJm7rxM8Eon4wjvDxACkMmyuD9vMOXI0DCKgw_QFl7O0apBi9EW-IJ_XkAnEFxe33-LWVyioosGcAiYKWg-t_U_D2GbIPJKcGWOV0cb5I_OfwM14QOZwQyH-9xC4v_tFgHMoZXZcfymGqcnMHZ7LMSrXaZCjxCtDFB9lPIz7TZk7AnE7h6uKEdWeKuyZbeyzNC8fcNx53Einw%3D%3D)**

I’m worried that we could be losing support for our movement. My team tells me that folks aren’t opening our emails as often as they once did or even engaging with the content we send. Jim Jordan

**About Jim Jordan:** | Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Humbly asking you to donate $3 to defeat a Big Oil ballot measure that would let them drill near schools and parks
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEWSOM FOR CALIFORNIA – GOVERNOR – 2022
body:
The oil companies went out and paid to collect enough signatures to qualify for a ballot initiative that would overturn the law I signed.

Friends —
I need your help.
Late last year, I signed a bill into law that would keep new oil wells 3,200 feet away from homes, schools, and parks.
That upset the oil companies.
They want to drill wherever they want. They’d drill below a Kindergarten reading circle if they thought it’d make an extra buck. Even though we know drilling results in more kids getting asthma, being born with birth defects, and more families exposed to toxic chemicals.
So the oil companies went out and paid to collect enough signatures to qualify for a ballot initiative that would overturn the law I signed.
We’ve got to beat them, but I need your help. Because they will spend ridiculous amounts of money to lie, trick and deceive voters about their intentions.
And if you think they’ll stop in California, you’re mistaken. Because if they can win here, they’ll use the results of this vote to push their agenda everywhere.
So I am humbly asking:
[**Can you please contribute $3, or whatever you can afford, to my ballot measure committee today? We will put your donation right to work defeating Big Oil’s initiative when it comes to a vote.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ggn-em-oil-initiative/?refcode=em230208-1-180&refcode2=1096_4767699_U1MhUY&akid=1096%2E4767699%2EU1MhUY)

name: Katie Hill
subject: 3.4x more likely
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58469207/391206135/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230208_PM2_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNDMzNTU4ZjEtMTlhOC1lZDExLTk5NGQtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XuNgnU7TMGyNv25wVPROdS1h4jVLqr83ckHrDWCD2ec=)
---
I’m never going to be afraid of telling you the hard truth, Peter, and here it is: It’s dangerous to be a woman in politics. A recent study from Princeton University and the Anti-Defamation League found female officials are _3.4 times more likely_ to receive online harassment than their male counterparts. And it’s not just digital threats, either. In the past few years, we’ve witnessed a violent intruder show up at Nancy Pelosi’s home with rope, zip ties, and a hammer; a man with a gun stalk Pramila Jayapal outside her house; and a thwarted plot to kidnap Governor Gretchen Whitmer. **Then there’s what happened to me: A coordinated cyber-attack by far-right political operatives and media outlets meant to shame me out of office. ** After the attack on her husband, Nancy Pelosi said she was worried it would discourage other women from running for office. That’s something I worried about, too — and it’s not unfounded. When we say women running for office need extra support, we mean **every** type of support. There are so many invisible challenges and dangers that come with being a woman in politics, and that’s why I started HER Time: To help women overcome them. **[_But I can’t do it alone. clean_body: | = I’m never going to be afraid of telling you the hard truth, Peter, and here it is: It’s dangerous to be a woman in politics. A recent study from Princeton University and the Anti-Defamation League found female officials are 3.4 times more likely to receive online harassment than their male counterparts. And it’s not just digital threats, either. In the past few years, we’ve witnessed a violent intruder show up at Nancy Pelosi’s home with rope, zip ties, and a hammer; a man with a gun stalk Pramila Jayapal outside her house; and a thwarted plot to kidnap Governor Gretchen Whitmer. Then there’s what happened to me: A coordinated cyber-attack by far-right political operatives and media outlets meant to shame me out of office. After the attack on her husband, Nancy Pelosi said she was worried it would discourage other women from running for office. That’s something I worried about, too — and it’s not unfounded. When we say women running for office need extra support, we mean every type of support. There are so many invisible challenges and dangers that come with being a woman in politics, and that’s why I started HER Time: To help women overcome them. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = If women don’t feel supported, they may never make the tough decision to run for office. They need to know we have their backs. Thanks for your support, Katie HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

Fellow Conservative,

President Biden’s speech to Congress was disappointing, dangerous, and at times, downright _bizarre_.

I hate to break the bad news to him, but 70% of Americans believe our country is headed in the wrong direction. They believe the economy is weak, that energy prices are too high, and the federal government wastes the hard-earned tax money they send to Washington.

They believe Biden’s open border has contributed to a dangerous increase in crime, and that for the past two years, America has projected an image of weakness to the world when we should be projecting strength and leadership.

Contrast that reality with what we heard in Biden’s speech, where he had the nerve to say the economy was booming, the border was secure, and he was standing up to China.

Really? Does he define “standing up to China” as letting a Chinese spy balloon hover over American military assets for only a week, instead of a month?

If Biden and the Democrats had a record to run on, they would! But they don’t, so instead they dodge, distract, and deceive...and hope the mainstream media lets them get away with it.

What you won’t hear from the mainstream media are the crazy policies they DO support, like:

* letting biological boys compete against girls in sports
* believing men can get pregnant
* open borders, and
* sending free money to able-bodied people who don’t work, while defunding the police who put their lives on the line every day to protect us

They’re hiding their real agenda, but I’m glad to say our House Republican majority is stepping up to stop it.

**[What I’m very curious to know – and why I’m emailing you today – is to find out whether you trust the government. More pointedly, do you trust Democrats to be truthful with you?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=918ffd18b5e14543ab01b1cc26100485&_e=Se5BCMENLeRNzuOpQ5IQ5tPu23VwPRCuqjHPNIj03InajjmTBHqdYAh5hCuitpR1xYcUwUv_lys7ebl53th3i4QDMNXG5XSCMbqvaONt3ZuzFgdKNyYgQv4dE-J5Aqnl9loA210zdyDq86ToJk7YQgTnASuVSv7edXrZWJC5LFu3zma3YOVCgMZIPyyPi9ZDq9U5wk1YIpNx5wa96Gjhmfxz8jBjAmiKzSTWYidPkYup8-CnvaaQe1s1JAZP8CrnYUWbnAJGcmY3omD6P_QEP9eVi4tDCzLXcCgOEGKnSSqHMPpKquU8clYDqwW0ZXADwOoIhBDxYRnBrx2jwcrabk9nwmGJLhMIXk7leiWbOu2nPMXdtwfxuSVIqMmS5aPLMYcsVYg1gG6klSusKP2gN2Vv7_jZrdTyCGkCwulsHml0laa3ZU-A0DdpPtSRteGgQ-jCrL2m3Bmz1Ck78cfwRA%3D%3D)**

**About Jim Jordan:** | Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

clean_body: President Biden’s speech to Congress was disappointing, dangerous, and at times, downright bizarre. | | Fellow Conservative, President Biden’s speech to Congress was disappointing, dangerous, and at times, downright bizarre. I hate to break the bad news to him, but 70% of Americans believe our country is headed in the wrong direction. They believe the economy is weak, that energy prices are too high, and the federal government wastes the hard-earned tax money they send to Washington. They believe Biden’s open border has contributed to a dangerous increase in crime, and that for the past two years, America has projected an image of weakness to the world when we should be projecting strength and leadership. Contrast that reality with what we heard in Biden’s speech, where he had the nerve to say the economy was booming, the border was secure, and he was standing up to China. Really? Does he define “standing up to China” as letting a Chinese spy balloon hover over American military assets for only a week, instead of a month? If Biden and the Democrats had a record to run on, they would! But they don’t, so instead they dodge, distract, and deceive...and hope the mainstream media lets them get away with it. What you won’t hear from the mainstream media are the crazy policies they DO support, like: letting biological boys compete against girls in sports believing men can get pregnant open borders, and sending free money to able-bodied people who don’t work, while defunding the police who put their lives on the line every day to protect us They’re hiding their real agenda, but I’m glad to say our House Republican majority is stepping up to stop it. I’m worried that we could be losing support for our movement. My team tells me that folks aren’t opening our emails as often as they once did or even engaging with the content we send. I implore you to remain involved. God Bless, Jim Jordan About Jim Jordan: | Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable. In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate. As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending. He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio. | Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress PO BOX 355 Delaware, OH 43015

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Limited-edition offer: The College Scam
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._jdmeh3hlfNiVow)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.-gU5zSKifikHNQQ)
---
[](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.-UHMgGwODqHOf8E2z4HGLA)
---
[](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

** _And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._mG3Rn5PK2cEYmONA) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left's college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](http://trk.faithandlibertymail._7BA) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEOTurning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
Faith & Liberty PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMDQwLTM5MmJjMDI2ZGVlNDRhMzQ5ZjA3NjkwZGFjNjdhZWM3IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/Pi5DeoNBMiBU_y059fP3CA) to unsubscribe.
---

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Have you seen what they're doing to our kids?
body:
I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c1523%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=wCaEf3b1A2UQCBTecUKeOA&sysid=1)

---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.”
---
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658346%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8qIAFsDNAsvBV92Om%2fIXBQ&sysid=1)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658347%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iom%2fMZIJr75CMWdqPhxD6Q&sysid=1) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658348%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YTbIeUmtpO%2fMunkm2dVV5w&sysid=1) Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658346%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8qIAFsDNAsvBV92Om%2fIXBQ&sysid=1)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658349%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=NnXzStS60u3KVGz8KTEirw&sysid=1) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, 35, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658340%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0O%2fAlSe11HKIQCsFW%2fVDBQ&sysid=1)

name: Brent Bozell
subject: 10 biggest lies from Biden's State of the Union
body:
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zql4on79h1tgnuhdomthr5t2emti11nn79qhcl20_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjgm0ob4cth2bs)
Friend,

Did you see the State of the Union the other night?

If you did, I'm sure you're as disgusted by all the lies Biden told during the speech. And if you didn't, you can find **The 10 Biggest Lies Biden told in the State of the Union below.**

Let me introduce myself. My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC).

**MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media and holding them accountable for their corruption and lies.**

[_**I 've set a goal to raise $10,000 this week to support our fight to END media corruption. Can you join the fight with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to send your urgent support >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z37dmtrkd0tkkod91q20ilkosjnacoc9ehlngv0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjgm0ob4cth2bs)

As promised, here are **The 10 Biggest Lies Biden told in the State of the Union:**

1. **LIE:** The most jobs ever created under a president.

**Fact:** Under Biden's poor economy, more people are working two jobs. It was people going back to work after the lockdowns that caused the rise in jobs.

2. **LIE:** Unemployment is at its lowest rate in 50 years.

**Fact:** They manipulated unemployment statistics by no longer tracking young, healthy men who gave up looking for work and removed themselves from the workforce.

3. **LIE:** Inflation is falling.

**Fact:** Inflation statistics don't often include everyday items like groceries and energy bills.

4. **LIE:** The COVID vaccine saved millions of lives.

**Fact:** Countries that didn't force the vaccine on their citizens are doing just as well, if not better, than those that did.

5. **LIE:** The pandemic caused a spike in crime.

**Fact:** Antifa and BLM radicals destroyed cities and police departments while Democratic mayors encouraged the madness.

[_**Click here to END Government and Media corruption >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdlccr96cfft4lhd4fbvuiebav79fm3noidullag_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjgm0ob4cth2bs)

6. **LIE:** Biden is cracking down on the border and border security.

**Fact:** We are seeing more illegal immigrants crossing the border now than ever under President Trump.

7. **LIE:** Biden thinks bipartisanship is important.

**Fact:** The country is more divisive than ever since Biden enacted his policies for the vaccine mandates, energy and ESG, and radical trans ideology.

8. **LIE:** The attack on Paul Pelosi was Trump's fault.

**Fact:** His attacker was a crazy, drugged-out nudist living in San Francisco.

9. **LIE:** Hate and extremism are coming from the right and Republicans,

**Fact:** Biden and the Democrats fueled radical Antifa to burn down cities -- and I'd call that a show of hate and extremism.

10. **LIE:** Debt decreased by $1.7 trillion in two years.

**Fact:** According to the U.S. Treasury, during Biden's first two years in office -- Jan. 20, 2021, through Jan. 20, 2023 -- the federal debt increased by approximately $3.7 trillion.

[_**Help hold the media accountable for their corruption with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount.**__**Click HERE**_ _**to send a gift >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zit3n3udtn6vgsc07tqa3k3vim6kth7ho317i248_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjgm0ob4cth2bs)

And there were more lies than I could keep track of in the rest of Biden's speech, friend.

**It 's outrageous to see how the radical Left media perpetuates government corruption!**

Unfortunately, many people believe Biden and these lies while he continues to further hate, corruption, and division.

That's why MRC's mission to expose corruption and hold those accountable is so important. **Can you help us reach our goal by clicking any link below to help reach our goal of $10,000 this weekend?**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3qil0uactuc19g478p2jjm1q6setl9k5b5ogvu0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjgm0ob4cth2bs)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztpfqbn71ko85e781gblp9e9vrmko8tuijuj4roo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjgm0ob4cth2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znhv75dm1o5d0pdsh97gugfok5ava76sg451valo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjgm0ob4cth2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znphjn4k24t62k53kjtidm83fijtpt6qsqsmu4dg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjgm0ob4cth2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zemr62ulck79le653sa2bchno62id3o7932m07d8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjgm0ob4cth2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrm6oodb3dpv7t0asknpdmtll0rvo46f2fmsdjhg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjgm0ob4cth2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2stb1qjmgrde5a18b24ea0up23jj60j0h142qog_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjgm0ob4cth2bs)

name: American Action News
subject: Bezos & Musk investing billions to transform America
body:
This is troubling. Have you heard of COP26? Almost nobody has.
| Dear Reader, This is troubling. Have you heard of [COP26?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z31hle7a3bvht7pup7d9t5uimk8ecmb0r01elar0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjgm0ob2clh2bs) Almost nobody has. Amid the distractions caused by lingering health issues, conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation... Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world's most powerful people, including:
* U.S. President, Joe Biden...
* British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson...
* Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau...
* French President Emmanuel Macron...
* ... and many more...

From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a $150 trillion 'global transition' of our economy. Since then, Bank of America has [signed this accord,](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc8bvsf4flo7kbfh6ku1begl71njpm49s6qo9s60_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjgm0ob2clh2bs) along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world's biggest companies. Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this 'transformation' as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins has followed the money... [And what she's found is startling. ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo1ipv6etrpuojuck6odiq8bqd8n80vmfa5oq61o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjgm0ob2clh2bs) She says: **" While most Americans are distracted by mainstream media headlines calling for a stock market crash, I've found evidence that shows where the elites are spending $150 trillion to 'transform' the economy. Most Americans will be shocked when they see what happens next."** I had to know more, so I scheduled an interview for Nomi to go deeper into the details of this 'transformation.' She agreed to do the interview on one condition: she wanted to record it so she could get her message in front of as many Americans as possible before it's too late. [Go here to see how this 'transformation' will play out - and what it means for your money.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo1rltmsjg51rabevo8c3fp819bqlatkao8dqs2g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjgm0ob2clh2bs) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, _Distortion Report_
---

name: GOP Presidential
subject: Bezos & Musk investing billions to transform America
body:
Have you heard of COP26? Almost nobody has. Amid the distractions caused by lingering health issues, conflicts overseas, shor
| Dear Reader, This is troubling. Have you heard of [COP26?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpea1kceke5aefrpvm3moi37jrfep5ttiqpi35q0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjgmcp32clh2bs) Almost nobody has. Amid the distractions caused by lingering health issues, conflicts overseas, shortages, and inflation... Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen recently took the stage at COP26 in Glasgow, Scotland to address some of the world's most powerful people, including:
* U.S. President, Joe Biden...
* British Prime Minister, Boris Johnson...
* Canadian Prime Minister, Justin Trudeau...
* French President Emmanuel Macron...
* ... and many more...

From the stage, Yellen called for world leaders to commit to a $150 trillion 'global transition' of our economy. Since then, Bank of America has [signed this accord,](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z98md4pj3jou47h5t2u5pctqj77usbo6ahnijj2g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjgmcp32clh2bs) along with 131 countries, 234 cities, and 695 of the world's biggest companies. Jeff Bezos and Elon Musk have invested in this 'transformation' as well. What is it that Yellen, Biden, Trudeau, Bezos and Musk are pushing for? And what does it mean for your money? Investigative journalist and renowned economist, Nomi Prins has followed the money... [And what she's found is startling. ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6kp2hnimgsq3s0tjke1rra1jhsjhlher5p94c18_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjgmcp32clh2bs) She says: **" While most Americans are distracted by mainstream media headlines calling for a stock market crash, I've found evidence that shows where the elites are spending $150 trillion to 'transform' the economy. Most Americans will be shocked when they see what happens next."** I had to know more, so I scheduled an interview for Nomi to go deeper into the details of this 'transformation.' She agreed to do the interview on one condition: she wanted to record it so she could get her message in front of as many Americans as possible before it's too late. [Go here to see how this 'transformation' will play out - and what it means for your money.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1ghvs8nt928gad1t0ls5kra9g2b28fl3ou64ejo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjgmcp32clh2bs) Regards, Maria Bonaventura
Senior Managing Editor, _Distortion Report_

name: Brent Bozell
subject: 10 biggest lies from Biden's State of the Union
body:
Did you see the State of the Union the other night?
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp4f28q8lhstk19rrgce796blu7dff8133o61v0g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjgm2o34cjh2bs)
Friend,

Did you see the State of the Union the other night?

If you did, I'm sure you're as disgusted by all the lies Biden told during the speech. And if you didn't, you can find **The 10 Biggest Lies Biden told in the State of the Union below.**

Let me introduce myself. My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC).

**MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media and holding them accountable for their corruption and lies.**

[_**I 've set a goal to raise $10,000 this week to support our fight to END media corruption. Can you join the fight with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to send your urgent support >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zneg4ietn6ukdf57jclvosdubt20cfihrum0ogm8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjgm2o34cjh2bs)

As promised, here are **The 10 Biggest Lies Biden told in the State of the Union:**

1. **LIE:** The most jobs ever created under a president.

**Fact:** Under Biden's poor economy, more people are working two jobs. It was people going back to work after the lockdowns that caused the rise in jobs.

2. **LIE:** Unemployment is at its lowest rate in 50 years.

**Fact:** They manipulated unemployment statistics by no longer tracking young, healthy men who gave up looking for work and removed themselves from the workforce.

3. **LIE:** Inflation is falling.

**Fact:** Inflation statistics don't often include everyday items like groceries and energy bills.

4. **LIE:** The COVID vaccine saved millions of lives.

**Fact:** Countries that didn't force the vaccine on their citizens are doing just as well, if not better, than those that did.

5. **LIE:** The pandemic caused a spike in crime.

**Fact:** Antifa and BLM radicals destroyed cities and police departments while Democratic mayors encouraged the madness.

[_**Click here to END Government and Media corruption >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq7of3qhborvglm1d492tm8n0re83g7qn884epsg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjgm2o34cjh2bs)

6. **LIE:** Biden is cracking down on the border and border security.

**Fact:** We are seeing more illegal immigrants crossing the border now than ever under President Trump.

7. **LIE:** Biden thinks bipartisanship is important.

**Fact:** The country is more divisive than ever since Biden enacted his policies for the vaccine mandates, energy and ESG, and radical trans ideology.

8. **LIE:** The attack on Paul Pelosi was Trump's fault.

**Fact:** His attacker was a crazy, drugged-out nudist living in San Francisco.

9. **LIE:** Hate and extremism are coming from the right and Republicans,

**Fact:** Biden and the Democrats fueled radical Antifa to burn down cities -- and I'd call that a show of hate and extremism.

10. **LIE:** Debt decreased by $1.7 trillion in two years.

**Fact:** According to the U.S. Treasury, during Biden's first two years in office -- Jan. 20, 2021, through Jan. 20, 2023 -- the federal debt increased by approximately $3.7 trillion.

[_**Help hold the media accountable for their corruption with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount.**__**Click HERE**_ _**to send a gift >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi1fdi3b5mufg43vdrha1do38vtskdvpf0h8sc2g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjgm2o34cjh2bs)

And there were more lies than I could keep track of in the rest of Biden's speech, Friend.

**It 's outrageous to see how the radical Left media perpetuates government corruption!**

Unfortunately, many people believe Biden and these lies while he continues to further hate, corruption, and division.

That's why MRC's mission to expose corruption and hold those accountable is so important. **Can you help us reach our goal by clicking any link below to help reach our goal of $10,000 this weekend?**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbj0moo25q1696kbca6dc3adjtpndq51tbia3fb0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjgm2o34cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsa8fksc44jhhdc35tk202fkjaht7he9earu626g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjgm2o34cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo0ng4pttkqv5dhtit5tmun6irmf40s80mph4vgg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjgm2o34cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztn6uefepmsuikbeoa5l7g72h6n1dfrlfbvscovg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjgm2o34cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkd83k2m4qdqdmmqtsc8cmrjlsgdpr5fjb77j1ng_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjgm2o34cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv94elfcrn4mp80n7kt2ojh6fi18egavimp059jg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjgm2o34cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zinbqobesjc1glqr3ppoc51lh1ivbl5q137qqfio_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjgm2o34cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfv7v7o1ovkf4od4b09uhqu2eglkd5r97egvc278_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjgm2o34cjh2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z70a2ts5gmhcu2dq3sbhboosvhee9hhr5hkvh638_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjgm2o34cjh2bs)

Thank you,

Brent Bozell
Founder and President of MRC

**This Biblical Prophecy Is Coming True Right Before Our Eyes**
| | | The book of Revelations predicts four horsemen will usher in the end times:

_**False prophets, war, famine, and pestilence. **_

These end-time prophecies may not be here just yet.

Hi, I'm Lance Wallnau, Christian author and spiritual leader to tens of thousands of people for over thirty years. I was one of the few evangelical pastors who predicted Donald Trump's incredible victory in 2016. And now I'm here to warn you about something else that is to come.

You see, extreme inflation can cause economic depression, shortages, and even famine. And as we know, these things lead to social upheaval, war, and eventually pestilence.

**Inflation Is The Trigger
That Starts It All!**
I believe God is using inflation to warn us about the end times. Remember "God warned Noah" before the flood? How did Noah respond? He "moved with fear to the preparation of the ark."

Which is why you should prepare immediately! Because I DON'T WANT you and your family to struggle to survive the financial crisis that **HAS ALREADY STARTED! **

The first step, if you are over 40 years old, is to protect and preserve one of your most important assets: Your retirement account.

And to do that, I urge you to consider diversifying away from vulnerable paper assets and into physical precious metals.

The best option is a Birch Gold Group self-directed physical gold IRA. Because these accounts have no fees, penalties, or taxes when you transfer funds from your current retirement account!

Read this info kit to see how Gold IRAs work:

**[Click here to request your FREE Info Kit On Gold IRAs](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)**

Lance Wallnau

[**Please give a crucial $25, $50, $100, or more TODAY to fully fund my two critical class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE and get JUSTICE for ALL January 6 protesters!**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2ztqjsbt6dkfph3nrh1acdei71bau2bcor1ojjikg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjim8oj7c5h2bs)

I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends.

**At this time, I can 't help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who've been thrown to the wolves.**

Those held in jail - especially the hellish D.C. jail - couldn't celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren't allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church.

**If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang ...while hoping that the guards wouldn't show up and beat them again.**

You and I know they're being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building.

Jesus Rivera didn't even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day.

But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway.

Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he's been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments.

As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba!

**Many of these jailed patriots haven 't held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days.**

That's why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time.

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years.

You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

**I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. **

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN!**

And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten criminal regime in court.

I'm suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray.

[**Friend, PLEASE help me double down in my fight to GET JUSTICE FOR ALL JANUARY 6 PROTESTERS AND SET THEM FREE with your absolutely vital gift of $25, $50, $100 or even more RIGHT NOW.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z2a4fpo2rkm85aj0n6er3f4kv3tb4v05frd7l9co_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjim8oj7c5h2bs)

Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation.

[**So please give what you can right away.**](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zjjuc3vgsddh11isd9tpu8u3djuv92kjifu99sjo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjim8oj7c5h2bs)

Thank you so much!

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman

clean_body: Those held in jail – especially the hellish D.C. jail – couldn’t celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, childre Those held in jail - especially the hellish D.C. jail - couldn't celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren't allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. | | | | Dear Friend, I hope you enjoyed a wonderful Christmas and New Year with your family and friends. At this time, I can 't help but think of my client, Marine combat veteran Jesus Rivera, and the other January 6 Peaceful Protesters who've been thrown to the wolves. Those held in jail - especially the hellish D.C. jail - couldn't celebrate Christmas last year with their spouses, children, extended families, or friends. They weren't allowed to go to Midnight Mass or sing Christmas hymns on Sunday morning at church. If they celebrated, they did it as political prisoners who prayed and sang ...while hoping that the guards wouldn't show up and beat them again. You and I know they're being railroaded for just exercising their Constitutionally protected rights that day at the Capitol building. Jesus Rivera didn't even protest. He just shot video on his smart phone and a digital camera for a local news station back home in Florida. He entered the Capitol peacefully like many other patriots that day. But Jesus has been sentenced to eight months in federal prison anyway. Disabled Marine veteran Zach Rehl protested peacefully, but he's been held without bail and the VA cut off his disability payments. As you know, other January 6 peaceful protesters have been driven to such desperation by the abuse and torture they endure, that over 30 of them begged to get transferred to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba! Many of these jailed patriots haven 't held or even seen their families in a year or more...some, like prisoner Peter Stager, have been jailed for over 600 days. That's why I beg you to stand with me at this crucial time. I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch. I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years. You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows. I 'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton. I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton. And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others. I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents - AND WIN! And now I'm pursuing two class action lawsuits and other important legal actions to get justice for the January 6 Protesters and take on Joe Biden's rotten criminal regime in court. I'm suing everyone responsible for these outrages, including FBI Director Christopher Wray. Your best gift today will help me fight for these jailed patriots, bring them justice, and fight for the future of our Great Nation. Thank you so much! Sincerely, Larry Klayman Founder of both Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch Current Chairman and General Counsel of Freedom Watch, Inc. Joni Ernst and I led an investigation to uncover the truth about pandemic fraud. _And what we learned was shocking:_ ✔️ Roughly 222,000 fake SSNs were used on EIDL and PPP loan applications.✔️ Almost 70,000 of those applications were approved.**✔️**** _And taxpayers are on the hook for all_**** _$5.4 BILLION._** What makes this even worse, is we have _no idea_ how many of these people "qualified" for PPP loan forgiveness. _[**_HOLD FRAUDSTERS ACCOUNTABLE >>_**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62304622:JPPDkDGNT:m:1:3331421248:DA698F47BDC587832D1C04FAD62252B3:r)_ The Small Business Association failed to protect taxpayers from fraudsters looking to game the system. It's time for the agency to conduct an internal audit, identify those that stole from their neighbors, and work with the DOJ to prosecute these offenders. _[**_Stand with Joni and me to ensure the SBA and DOJ prosecutes these scammers to the fullest extent of the law._**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62304622:JPPDkDGNT:m:1:3331421248:DA698F47BDC587832D1C04FAD62252B3:r)_

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Joe Biden Brought Fire Tuesday night 🔥🔥 in the single greatest State of the Union speech I have ever seen. And I am not as young as I'd like to be :)
body:
🔥🔥
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T98913ac9-0fe1-4051-863d-a10f390cb5db/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Joe Biden Brought Fire Tuesday night 🔥🔥 in the single greatest State of the Union speech I have ever seen. And I am not as young as I'd like to be :)** _On the priorities & policies we care about, President Biden was unbelievable. To the commentariat in mainstream media--who care only for performance, often to our great detriment--he was unparalleled. To the whining, slithering snakes of the GOP, he was unbowed._ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc9d7ac5a-74ef-46d5-9d17-b4719c32bda4/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _**President Biden rightfully bragged about the 500,000+ jobs he created in January, lowest unemployment since before we walked on the Moon. He called for a national abortion rights guarantee for a ban on all assault weapons. But it's how he did it that was even better.**_
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Taa2721c7-c37a-4fe5-87c8-1fd7685a53df/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_He brought both strength and humility, humor and purpose, and Republicans had no idea whether to stand and clap, sit on their hands or scream "liar" as Marjorie Taylor Greene did. The President handled that brilliantly, chuckling and telling her and her cohort of kooks he had the proof if they wanted to see it._** Former GOP Rep. Kinzinger, one of 10 Republicans who stood up to Trump to vote for impeachment, knew what he was seeing: [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4926f13a-7311-4014-bed7-8fe75a9b1ff0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **The President even suckered Republicans into publicly booing the idea of cutting Social Security, and then with a smile said he was glad there was "unity" on that topic, which will be news to Mitch McConnell, Lindsay Graham and Rick Scott. ** _**President Biden was everything we elected and fought for. Now we need to get him reelected in what will be an election matching the importance of 2020, Lincoln's win in 1860 or FDR in 1932. All three had to fight right-wing, democracy assaulting tyrants of their time, but we don't yet know how Joe Biden's story--and, hence, ours--will end. We have control over this one though--It's Up To Us.**_ [**_So can you join us in giving the President of the United States--OUR PRESIDENT--$5, $10, $25 or anything you can manage_** ,**_ so we make sure we do not go gently into that good night? That we support President BIden 1000% in this fight._**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbb6a3400-1d56-44f1-8d9a-6075c954b660/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for defending the right person at a crucial time in our history. Cliff

Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! name: Aadland For Colorado
subject: Interviewing for Chairman
body:
| | | |
---
---
|
# Erik's Considerable Resume
---
|
---
| | |
---|---
|
----Any candidate running for office is essentially interviewing with their constituency for the position. In this race for Chairman of the Colorado Republican Party, it is equally important that voting members understand the qualifications of each candidate in question before casting their vote. For this reason, I am publishing my resume below.
| |
---|---
|
----Moving this party forward will require extraordinary leadership to unify people behind a common vision, to restore trust with the constituency, to inspire unaffiliated voters to register as Republicans, to turn people out to vote in our favor and to raise significant funds to get our message out. The Chairman's role is to enable Republicans to win elections; this is accomplished by setting a clear vision, communicating it expertly, unifying Republicans on common grounds, and ultimately winning over the constituency to vote Republican. To do this will require exceptional organizational management experience, remarkable leadership acumen, gifted communication skills, and the ability to influence rather than dictate.
| | |
---|---
|
----I am not a career politician, but an accomplished leader with significant experience leading teams all over the world, often in the toughest circumstances (such as combat). I also demonstrated my fundraising ability, raising approximately $1.4 million in my Congressional race. Prior to that, I was a Project Manager for an international project in Israel with a budget of $300 million; a project which I assumed 8 months behind schedule and led to completion on time. I know how to manage people and money, and to lead people to accomplish the most challenging tasks amidst the most daunting conditions.
| |
---|---
|
------Previously, our chairperson has come from the political and legal ranks, whereas my background is military and business leadership. It is time to try a different tack to elect a leader who can address the significant challenges we face in moving our party forward after the worst series of defeats in Colorado Republican history. In fact, I think revitalizing our Grand Old Party and changing the course of Colorado as chairman will be the most difficult task I have ever endeavored to take on. I hope my resume speaks for itself.
|
---
|
---
|
---
| | [Send Erik your feedback](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QgIOvtDMsK9Yc3w1_7QuNKQ2TQGiH6rkcPtE6GkzTqUfln7-gc0soJ9YsP2yjWDc9BBdVkxN3kWNccGWYint5POkTTcO1wUt5C2rXqt_CYT_i_ulBba3SJyHBW1kE-WvKOWwIhB-xeHdCPkOAAt6PPSavd5xm-yi1-PKczWRoFkK8uXJisBzFXjNpgsoR8sknnQZAaRk0p4J2AoPKgj6iFiNL0NUq6yJ6j7gYKCDMx0nOrfJx4x3RrDpkxPAKoI7&c=1BDGMUud6xuk7icSMcdH7EwV0x3k5ZbBqMlh7o9t66cRtZzpxn186A==&ch=n343WMPv7zdCH0zIxPnjGwX6k1fI4k3lgq-uifCTasIBCIC-X-BiwA==)
---
| |
---
|
## Erik's Resume
---
|
## Summary
---
|
---
Decorated US Army Combat Veteran (two Bronze Star medals, one for valor) with over 20 years of proven leadership in operations, project management and supply chain while serving in the military and corporate sectors. Experienced manager of technical experts, supply chain professionals, business analysts and military personnel. Effective and innovative leader, planner, and communicator with exceptional organizational development, change management and team building skills. Management experience includes:
• Oil and Gas Drilling Operations • Military Operations (2 combat tours) • Project and Program Management • Strategic Planning • Procurement and Logistics • Geopolitics

---
|
## Skills
---
|
---
|
* Inspirational leadership
* Project management
* Coaching and mentoring
* Strategic planning
* Effective and efficient communication

---
|
* Organizational management
* Change management
* Motivational Speaking
* Operational management
* Team building

---
|
## Career Experience
---
|
---
|
# Self-employed, US Congressional Candidate: Apr '22--Present
---
|
# United States Congressional Candidate, Colorado's 7th Congressional District Jan 2021--Nov 2022
---
|
* Won the Colorado Republican Primary convention with 63% of the vote to make the primary ballot
* Won a tightly contested primary by 12 percentage points to become the Republican Nominee for Colorado's 7th Congressional District
* Raised over $1.4 million within Federal Election Commission regulations limiting donations to $5800/individual
* Endorsed by five former presidential cabinet members, 14 sitting and former members of Congress, two former governors, numerous state and county officials, several media personalities, and many pro-business organizations (see AadlandforColorado.com for the full list)
* Built a campaign team of 10 Senior Staff, 40 Area Coordinators and 200 Volunteers
* Received over 150,000 votes in the general election

---
---
|
# Noble Energy, Inc. - Energy Sector Leader: Jun 2011--Apr 2020
---
| Onshore Project Manager, Leviathan Project, Israel
---
| Sep 2018--Apr 2020
---
|
* Key contributor to the geopolitically significant Leviathan Project ($5 billion project) which made Israel a net-exporter of natural gas
* Successfully managed the Leviathan Project's international engineering and construction of the onshore pipelines and Hagit condensate terminal to receive gas and condensate from the offshore platform off the coast of Israel
* Managed a multicultural international team of over 150 people (engineers, construction supervisors and contractors)
* Assumed management 8 months behind schedule; successfully accelerated the project to deliver first gas on time
* Managed a combined budget of over $300 million

---
---
| Business Integration Manager, Denver CO
---
| Apr 2017--Sep 2018
---
|
* Managed a team of business analysts responsible for high-level project management and process improvement supporting a business unit with an annual capital allocation of approximately $1 billion
* Managed high-profile projects for the company such as the political activities to defeat Prop. 112, the development of the company's Sustainability and Corporate Responsibility (SCR) Committee, and construction of the Environmental, Sustainability and Governance (ESG) framework
* Oversaw and enforced the business unit's process for planning, developing and executing oil and gas development plans across the company's Colorado operations
* Orchestrated the business unit's risk management process to address sustained and emerging risks to the business, process safety and personal safety

---
---
| Procurement Manager, Denver CO
---
| Apr 2015--Sep 2017
---
|
* Managed procurement processes for a business unit with over 450 vendors and an annual expenditure more than $1 billion
* Supervised a team of Procurement Agents supporting a U.S. Onshore business unit comprised of drilling, construction, well execution, production, maintenance, facilities and well engineering, EHS&R and land departments
* Led procurement initiatives to negotiate cost concessions with vendors resulting in an annual cost savings of over $90 million
* Orchestrated a cross-functional effort with business unit leadership teams and the finance department to reduce the active vendor pool by 20%, increasing synergy and improving our ability to leverage spending

---
| Drilling Engineer III, Denver CO
---
| Nov 2014--Apr 2015
---
|
* Oversaw the operations and managed the technical aspects of multi-million dollar unconventional drilling operations in the DJ Basin, Colorado
* Conducted technical special projects in support of the drilling operations, to include BHA design analysis, rotary-steerable system use cost analysis, connection-time analysis, and liner-run torque and drag models

---
| Drilling Supervisor, Greeley CO and Internationally
---
| Sep 2012--Nov 2014
---
|
* Served as the on-site project manager and SME for multi-million dollar onshore unconventional drilling operation in the DJ Basin, Colorado
* Assisted in the commissioning of the Atwood Advantage Drillship at the DSME shipyard in Geoje, South Korea
* Supervised completions operations on the SEDCO Express semi-submersible drilling rig located offshore Israel

---
| Global Logistics Manager, Houston TX
---
| Jun 2011--Sep 2012
---
|
* First Global Logistics Manager for the company - built the logistics department from the ground up to support the company's vision of having a best-in-class internal logistics provider
* Developed and implemented the first Trade Compliance Program for the company
* Directly managed the global logistics staff activities to support the company's marine, aviation, heavy lift and freight forwarding requirements in support of global operations with expenditures of more than $100 million annually
* Supervised a team of ten people consisting of logistics coordinators, trade compliance coordinators and expeditors
* Developed and executed the project logistics for the international multibillion-dollar Alen Project and three international 100 million-dollar-plus projects (Noa/Pinnacles, Mari-B Brownfield, AOT Expansion)

---
|
# U.S. Army, Troop Commander: ----------Jun 2002--Jan 2011
---
| Reconnaissance Troop Commander, Afghanistan and Ft. Lewis WA (Captain)
---
| Jun 2002--Jan 2011
---
|
* Awarded Bronze Star Medal and Meritorious Service Medal
* Led 130 Soldiers through preparation, deployment, and 12 months of combat operations in southern Afghanistan; responsible for an area of operations consisting of approximately 2000 square kilometers
* Accounted for over $80 million of equipment/property; managed $20,000 monthly budget, and approved project budget of over $5 million
* Managed and secured the second largest point of entry into Afghanistan in support of the US Forces surge, a strategic objective of the US ISAF Commander; negotiated with Afghan government officials, customs, contractors and foreign military leaders to seamlessly implement project
* Rated the best "war-fighting" commander in the squadron and top 1% of officers in the brigade

---
| Program Manager, Fort Lewis WA
---
| Jun 2006--Nov 2008

In this race for Chairman of the Colorado Republican Party, it is equally important that voting members understand the qualifications of each candidate in question before casting their vote. For this reason, I am publishing my resume below. | | ---|--- | ----Moving this party forward will require extraordinary leadership to unify people behind a common vision, to restore trust with the constituency, to inspire unaffiliated voters to register as Republicans, to turn people out to vote in our favor and to raise significant funds to get our message out. The Chairman's role is to enable Republicans to win elections; this is accomplished by setting a clear vision, communicating it expertly, unifying Republicans on common grounds, and ultimately winning over the constituency to vote Republican. To do this will require exceptional organizational management experience, remarkable leadership acumen, gifted communication skills, and the ability to influence rather than dictate. | | | ---|--- | ----I am not a career politician, but an accomplished leader with significant experience leading teams all over the world, often in the toughest circumstances (such as combat). I also demonstrated my fundraising ability, raising approximately $1.4 million in my Congressional race. Prior to that, I was a Project Manager for an international project in Israel with a budget of $300 million; a project which I assumed 8 months behind schedule and led to completion on time. I know how to manage people and money, and to lead people to accomplish the most challenging tasks amidst the most daunting conditions. | | ---|--- | ------Previously, our chairperson has come from the political and legal ranks, whereas my background is military and business leadership. It is time to try a different tack to elect a leader who can address the significant challenges we face in moving our party forward after the worst series of defeats in Colorado Republican history. body:
Map manipulators are comfortable bending -- or even breaking -- the structures of our democracy to maintain power.
|
---

Hey team,
I have to level with you there are ongoing threats against our democracy that will have a consequential impact on 2024 and beyond.
Here’s how map manipulators and conservative extremists are doubling down on their anti-democratic tactics in 2023 and taking things a step further:
→ taking political opportunity to gerrymandering maps
→ suppressing voting power
→ failing to improve the fairness of state legislative maps
| [**TAKE ACTION FOR FAIR MAPS TODAY!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58485940/391249591/1581849101?refcode=20230209_AOTL_F_LizAOTL_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNiZjJiNGNjLThiYTgtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nN3iWJIz_7pYHwzonu59QdjDAW5KDge3tErM5awHjP4=)
---
* * *
**North Carolina**
Conservative legislative leadership filed a petition to reconsider the _Harper v. Hall_ ruling that struck down the legislature’s gerrymandered state senate map. This is an attempt to undermine the state’s system of checks and balances and seek political opportunity, under their belief that new justices on North Carolina’s supreme court would side with them simply because they have the same party affiliation.
* * *
**Ohio**
Last month, House Bill 458 was signed into law. This bill will force Ohioans to show a state-issued photo ID when voting in person, denying voting access to many Ohioans that previously voted using an alternate form of identification indicating their current address. It also eliminates early voting on the Monday before Election Day, shortens the deadline to apply to cast absent voters’ ballots by mail and limits polling place accessibility.
* * *
**Texas**
The Texas Senate is gearing up for another round of redistricting. According to the Texas Demographic Center, communities of color have accounted for over 95% of growth during the previous decade. A new state legislative map should reflect this demographic shift and allow communities of color the opportunity to vote for their candidate of choice. However, experts predict no significant changes to the maps.
* * *
_**Remember that all the progress we have made is fragile.**_ And I want to be clear. We must act now to protect our democracy. The new wave of radical gerrymandering and threats to our democracy are happening at this very second.
[**All On The Line needs your help today. Will you rush a contribution to boost us in our fight against gerrymandering?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58485941/391249592/1581849101?refcode=20230209_AOTL_F_LizAOTL_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNiZjJiNGNjLThiYTgtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nN3iWJIz_7pYHwzonu59QdjDAW5KDge3tErM5awHjP4=)

We must take unified action and put a stop to the outrageous extremist agenda in 2023. The way we see it, all of these trends are a reaction to folks, like you, getting involved and making a real difference. **[Donate $23 to All On The Line as we are taking action to combat threats against democracy in 2023?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58485962/391249640/1581849101?express_lane=true&amount=23&refcode=20230209_AOTL_F_LizAOTL_RedLite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNiZjJiNGNjLThiYTgtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=nN3iWJIz_7pYHwzonu59QdjDAW5KDge3tErM5awHjP4=)**

clean_body: Map manipulators are comfortable bending -- or even breaking -- the structures of our democracy to maintain power. | Hey team, I have to level with you there are ongoing threats against our democracy that will have a consequential impact on 2024 and beyond. Here’s how map manipulators and conservative extremists are doubling down on their anti-democratic tactics in 2023 and taking things a step further: → taking political opportunity to gerrymandering maps → suppressing voting power → failing to improve the fairness of state legislative maps | = North Carolina Conservative legislative leadership filed a petition to reconsider the Harper v. Hall ruling that struck down the legislature’s gerrymandered state senate map. This is an attempt to undermine the state’s system of checks and balances and seek political opportunity, under their belief that new justices on North Carolina’s supreme court would side with them simply because they have the same party affiliation. Ohio Last month, House Bill 458 was signed into law. This bill will force Ohioans to show a state-issued photo ID when voting in person, denying voting access to many Ohioans that previously voted using an alternate form of identification indicating their current address. It also eliminates early voting on the Monday before Election Day, shortens the deadline to apply to cast absent voters’ ballots by mail and limits polling place accessibility. Texas The Texas Senate is gearing up for another round of redistricting. According to the Texas Demographic Center, communities of color have accounted for over 95% of growth during the previous decade. A new state legislative map should reflect this demographic shift and allow communities of color the opportunity to vote for their candidate of choice. However, experts predict no significant changes to the maps. Remember that all the progress we have made is fragile. And I want to be clear. We must act now to protect our democracy. The new wave of radical gerrymandering and threats to our democracy are happening at this very second. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = We must take unified action and put a stop to the outrageous extremist agenda in 2023. The way we see it, all of these trends are a reaction to folks, like you, getting involved and making a real difference. = Thank you for your support, Liz Wester Advocacy Director All On The Line is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. TextFAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. name: Mike Pompeo
subject: This is not the way
