body:
| |
---
| | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62304779:J37h6DGNQ:m:1:3331421248:3ABE881693F1FA17E17A1475A90F5974:r)
---

**All the hard work I put into securing our border ... Joe Biden ruined it.**

I spent more time working on securing our southern border than any other Secretary of State or CIA Director in history because I knew that a nation without secure borders is no nation at all.

**Joe Biden, on the other hand, has tried to ignore the crisis his policies have created at the southern border. Worse of all: in Joe Biden 's America, every state is a border state. This isn't just a problem for a few towns along the border anymore.**

Putting Americans first starts with ensuring security and regulating the flow of people across the border, something the Biden Administration is too naive to understand.

The Democrats are just sitting back and allowing swarms of thousands upon thousands of illegal immigrants, terrorists, and drug traffickers to flow freely into the U.S. _**[That's why I need your help to support America First conservatives who won't just sit back and watch, but will get their hands dirty and secure our border!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62304779:J37h6DGNQ:m:1:3331421248:3ABE881693F1FA17E17A1475A90F5974:r "That’s why I need
your help to support America First conservatives who won’t just sit back and watch, but will get their hands dirty and secure our
border!")**_

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62304779:J37h6DGNQ:m:1:3331421248:3ABE881693F1FA17E17A1475A90F5974:r)
---

Now, border crossings are at an all-time high. Over _**3X higher**_ than what they were under the Trump Administration. _**UNBELIEVABLE**_.

That's why I am working day and night to bring back the America first policies I helped implement when Republicans were in power. Whether it was our Remain in Mexico policy or building the border wall, we took decisive action to secure our borders and protect our nation.

Now, I need YOUR help to make sure we return to those tough border policies that worked so well. Are you able to make a donation today to our _**[Border Security Fund](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62304779:J37h6DGNQ:m:1:3331421248:3ABE881693F1FA17E17A1475A90F5974:r "Border Security
Fund")**_ , to help us support more law and order conservative candidates all over the country who will never waver in the mission to keep the American people safe?

---
| | [DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62304779:J37h6DGNQ:m:1:3331421248:3ABE881693F1FA17E17A1475A90F5974:r)
---

It's critical we put an end to this madness before Joe Biden completely destroys our country.

Never Give An Inch,
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62304779:J37h6DGNQ:m:1:3331421248:3ABE881693F1FA17E17A1475A90F5974:r)

Mike Pompeo

Our God-given freedoms are under assault. That's why I created the Freedom Fund. To defend the freedoms and values that make America great against government overreach and the radical Left.

**[If you love America and refuse to let the Democrats turn the American dream into a socialist nightmare, then I need YOU to step up right away with an emergency donation to our Freedom Fund.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62304778:J37h6DGNQ:m:1:3331421248:3ABE881693F1FA17E17A1475A90F5974:r "If you love America and refuse to let the Democrats turn the American dream into a socialist

| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=01b2c8495fbc4ce79ffcde61a2cb1c94&_e=c_CrOUyy1Il4SPxqAlraUtuEHdw1h5E9emaZvFR4gtit-Ms68cr5WUwFQgeRJo0SUXq_BcoBzdwEMSRLEnHbx1JTGJRfoOjEtxneIqFDAKLAYJRmJjtPic4ecs7q7ZGjDTuw8e5ya3EKTFw6KDSreUzAZJ4OluPJekC9bnvmOmpDOc2-VE6WYxUhUSwtautMIKr7Vdw5aNNuKZyNJLyDzr30eLhTkdPtiTJHDI_h1dkI8RyiYmvAx-6ZgWyaoQZ1GxpY21Lt2Y8g1JXljz5dnVnF5CHjuYKMTGCpZPPzPU5OHsa8c9mdPMw6zikG_9tkUZZ1-TdrKnIkiaFL6NAn32M2WG1Za2-suoI6m4nHlh5aIbHGRU6iHglVDZceXnCr)

| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case:** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family –– including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
“Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?”
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I’m asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=01b2c8495fbc4ce79ffcde61a2cb1c94&_e=c_CrOUyy1Il4SPxqAlraUtuEHdw1h5E9emaZvFR4gtit-Ms68cr5WUwFQgeRJo0SUXq_BcoBzdwEMSRLEnHbx1JTGJRfoOjEtxneIqFDAKLAYJRmJjtPic4ecs7q7ZGjDTuw8e5ya3EKTFw6KDSreUzAZJ4OluPJekC9bnvmOmpDOc2-VE6WYxUhUSwtautMIKr7Vdw5aNNuKZyNJLyDzr30eLhTkdPtiTJHDI_h1dlQ5Oa9Wy2j61QgM4rMtFjctNyvI9Bncv6qqWkUecJfja3BFqHJ-_P3ISCWlmTWBtgdnUoCMLvZNe1r0HGivy-B6-HS6nJdqgsmT-Dv7974_VW2kqlIdwhGhWhWe6U8QwZA_FvzIQffr403f3d1yNEa) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today – but of course if you can give more, say $35, $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=01b2c8495fbc4ce79ffcde61a2cb1c94&_e=c_CrOUyy1Il4SPxqAlraUtuEHdw1h5E9emaZvFR4gtit-Ms68cr5WUwFQgeRJo0SUXq_BcoBzdwEMSRLEnHbx1JTGJRfoOjEtxneIqFDAKLAYJRmJjtPic4ecs7q7ZGjDTuw8e5ya3EKTFw6KDSreUzAZJ4OluPJekC9bnvmOmpDOc2-VE6WYxUhUSwtautMIKr7Vdw5aNNuKZyNJLyDzr30eLhTkdPtiTJHDI_h1dlUXTBlbgaMvpTInhIzi_e36YjZ6eHAYYluKW2tn_sCIkiNoINxvuxsmVVizHDhAVUIoRoH0ptyAgHVbnXd1_lR-885lKqhU4zntY_gO57hP95c6bnZE9ZaVFbCzmhUze9qr2g1N3nP4eLjrnxpBFh4) Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **

clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I’m asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left’s medical mutilation of our children in the name of “gender dysphoria.” | | | We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a “boy” at the young age of 13. | | In case you missed our announcement on Tucker’s show, let me quickly give you the details of our case: As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy... This included putting her on experimental drugs likeLupron , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders... ... Giving her constant testosterone injections... ... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15. How was this allowed to happen? It’s because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family –– including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation: “Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?” This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I’m asking for your help today to put an end to it! Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don’t act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she’ll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that’s where you come in. Whatever amount you’re able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. | | | So please, do not delay. Chloe’s landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these “physicians” abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's. | | Sincerely, | | | | | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country –– and winning Chloe Cole’s landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. | | | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177 Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

| Friend,
We've gotten off to a fast start serving as Georgia's Lieutenant Governor--and I wanted to take a minute to share some of the exciting updates with you.
INAUGURATION
On January 12th, 2023, I was officially sworn in as the 13th Lieutenant Governor of the great state of Georgia. It was a humbling and surreal moment, and I'm so grateful for the support of family, friends and supporters like you who helped make it possible.
---
|
---
|
---
| | |
---
| STATE OF THE STATE ADDRESS
---
| On January 25th, Governor Brian Kemp gave his State of the State address. I had the honor of addressing the joint session of the General Assembly and introducing our great Governor to deliver his remarks. In his speech, the Governor outlined his priorities to boost our economy, lower costs, strengthen public safety and improve education and healthcare across our state. I look forward to working with the Governor throughout this legislative session to accomplish our shared priorities and continue making our state the best place to live, work and raise a family.
---

| GEORGIA CHAMBER EGGS & ISSUES
Last month, I also had the privilege of speaking at the Georgia Chamber's Annual Eggs & Issues forum, where I discussed some of our legislative priorities and outlined our agenda for the upcoming session. If you didn't get the chance to attend in person, click [HERE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZLmHbDiLvsJ94zV-gAfleQvhJAfezr8oibtF8sy2oiSdXLoA6P1CNyO_Ul8BCHc_Eh_Fb4kVKHsonAmIvVfRAIv8eXM7i-H3imClDQNu_mKvqDOy9bFEDCHphDkEyL3HQrMW88yTuZ3XEXmDziApDkMXy3AU7Up5_3o1H9osqAu6BQnLv8Zf5Q==&c=Y0l-ih7sqRriq7oUhi9Pn0-Um9QXob-z2QE2mceoVbVvxJyHfMqESQ==&ch=hNlSPzCNyleGpRAL2TX9wesXIfl5nkbJ2mf9Js5yQrZA2q8x1jSwaQ==) or below to watch the recap:

---
| | |
---
| FAITH & FREEDOM EVENT
I also recently had the opportunity to address a packed room of conservatives at the annual Faith & Freedom Legislative Breakfast. I was so inspired to see so many friends, old and new, uniting around our shared conservative principles. I will always defend our freedoms, the Constitution, and our Georgia values as your Lieutenant Governor--and we will fight every day to defend them from the extreme policies of the far-left.
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| | |
---
| IN THE NEWS
Check out some of the highlights and coverage on our legislative policy proposals and agenda from the first month. As you can see, we've hit the ground running to lower costs, crack down on violent criminals and restore law and order to our streets, expand workforce opportunities, and boost foster care and healthcare systems across our state. Our work is just beginning--and we're going to work hard every day and deliver on our campaign promises to make our state the best in the country.
---
| [Fox News](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZLmHbDiLvsJ94zV-gAfleQvhJAfezr8oibtF8sy2oiSdXLoA6P1CNyO_Ul8BCHc_fnNE4xDFGtmaRpOi-Ix2JkIqikGXKMEk0yHhhrX7pnm0nhPyfztGTEUi2_WfKTvwhCxQ0vW4zexTq-siGAF2whwW9goeUz8yuRT_NQGzwW-ntyg30JwHI9qIAG_hEKoeI2mtAF5eBG4W-j-8xfpjoh8v6tfFK7INqNa9Kv4zi2hf4i4ruS8p6xM1nShQ8biJWmV3AQTzEgA=&c=Y0l-ih7sqRriq7oUhi9Pn0-Um9QXob-z2QE2mceoVbVvxJyHfMqESQ==&ch=hNlSPzCNyleGpRAL2TX9wesXIfl5nkbJ2mf9Js5yQrZA2q8x1jSwaQ==): Kemp, Jones vow to hold rogue Georgia prosecutors accountable for giving criminals a pass
"Republican Georgia Gov. Brian Kemp and Lt. Gov. Burt Jones are leading a charge by state officials to hold rogue prosecutors accountable for refusing to charge accused criminals with misdemeanors for certain crimes...'Any District Attorney who refuses to uphold the law and prosecute criminals in this state is going to be held accountable,' he said in a statement posted on Twitter. 'I look forward to working with the Governor and members of the General Assembly to strengthen public safety across our state.'"
[Capitol Beat News Service](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZLmHbDiLvsJ94zV-gAfleQvhJAfezr8oibtF8sy2oiSdXLoA6P1CNyO_Ul8BCHc_JQ2AU58NHS2PdPE4C2zEp7gw3FTz5TVIMclsDMDLxRlT50EjhnIRIFSfVqH8tfO1ZprttR-qhTSKMFG8PMy6DRvmuRo80DEg24Vp92udU938W_rUG21qZ5he9tfbj1zkOXLgi7NUXQMWm1sdTj8VR3Fh8Ap9ctetpQ8xOOn3dPhHZBMlIqVvmiQMrM5IngC_Kdxh0nz7jVkCz89piiEQ9D6kl2lrzIT1DxrWFOuYAbY5ezAdQ9HqLQ==&c=Y0l-ih7sqRriq7oUhi9Pn0-Um9QXob-z2QE2mceoVbVvxJyHfMqESQ==&ch=hNlSPzCNyleGpRAL2TX9wesXIfl5nkbJ2mf9Js5yQrZA2q8x1jSwaQ==): New Lieutenant Governor Outlines Goals
"Newly elected Lt. Gov. Burt Jones says he is 'laser focused' on the well-being of Georgians.
The Jackson Republican and businessman ran for lieutenant governor after a decade as a state senator because he wanted a new challenge and thought he could help ordinary Georgians, Jones told Capitol Beat this week.
'I saw an opportunity to lower our state income tax to put more money back into the pockets of hardworking Georgians, empower parents and teachers, and to make our communities safer.'"
[Atlanta Journal-Constitution](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001ZLmHbDiLvsJ94zV-gAfleQvhJAfezr8oibtF8sy2oiSdXLoA6P1CNyO_Ul8BCHc_f8F3JYbjnfT_u0Gzqfha2tGz83779hmkkpvt6F6xSe_XaTVXzSn7EPgkF9FzhrnZwIRBDdmr-zydvonNaeMii7s9WkT3VqHoOQdcSof76KlOHd-jVIJOrL07mGVVbzAbGzrfsPggEcOss7YmL02k4l24b18UP1-ww4y4P6w6NCPQO3QEjqc39X3Y8FBC_8BQbZsf8IElUGnz15Lq237YvMOkGglOt94S&c=Y0l-ih7sqRriq7oUhi9Pn0-Um9QXob-z2QE2mceoVbVvxJyHfMqESQ==&ch=hNlSPzCNyleGpRAL2TX9wesXIfl5nkbJ2mf9Js5yQrZA2q8x1jSwaQ==): Burt Jones charts his course as Georgia's new No. 2
"How Jones leads the Senate chamber will shape the state's future. So far, the new lieutenant governor is sticking to consensus-driven themes that Gov. Brian Kemp and House Speaker Jon Burns have also embraced.
'We've got to improve our workforce development and help drive more economic opportunities and growth to the state,' he said. 'We've had a lot of success in the last 10 years, and we need to continue that success.'"

| |
---
| The Gold Dome Download Thursday, February 9, 2023
Greater Georgia is pleased to bring you our first Gold Dome Download to help inform you about what's happening during our state's 2023 Legislative Session. This newsletter will track legislation, share news, and bring you all the latest about Greater Georgia.
---
| |
---
| Legislative Priorities
---
| The 2023 Session is underway and Leadership has outlined their legislative priorities. You can expect the economy, education, healthcare, and public safety at the forefront. Below, we've detailed their priorities and included links for you to learn more:

ECONOMY/BUDGET Because of conservative leadership, we ended 2022 with a $6.6 BILLION surplus- that means this year's proposed budget allows for more of YOUR money in YOUR wallet. HIGHLIGHTS
* $2,000 Pay increases for state employees
* Restructuring & expanding the HOPE scholarship
* $1B in state income tax rebates
* $1.1B In property tax rebates for Georgia homeowners
* ([LEARN MORE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lsPvpi_x_kUJN-5PrK-n--VxRUlqHOZ3GnyZ2wKhIzsZJ-djK13LHGAE-b3mfkauivm7eipcFnO-yxQJk2ytlxu7bejhAgboDt-IMSAjOHy4_BKsBXUxn-BCkr7lvG20ocRdMl-dlR_JpSwxLMK1XFxtnQWIymAMRvSYdp8xDeMLq3Rue-r357rZX9pwyim47XM-GGwz8CxxK0c6VOkhlJYSPp8vYeJa9xH4v02QkHs=&c=xoU4LOx4ZWuKBfEx5lP5Xi3b-A4Mwu8W2xYEQ3npcmizwNpaOjEV4Q==&ch=2gbEmmugKpqmx9oF6sSotpV-MMsoTzHpSBG2OQk2jYjaeiF_z8XUYQ==))

EDUCATION Conservatives know that to raise future leaders, we must equip them with the best education. It's why the General Assembly is focused on improving the literacy rate, supporting teachers and parents, and providing funding where needed due to learning loss brought on by the pandemic.
HIGHLIGHTS

HEALTHCARE Just as conservatives believe a zip code shouldn't define where your child goes to school, we believe your zip code shouldn't determine your quality of healthcare. This year our leaders are working to expand tele-health to rural Georgia. In addition, there's also a pro-life angle - expanding assistance to underprivileged expectant mothers.

| WASHINGTON WOES The national security crisis that occurred last week is beyond comprehension.
In case you missed it, the Chinese government sent an intelligence balloon drifting across the United States. The balloon drifted for seven whole days until it reached the Atlantic ocean off the coast of South Carolina where it was shot down.
As of now, we have yet to learn why the balloon was sent and what intelligence it gathered. However, experts warn that the information gathered is likely extensive.

clean_body: | | | | == | | | The Gold Dome Download Thursday, February 9, 2023 Greater Georgia is pleased to bring you our first Gold Dome Download to help inform you about what's happening during our state's 2023 Legislative Session. This newsletter will track legislation, share news, and bring you all the latest about Greater Georgia. | | | Legislative Priorities | The 2023 Session is underway and Leadership has outlined their legislative priorities. You can expect the economy, education, healthcare, and public safety at the forefront. Below, we've detailed their priorities and included links for you to learn more: ECONOMY/BUDGET Because of conservative leadership, we ended 2022 with a $6.6 BILLION surplus- that means this year's proposed budget allows for more of YOUR money in YOUR wallet. HIGHLIGHTS $2,000 Pay increases for state employees Restructuring & expanding the HOPE scholarship $1B in state income tax rebates $1.1B In property tax rebates for Georgia homeowners (==) EDUCATION Conservatives know that to raise future leaders, we must equip them with the best education. It's why the General Assembly is focused on improving the literacy rate, supporting teachers and parents, and providing funding where needed due to learning loss brought on by the pandemic. HIGHLIGHTS == == == == HEALTHCARE Just as conservatives believe a zip code shouldn't define where your child goes to school, we believe your zip code shouldn't determine your quality of healthcare. This year our leaders are working to expand tele-health to rural Georgia. In addition, there's also a pro-life angle - expanding assistance to underprivileged expectant mothers. HIGHLIGHTS == == PUBLIC SAFETY With the onslaught of crime brought on by COVID lockdowns, liberal DA's, and riots, our conservative leaders know that we must address this problem at a state level. It's why they are working to better support law enforcement and equip them with the tools they need to keep our communities safe. HIGHLIGHTS == * == | | | KNOW YOUR STATE SENATE & HOUSE LEADERS | | | | Lieutenant Governor Burt Jones Lt. Governor Burt Jones is leading the Senate and focusing on tax reform, boosting our education system and empowering our parents, and addressing crime. Click == to visit the Lt. Governor's website and learn more. | | | | Speaker of the House Jon Burns Speaker of the House Jon Burns is leading our Republican representatives in advancing conservative values in the Georgia House. Click == to visit the Speaker of the House's website and learn more. | | | INAUGURATION RECAP On January 12, 2023, Governor Brian Kemp was sworn in for four more years. We look forward to seeing what conservative victories he champions this year and beyond. Our Chairwoman, Kelly Loeffler, was excited to witness the Inauguration of our state's leaders. | == | | | WASHINGTON WOES The national security crisis that occurred last week is beyond comprehension. In case you missed it, the Chinese government sent an intelligence balloon drifting across the United States. The balloon drifted for seven whole days until it reached the Atlantic ocean off the coast of South Carolina where it was shot down. As of now, we have yet to learn why the balloon was sent and what intelligence it gathered. However, experts warn that the information gathered is likely extensive. To learn more about the balloon timeline, click ==. | | | FOLLOW THE PROCESS Stay up to date on all things under the Gold Dome including committee hearings, track legislation, and more by visiting, ==. You can also follow == and == on Twitter to get legislative updates in real time. | | | WHAT WE'RE READING | == - Ivan Provorov Went to a Hockey Game, and a Culture War Broke Out == - Poll: 0% of Black Voters Say They Had a Poor Experience Voting in Georgia == - Spoiled children of privilege trying to burn Atlanta down == - Georgia legislator fined for campaigning when he gave water to voters == - In clean energy transition, Georgia is at the tip of the spear == - Atlanta, Baltimore, Detroit: Study shows Democrat-run cities have highest homicide rates | | GET INVOLVED Greater Georgia's work is critical to defending conservative values, and it is only possible through the hard work and support of strong, grassroots volunteers. We need your help! -- Click the buttons below to find out how you can join the fight for conservative values. | | == | | == | == | | | To learn more, visit ==, and follow along on ==, ==, and == to stay up to date with the latest information. | | | Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | == | == == == | | | | | | | | | Greater Georgia Action, Inc | P.O. body:

| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658456%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=hvNmv29tHpnLGUFowpUUJA&sysid=1)

Friend, this isn’t really breaking news, but the Left really doesn’t like me.

**I mean, they don’t like what I stand for, how I say it, or how I’ll never stop being a pest for them.**

The good news is I don’t care because I wake up every single day with one thing on my mind: _**Fighting for YOU.**_

**[**Right now, they’re after me like a dog trying to get scraps off the dinner table, and I’d really appreciate it if you could have my back. I’ve got a crucial February fundraising deadline coming at me quicker than a speeding bullet and could use every $10, $25, and $100 donation I can get.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658457%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=prxuAXRgS2T%2b8E%2bliZ%2b7Zg&sysid=1)**

So, if you’re able, please rush a donation below to help me hit my goal and **KEEP FIGHTING FOR YOU!**

body:
There is a TON of speculation about who the Antichrist is... Joe Biden? Hillary Clinton? Donald Trump? Pope Francis? and on and on. Right now, at Sh
| | |
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17876398.10416.1.3483c21eb49056deca727fb36f1b5b74)
---
There is a TON of speculation about who the **Antichrist** is...
**Joe Biden**? **Hillary Clinton**? **Donald Trump**? **Pope Francis**? and on and on.
Right now, at [Sheridan.Church](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17876398.10417.1.8145a9a80c096293844541e3e1666136) for our midweek service, I am doing a series over the [Book of Revelation](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17876398.10418.1.05c45402d746b390453b48ffbc4b4ad8) (_line by line and verse by verse_).
Last night, our study took us to **Revelation 13** which is all about the **Antichrist** , the **False Prophet** and the **Mark of the Beast**.
Here is a link to my perspective of what Scripture says regarding the Antichrist, False Prophet & Mark of the Beast: [www.youtube.com/live/LBy2Ix5PFc8?feature=share](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17876398.10419.1.d17b32b3d857a76ad83ab62ab17d388c)
You can also watch the FULL SERIES over Revelation at: [https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLZ0-pMl6zciQZxE5DSzcAKwH3M3DNQecu](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17876398.10420.1.0a33bba04c588cb99d70e35e713830cd)
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer
Follow me on [TruthSocial](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17876398.10421.1.eb07878ac69488ff728587a0c8d1d07d), GAB, [Facebook](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17876398.10422.1.fe219420c3e1c6fdcf51e1b31cf9992f), [Instagram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17876398.10423.1.50986725d5b5acef569313c8bf692056), [Twitter](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17876398.10424.1.43780ad52bae163ff258df9b2105bd0f), [Telegram](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17876398.10425.1.58b778839de6a947d712f8857c907650), GETTR & [YouTube](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17876398.10426.1.72dfa31737bef8d9041c54f2827452c9)).
[www.jacksonlahmeyer.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17876398.10427.1.e20a0cb6383f855871505deede047e90)
| | [ Support Sheridan.Church ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17876398.10428.1.77579660a8d969e0098e01d2cb52c1f1)

## Message From President Trump
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17876398.10429.1.59ce52d540126f505eaf6ff445e293f1)
---
Recently, **President Donald Trump** sent me a message of thanks over the newly formed [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17876398.10430.1.0a2ad917e3707f3941dea6dad0fdaafb) organization that he also recently shared about on **TruthSocial**.
You can read the Pastors For Trump full **[PRESS RELEASE](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17876398.10431.1.c681ae5a72361dae0f0209d0a1ef6369)** here: [Pastors For Trump Press Release](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17876398.10432.1.c50d72ce0ad2b2230b27037531dfd5b4)
We are off to a TREMENDOUS start and with **President Trump's** share, our numbers are highly increasing.
Many media outlets have reported on the formation of the Coalition such as **Newsweek** , **Rolling Stone** , **One America News Network** , **Real America's Voice** , **Gateway Pundit** , **Right Wing Watch** , **Baptist News Global** and others.
This coalition is made up of **Pastors & Ministry Leaders** from different denominations across all 50 states having the common ground of wanting to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**.
[Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17876398.10433.1.7dc42ffd2487da94f1844d3d1e1fe096) is NOT just limited to **Pastors/Ministry Leaders** but is for _every_ believer in America.
There will be _monthly Prayer Calls_ starting in January that will host _prominent_ leaders within the America First movement who will give updates of what is taking place within our nation from their unique vantage point.
I want to encourage you to visit [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17876398.10434.1.6aeb8bb91072793ae5c2defc9d293c5d) today and register to join in on the Prayer Calls so you can be informed as well as a participant in praying for our country.
**Dr. Billy Graham** once said, _"For America to get back on its' feet, the people of God must first get down on their knees and pray."_
Not only should you register to join the monthly Prayer Calls and receive updates from prominent America First leaders, but you should also send the [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17876398.10435.1.c82f5ffb33d914b9acd1252e789c0abf) link to your Pastor/Ministry Leader and encourage him/her to join the coalition with many other Pastor/Ministry Leaders throughout the country.
Every Pastor/Ministry Leader will remain confidential, and their identity will not be released to the public unless they are in the role of a State/Regional Director.
Pastors/Ministry Leaders that join the coalition will receive opportunities to meet (in-person) many of the America First leaders through upcoming rallies and events as well as have their voice heard by giving input on what issues should be presented to **President Trump** by the [Pastors For Trump](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17876398.10436.1.d509a42ed128791af99d0101be9ef0db) coalition.
Please go visit [www.Pastors4Trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17876398.10437.1.8d933bcf301a9b08e5bbb4bd1ba263e5) today and be a part of the effort to **Make America Great Again by Making America Godly Again**.
| | [ Pastors For Trump ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17876398.10438.1.9e1de76849231674eed26462912e206b)
---
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17876398.10439.1.7d01af67ad02231bb51793c6a757bca8)
---
I have been fortunate to develop many great relationships with great America First leaders such as **Mike Lindell**.
It is very important that we continue to support **Mike Lindell** in this battle. His business, [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17876398.10440.1.a0c9c2ad488f9d6a0a65a8fc8d4dd0e4), has been cancelled by all the big box stores and now his bank because of his boldness about the 2020 election and it's up to us to make the decision to not FUND Deep State Companies but to FUND America First Companies such as [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17876398.10441.1.f8ec15b079c79cce1055986069578c49).
I want to encourage you to visit [www.MyPillow.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17876398.10442.1.935183fcfe4351f1f3e93a11e4d0dfa7) and look at all of the great America First products available (much more than just great pillows).
We are at war right now. Spend wisely. Spend America First.
Use the Promo Code **JACKSON** at checkout to save up to 80% while shopping at [www.MyPillow.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17876398.10443.1.450e58cf9b79c513eb8cc0c47c1e3c3a)
Kendra and I love all of our [MyPillow](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17876398.10444.1.b4ab58501b7fe1149da903c9a5329f9c) products and we TOTALLY support Mike Lindell! I hope you will too...
| | [ Save Up To 80% At MyPillow.com ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=17876398.10445.1.ad234851a70bee516db802e8befcf8b2)

name: Team WisGOP
subject: Don’t wait – vote early!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN
body:
Friend,

EARLY VOTING has already begun in Wisconsin! In this crucial Wisconsin Supreme Court Election, conservatives need every vote we can get to ensure one of our candidates makes it to the general election.

This election is too important to sit out. There is SO much on the line. Concealed carry, Act 10, Voter ID, and school choice are some of the things at risk if we allow liberal judicial activists to take over the court.

**_We NEED you to vote early, Friend!_**

Go to [myvote.wi.gov](https://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61479752:WqsDYIDNG:m:1:2068296031:E59B4DB7DEDA1D12CC375C3C0DF5FA9D:r) to learn more about how you can vote early. You'll save yourself the hassle on election day, check one more thing off your to-do list, and allow candidates to better target those who haven't voted.

Team WisGOP

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system May 22, 2018.
For more information [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWqsDYIDNG). [Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWqsDYIDNG)
[Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWqsDYIDNG) | [Unsubscribe via email](mailto:unsub-71714480625-echo3-DF0182E65B6FE10C3E76CADC4E6D461D@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings)
This email was sent by: The Republican Party of Wisconsin, PO Box 628250, Middleton, WI 53562.

name: Mary Trump
subject: Will you help me defend democracy?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
Team —
On January 6, 2021, the very existence of our democracy was threatened and, for the first time in American history, the peaceful transition of power was interrupted.
The insurrectionists have not been defeated. The attempted coup on that day may have failed, but its architects have been emboldened and they are, in fact, planning the next one.
Today, we’re going to start fighting back. The Democracy Defense Fund is an organization committed to saving our country from the authoritarian traitors who seek to destroy it — but we need your help.
Will you join our pro-democracy movement by splitting a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton? Any amount helps in our fight to save democracy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
You know my uncle. He started the “Big Lie” and he continues to traffic in the right-wing extremism that puts our country at risk.
We must stop him and his loyal cronies and those, at all levels of government, who continue to undermine our democracy. That’s why I founded the Democracy Defense Fund — and it’s why Seth Moulton and I are asking for your help now.
We need resources to support organizations and people who are committed to protecting the right to vote and preserving our Constitution, just like Seth Moulton.
This includes an all-out effort to support campaigns at the local and state level in order to take back state houses and preserve election integrity.
All of that is necessary in order to defend our democracy, friend. And that’s what we’re committed to do here at Democracy Defense Fund.
This will only be possible if we all do our part — starting right now. So, will you split a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
Thank you,
Mary

He started the “Big Lie” and he continues to traffic in the right-wing extremism that puts our country at risk. We must stop him and his loyal cronies and those, at all levels of government, who continue to undermine our democracy. That’s why I founded the Democracy Defense Fund — and it’s why Seth Moulton and I are asking for your help now. We need resources to support organizations and people who are committed to protecting the right to vote and preserving our Constitution, just like Seth Moulton. This includes an all-out effort to support campaigns at the local and state level in order to take back state houses and preserve election integrity. All of that is necessary in order to defend our democracy, friend. And that’s what we’re committed to do here at Democracy Defense Fund. This will only be possible if we all do our part — starting right now. So, will you split a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton today? [] Thank you, Mary [] Donate [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: . The CDC has given up the ghost! The Deputy Director of the CDC now acknowledges the problems of the very thing they pushed. "We hope these people improve." Can you believe this? What is the recourse for injured families? Where is the justice? That's why I wrote my newest book, "[We've Been Played: Exposing the Triad of Tyranny.](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=e0da52b691&e=9828080a05)" I hope you'll [check it out](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=ab1fa6b04b&e=9828080a05)!

name: Bryce Reeves
subject: REEVES BILL TO DECLARE FENTANYL AS WEAPON OF TERRORISM OVERWHELMINGLY PASSES SENATE
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS OF BRYCE REEVES
body:
FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASECONTACT: JAMES MANETZJAMES@BRYCEREEVES.COMREEVES BILL TO DECLARE FENTANYL AS WEAPON OF TERRORISM OVERWHELMINGLY PASSES SENATERichmond, VA- February 9, 2022: This Tuesday, as both chambers of Virginia's state legislature la
| | |
---
| | [](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fbrycereeves.com/1/010001863644b802-b58adbaf-318f-4e2b-933e-6287cc2010aa-000000/ZciEMVc0ColYNWDiXrf_R2LKGcA=308)
---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE** CONTACT: JAMES MANETZJAMES@BRYCEREEVES.COM
---
| REEVES BILL TO DECLARE FENTANYL AS WEAPON OF TERRORISM OVERWHELMINGLY PASSES SENATE
---
| **Richmond, VA- February 9, 2022:** This Tuesday, as both chambers of Virginia's state legislature labored into the night, the Virginia Senate passed [Senate Bill (SB) 1188](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flis.virginia.gov%2Fcgi-bin%2Flegp604.exe%3F231%2Bsum%2BSB1188/1/010001863644b802-b58adbaf-318f-4e2b-933e-6287cc2010aa-000000/yyddETlTeeZGfNeKohDS8vppAUE=308) with a generous margin of 38-2. [SB1188](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flis.virginia.gov%2Fcgi-bin%2Flegp604.exe%3F231%2Bsum%2BSB1188/2/010001863644b802-b58adbaf-318f-4e2b-933e-6287cc2010aa-000000/TnZLIka5aiUpL8YFRSWxseF7gIg=308), carried by Senator Bryce Reeves (R-Spotsylvania) in cooperation with the Office of Attorney General Jason Miyares (R-Virginia), will define any substance containing detectable amounts of fentanyl as a weapon of terrorism. The bill will also allow the Virginia criminal justice system to charge individuals who knowingly and intentionally distribute any substance containing detectable amounts of fentanyl with a class four felony, punishable by up to 10 years imprisonment. “Thank you to Senator Reeves for his extraordinary leadership in championing this critical legislation”, said Attorney General Miyares. “What is happening against innocent Virginians is nothing less than chemical warfare, and Bryce Reeves has been a tireless partner in working with me to keep Virginians safe.” 2021 saw a near 25% increase in lethal fentanyl overdoses within the Commonwealth, with over 2,000 Virginian lives lost. Between February 2021 and February 2022, over 75,000 Americans died to synthetic opioid overdose, more than every American casualty during the Vietnam War combined. Fentanyl currently sits as the leading cause of death for American adults ages 18-45. “I'm proud to have had the support of so many of my colleagues in this endeavor to address the ongoing opioid epidemic within our Commonwealth", commented Reeves. “This issue is one we simply cannot afford to politicize. Not two weeks ago, a 17-year-old high school girl in my district overdosed on fentanyl-laced pills sold to her as Percocet. Just one week ago, another young teen in Arlington died of fentanyl overdose. This drug is killing our youth... I've seen first-hand during my time as a narcotics detective just how drastically opioids can affect families.” Senator J. Chapman Petersen (D-Fairfax) spoke in favor of the bill on the Senate floor before the vote took place. “I've been here long enough to remember when we enacted [this statute](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flaw.lis.virginia.gov%2Fvacode%2F18.2-46.4%2F/1/010001863644b802-b58adbaf-318f-4e2b-933e-6287cc2010aa-000000/WDtbq5Ld6YTM_Kj3hGmGkpN9OXs=308)... in direct response to anthrax. It was put into our commercial system with the intent of poisoning people. I think there are a lot of similarities with what's going on with fentanyl.... The bottom line is, I think this is an appropriate response....”
---
| ###Bryce Reeves is a small business owner, auxiliary sheriff's deputy in Culpeper County, former Army Ranger, and former Prince William County narcotics detective. He currently represents the 17th District in the Virginia Senate, which includes the City of Fredericksburg and the Counties of Albemarle (part), Culpeper (part), Louisa (part), Orange, and Spotsylvania (part). Senator Reeves serves on the Senate Committee on Rehabilitation and Social Services and sits on the Committees on Local Government, General Laws and Technology, and Privileges and Elections. In addition, Senator Reeves is Co-chair of the Virginia General Assembly Military and Veterans Caucus, as well as Minority Whip in the State Senate. Senator Reeves resides in Spotsylvania County.
---

We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T48032318-3e6e-4e04-9b25-d8469739f9d6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | Peter, [**We Have Less than Two Weeks To Shrink Kevin McCarthy's Majority — and we can do it if we can help Jennifer McClellan win this special election in Virginia!!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T398ac851-169f-4137-a39b-e32e09d6cf90/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _In just 12 days, there will be a special election in Virginia's 4th Congressional District. Our incredible Democratic candidate, Jennifer McClellan, would be the first African-American to represent the district and another vote for Leader Hakeem Jeffries!_ She describes herself like this: \--- _I believe in the power of government to make people’s lives better — and I’ve spent the past 18 years as a public servant helping Virginians and solving problems, from passing the Voting Rights Act of Virginia to the Reproductive Health Protection Act.

**But my work doesn’t stop here – because there are still more people to help and problems to solve.**

My team has a plan to win. We’re distributing yard signs, airing new ads, and meeting voters all over the district – but our critical voter outreach efforts are expensive._ _\---_

---

---
| **McClellan's opponent, Leon Benjamin, is a MAGA NUT who pushed the dangerous conspiracy theory Trump didn't lose the 2020 election and when Benjamin ran for this seat in 2022 and lost, he refused to concede. He's a bigot who attacks immigrants, a** nd _he'll provide Kevin McCarthy another vote in Congress._ **_We must ensure that in 12 days we send Jennifer McClellan, not this nutcase, to Congress. We don't need more Marjorie Taylor Greenes in the Capitol._** [**_Can you join us in rushing Jennifer McClellan $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can so she can put those funds to use and win this crucial congressional seat?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tde3bf1cc-1153-4ee2-b6df-f16b5369354d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you so much, Blue Amp Action community!_ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. | | Dear Peter, My name is Harmeet Dhillon, the founder and Chief Executive Officer of the Center for American Liberty, and I'm asking for your immediate help to stop the radical Left's medical mutilation of our children in the name of "gender dysphoria."
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62304788:6FZdLDG0N:m:1:3331421248:C0912DBC0289B65B12A7FD0ECC234369:r)
---
| We were recently on Tucker Carlson Tonight, announcing that we just launched a landmark case against the hospitals AND doctors who coerced Chloe Cole to transition to a "boy" at the young age of 13.
---
| | **In case you missed our announcement on Tucker 's show, let me quickly give you the details of our case: ** As a young 13-year-old girl, doctors began transitioning Chloe to become a boy...
---
_This included putting her on experimental drugs like**Lupron** , a drug that has been used to chemically castrate violent sex offenders..._
---
_... Giving her constant testosterone injections..._ _... And removing both of her breasts in a double-mastectomy surgery at the age of 15._ **_How was this allowed to happen?_** It's because the doctors and hospitals lied to the family -- including one powerful lie constantly used to scare parents into agreeing to this medical mutilation:
---
"Would you rather have a dead daughter or a live son?"
---
This lie is repeated to struggling families so doctors and hospitals can perform lucrative transgender medical experimentation on children... And I'm asking for your help today to put an end to it! [**Specifically, I 'm asking you to make a one-time emergency donation of $25 today to hold the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their barbaric actions. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62304788:6FZdLDG0N:m:1:3331421248:C0912DBC0289B65B12A7FD0ECC234369:r) Because until these predators are held responsible things will never change... And if we don't act right away, more and more children will be put under the knife and experimented on. Medical facilities are actively promoting, encouraging, and advertising these barbaric treatments to minors. Chloe has suffered physically, socially, emotionally, and psychologically from their lies and experiments. Chloe also has no idea if she'll ever experience the profound joy of motherhood... and if she is able to one day have kids, she knows she will not be able to breastfeed them. The medical experimentation performed on Chloe as a young child caused permanent and irreversible damage to her body and the predators that did this must be held accountable... ...and that's where you come in. [**Please make an urgent donation of $25 today - but of course if you can give more, say $50, $100, $250 or more I would be eternally grateful. **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62304788:6FZdLDG0N:m:1:3331421248:C0912DBC0289B65B12A7FD0ECC234369:r) Whatever amount you're able to give today will be used to hold these radical activists pushing this disgusting agenda on our children accountable. ** **
---
| | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62304788:6FZdLDG0N:m:1:3331421248:C0912DBC0289B65B12A7FD0ECC234369:r)
---
| So please, do not delay. Chloe's landmark case is the case that can put a stop to these "physicians" abusing and mutilating children... With your help we can save many more lives like Chloe's.
---
| | [**So please consider a generous contribution of $25, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62304788:6FZdLDG0N:m:1:3331421248:C0912DBC0289B65B12A7FD0ECC234369:r) Sincerely,
---
| |
---
|
---
| | P.S. We must put an end to the medical mutilation happening to thousands of children across the country -- and winning Chloe Cole's landmark case is how we stop them. Our case holds the hospitals AND doctors responsible for their experimentation and will ensure that these predators who abuse our children in the name of a radical Left-wing agenda think again. [**I hope I can count on your urgent tax-deductible donation of $25, $50, $100, $250 or more today.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62304788:6FZdLDG0N:m:1:3331421248:C0912DBC0289B65B12A7FD0ECC234369:r)
---
| | [**DONATE NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62304788:6FZdLDG0N:m:1:3331421248:C0912DBC0289B65B12A7FD0ECC234369:r)

name: Charlie Kirk, Turning Point USA
subject: Expose the College Cartel
body:
I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time.
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcf794kfji73cs8fp9jidq29jphumgutf51mikjo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjhm6pb4c5h2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I am EXPOSING the College Cartel for the first time. _And now I want to send YOU a copy of the evidence against America's colleges and universities -- my NEW BOOK,_**The College Scam.** [**Will you claim YOUR copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zunrv97aep8plck66e7evtegvodvgsjjhj1dcpv8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjhm6pb4c5h2bs)
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfacr9867udr66s7rlcof3brc4rbv2v7nq7rh540_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjhm6pb4c5h2bs)
---
_I was proud to share my new book,_ The College Scam,_
with President Donald Trump._
---
**I've spent 10 years leading Turning Point USA, the _BIGGEST_ and most _IMPACTFUL_ pro-America student organization with 500,000+ student activists in all 50 states.** And at Turning Point USA, I've met THOUSANDS of college students from every corner of the country -- and I've criss-crossed America to speak at HUNDREDS of colleges and universities. So I have seen firsthand how the College Cartel is BRAINWASHING an entire generation to hate our country and our freedom. _And I know that YOU have seen firsthand how their racist, sexist, Socialist ideologies have escaped college campuses and TAKEN OVER our culture, our politics, our media, our government, and our lives._ **I knew that I had to EXPOSE the College Cartel and put an END to the College Scam for good -- and that's why I wrote my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_.** Now I want to reach as many grassroots patriots AS POSSIBLE with _The College Scam_ to learn the TRUTH about the College Cartel and their attacks on America. [**I'd like to send you a copy of my NEW BOOK,_The College Scam_ , as a special thank-you for a gift of ANY amount to Turning Point USA. Will you claim your book right now?**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z0mqde2tdlnvl58vdkmbapqpo5f9ok30vk9o4keo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjhm6pb4c5h2bs)
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhpdil34aq82abga6osrk6ccn4tpb7vnuqsrn2ao_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjhm6pb4c5h2bs)
---
I wrote this book as an ESSENTIAL GUIDE for every patriot concerned about young people and the future of our country. When you read _The College Scam,_ you'll learn:
* my 10-point case that exposes higher education -- so YOU can be the judge

* the real reasons that administrators and professors attack American Greatness

* how the government and the education PR machine brainwashed a generation into taking on massive debt for minimal gain

**_And I want you to know -- this isn't just another book about Campus Leftists_.** Instead, it combines FRONTLINE EXPERIENCE from my 10 years criss-crossing America to speak with students ... EXTENSIVE RESEARCH into the dirty secrets of higher education (and how the government props it up!) ... and a PROSECUTOR'S INTENSITY to present my case against the College Cartel. [**Can I send you a copy of _The College Scam_ right now? All I'm asking for in exchange is a gift of ANY amount, even just a dollar, to Turning Point USA.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdse89mdfifqtde1f7c77l1rol2n1fkbt460376g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjhm6pb4c5h2bs) That means you'll get a copy of this exciting new book AND help support Turning Point USA's critical work to EXPOSE the Left’s college scam, DEFEAT the radical Left, and WIN the American Culture War!
---
[Get your copy](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zosbfiv1d8ccfre0g5q8tv95efk59gmfo0455sfo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjhm6pb4c5h2bs)
---
The College Cartel has created and spread the WORST and MOST TOXIC beliefs behind the Left's War on American Culture. And no one has exposed the FULL TRUTH of the College Scam -- until now. [**You don't want to miss it! Please claim your copy of _The College Scam_ RIGHT NOW. All I'm asking for is a gift of any amount to Turning Point USA to help cover shipping -- and support our efforts to WIN the American Culture War.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfis4qg1qh52j4nke8crb6ja22m6gb3dkk2ik4jg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjhm6pb4c5h2bs) Thank you for helping me EXPOSE the College Cartel and fight back against their toxic ideologies in the American Culture War!
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA

4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: I need to be able to count on you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18882?t=1001&akid=2964%2E346206%2EmdrJvd ][IMG]

Hi – I’ll explain more below but our (victorious!) campaign has a little
bit of debt to pay off. We made some great progress, but we’ve got just a
little bit left to go. If you could give just $20 right now to help us pay
it down so that I can continue focusing my energy on serving in the
Senate, I’d be very grateful. Here’s the
link: [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18882?t=1002&akid=2964%2E346206%2EmdrJvd ]https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18862?t=1003&akid=2964%2E346206%2EmdrJvd

Peter – the last few weeks of our campaign were a whirlwind. GOP
spending against us skyrocketed, polls tightened, and pundits were
doubting whether we could win.

My team put our heads down and focused on our final advertising
investments to get us through the last few days of the campaign. We were
making decisions with the information we had, hoping with all our might
that the funding will come through.

Unfortunately, all of our funding didn’t come through and now my campaign
has a bit of a hole to fill to get our last bills paid. We’ve made a ton
of progress in closing the gap and since you’re one of my most important
supporters, I’m hoping that I can count on you to get us over the top.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18882?t=1004&akid=2964%2E346206%2EmdrJvd ]Will you please give $20 or as much as you can to help us retire our
debt? Your donation will be split between my campaign and Charles Booker,
and I’d be grateful for anything you can give.

I’m proud of you and our campaign team and the work we did together. Now,
we just have to finish this thing off.

Thank you for your help.

With every good wish,

Maggie Hassan

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230209-2964-footer&t=1005&refcode2=2964_346206_mdrJvd&akid=2964%2E346206%2EmdrJvd

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2964%2E346206%2EmdrJvd

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

| | It doesn’t matter if you’re a customer, investor, small business owner, employer, or employee - ESG punishes conservatives and all Americans are forced to pay. As we like to put it at Heritage Action, “Go Woke, Go Broke”! **_Our fight against ESG is making a difference._** We saw record divestment by states from BlackRock last year. CEO Larry Fink even said the company **lost $4 billion due to the conservative backlash against ESG.** That’s all thanks to conservatives like you, fellow conservative. Woke corporations are on defense while Heritage Action and states across the country continue to lead the charge against woke ESG standards. **But we NEED your help to keep up the pressure and help pass laws to block ESG.** [**Fellow Conservative, we want to expand the fight against ESG massively in 2023. Your crucial donation will help us do it - chip in $20.23 now >>**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c658470%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FJ3bs6KB4nnB8ReSXF062w&sysid=1) Thank you, Jessica Anderson Executive Director | Heritage Action

Joni Ernst and I led an investigation to uncover the truth about pandemic fraud
| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zc9c80e1r4kbci1qrmbjtdr7omqe7pgvnl03b6o8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjhm9oj4c9h2bs)
---
| | Friend – We all knew there was fraud associated with the CARES Act, but none of us knew just how deep it ran. Joni Ernst and I led an investigation to uncover the truth about pandemic fraud. _And what we learned was shocking:_ ✔️ Roughly 222,000 fake SSNs were used on EIDL and PPP loan applications.✔️ Almost 70,000 of those applications were approved. **✔️**** _And taxpayers are on the hook for all_**** _$5.4 BILLION._** What makes this even worse, friend, is we have _no idea_ how many of these people “qualified” for PPP loan forgiveness. _[**_HOLD FRAUDSTERS ACCOUNTABLE >>_**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z751u285rgo1gc4knf0d441ha04i8rmld8ait920_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjhm9oj4c9h2bs)_ Friend, the Small Business Association failed to protect taxpayers from fraudsters looking to game the system. It’s time for the agency to conduct an internal audit, identify those that stole from their neighbors, and work with the DOJ to prosecute these offenders. _[**_Stand with Joni and me to ensure the SBA and DOJ prosecutes these scammers to the fullest extent of the law._**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zf41vtg7qb7419o3r18impcjvs88geguq5iufs68_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjhm9oj4c9h2bs)_

name: Shift WA
subject: 4 bills Democrats are killing
body:
Democrats appear determined to continue the pattern they've created over the years - ignore good ideas and push more of their failed policies. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61480046:s6wkbIDN5:m:1:2610672541:F9B682092AA3CF3A27D58ABD58F9CCBE:r "Shift Washington")
---
| The 2023 legislative session is well underway and - given the increase in crime rates - the terrible "police pursuit" bill has garnered a lot of attention. Our readers will remember that Democrats effectively handcuffed police officers in 2021, when liberals passed party-line legislation that prevented the police from pursuing criminals running away from the scene of a crime.

For good reason, rational (and usually Republican) lawmakers have been working tirelessly to repeal the failed bill.

But that's not the only effort Republicans are making to fix the problems created by Democrats in the past. Unfortunately, Democrats appear determined to continue the pattern they've created over the years - ignore good ideas and push more of their failed policies.

Other than repealing the "police pursuit" bill, here are four more bills that Republicans are pushing (and Democrats are killing):

**1.** **Repealing the long-term payroll tax - **Democrats' new tax failed before it even could be implemented, and was delayed past the last election, but it still adds a heavier financial burden on Washington's working families while costing the state more money to enforce.

**2.****Reforming the executive 's emergency powers - **Jay Inslee abused our state's emergency power laws for years, imposing his one-man rule without any checks for 975 days. Lawmakers must ensure such a dictatorship that never happens again in our state.

**3 & 4\. ****Lowering property taxes and cutting the sales taxes -** At a time when working families across the state are struggling to make ends meet, our state's always-increasing property and sales taxes add to financial burdens. It's time lawmakers cut out-of-control, frivolous spending and return taxpayer money back to struggling families, instead of giving it to Democrat special-interest donors.

Democrats have no plans to allow these bills to be heard in committee for a simple reason - they are afraid of them. Afraid that the public will show up to testify. Afraid that their failures will be held up to scrutiny.

These rational bills do not align with the Left's agenda. But Democrats know these bills are popular with the people - so their plan is to kill them before they see the light of day. And count on the media to cover their backs.

We here at Shift WA are working to shine a light on the Democrats' failed agenda and champion positive change for communities across our state. **But we need your help.**

[**We depend entirely on grassroot supporters like you. Will you contribute to our efforts today?**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61480047:s6wkbIDN5:m:1:2610672541:F9B682092AA3CF3A27D58ABD58F9CCBE:r)

[**We completed last month behind our fundraising goal - we hope you'll consider helping us keep uncovering corruption by contributing just $5, $10, or $15 today!**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61480047:s6wkbIDN5:m:1:2610672541:F9B682092AA3CF3A27D58ABD58F9CCBE:r)

Thank you,

The Shift WA team | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61480048:s6wkbIDN5:m:1:2610672541:F9B682092AA3CF3A27D58ABD58F9CCBE:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14133339&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/os6wkbIDN5).
---

name: Do you agree?
subject: 📺 My thoughts on Mayorkas.
body:
| | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62305427:66HA1DGN2:m:1:3331421248:6FA927C140BD0BB4DA057709F6B01980:r)
---
It's been some time since I served as Under Secretary for Border and Transportation Security under President George W. Bush-_but while we face new challenges in a new age, the solution to stemming today 's border crisis remains the same, **secure the border.

**_ Last month, President Biden has finally visited the southern border, but _I wish we had this attention to the border a year -or two years-ago.

_ I joined FOX Business to discuss this administration's failures on the border, and where the new Republican-controlled Congress should go next. _**[Give it a watch!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62305427:66HA1DGN2:m:1:3331421248:6FA927C140BD0BB4DA057709F6B01980:r)**_
⬇️ ⬇️ ⬇️
---
| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62305427:66HA1DGN2:m:1:3331421248:6FA927C140BD0BB4DA057709F6B01980:r)
---
I wish we had this attention to the border a year-_or two years_ -ago because drug cartels and human smugglers have irreparably harmed, injured, and killed Americans, our communities and our nation. [_**I**** _' m fi_ghting to secure the border, the right way, and I hope you'll join me in backing sensible-real-border reform.

**_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62305427:66HA1DGN2:m:1:3331421248:6FA927C140BD0BB4DA057709F6B01980:r) As President Reagan so eloquently put it, _"[a] nation that cannot control its borders is not a nation."

_ It's important that Congress, with its new Republican majority, can conduct investigative hearings on border security. _That 's where we start,_ and obviously Secretary Mayorkas will be an important part of any hearings, because he reflects the failed policies of the Biden administration.

_**But let me be clear, impeachment should not be based upon policy but should be based upon wrongdoing.**_ Secretary Mayorkas has been carrying out what has not been done well, what has been failed policy from Biden. So, whenever there is failed policy, let's investigate that and change that policy. _That should be the approach -the substantive and correct approach-of this new Republican majority. **[Do you agree?

](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62305427:66HA1DGN2:m:1:3331421248:6FA927C140BD0BB4DA057709F6B01980:r)**_ _**But we 've got to really look at having a clear border enforcement bill go through Congress, and not just a comprehensive plan that reforms immigration status without first securing the border.

**_ Let us as Republicans not forget the lessons of the past, let us have a consistent conservative policy that emphasizes stronger border security, that helps us to control out of control federal spending, that makes America stronger internationally.

And as we look to '24 and beyond, that's what I hope to continue to convey, _because I see an America that is strong and free.

_ I want to keep it that way, and I hope you do too. _**[If you do, take a minute to join America Strong and Free PAC-I'll keep you updated on our mission, give you the facts, and together, we'll tackle America's problems the right way, not the easy way.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62305427:66HA1DGN2:m:1:3331421248:6FA927C140BD0BB4DA057709F6B01980:r)**_
---
_**God Bless.**_
---
|
---
Governor Asa Hutchinson
---
---
|
---

name: Tom Fitton
subject: We are winning a critical battle in the courts!
body:
Judicial Watch is on a winning streak in the courts striking down radical Leftist laws that discriminate based on race, gender, ethnicity, and sexual orientation.

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

**Judicial Watch is on a winning streak in the courts _striking down radical Leftist laws_ that discriminate based on race, gender, ethnicity, and sexual orientation.**
Where others talk, _Judicial Watch acts_ ...and we act where it counts..._in the courts_.
We are rolling up important victories against the radical Left's attempt to advance programs and laws that _create discrimination_ in America... _discrimination based on race, on gender, on ethnicity, on sexual orientation_.
And if you want us to continue to successfully fight against the radical Left and strike down laws that undermine the bedrock American principles of "equal opportunity and protection under the laws," then [I ask you to join with us and make generous tax-deductible gift today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62149&L=27940&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xNjQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX3Rlcm09TWF5)
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62149&L=27940&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xNjQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX3Rlcm09TWF5)
---

**The ugly fact is that the radical Left wants to _divide Americans against each other for their own political gain_****.**

But the Left didn't count on having to deal with Judicial Watch, so let me quickly recap for you _three of our recent victories_ in this important area of our work...

**Last year** , the City of Asheville (NC) settled a Judicial Watch federal civil rights lawsuit we had filed on behalf of a North Carolina citizens group seeking to overturn a city-sponsored scholarship program that excluded individuals who were not Black....

...a clear victory for the rule of law that sets a clear precedent for challenging similarly discriminatory publicly-funded scholarship programs!

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62149&L=27940&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xNjQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX3Rlcm09TWF5)
---

But, there's more...

**In April** , Judicial Watch scored another major victory when a California court ruled unconstitutional the state's racial, ethnic and LGBT quota for corporate boards of directors. The court granted Judicial Watch's motion for summary judgment in our lawsuit on behalf of three California taxpayers who challenged the constitutionality of this _quota_ scheme.

This ruling shook the Left and the state's liberal political establishment to its core!

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62149&L=27940&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xNjQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX3Rlcm09TWF5)
---

**Then in May** , _another_ California court delivered yet _another_ victory to Judicial Watch and _another_ blow to the Left when it _struck down_ a 2018 diversity mandate (Senate Bill 826) which required every publicly held corporation headquartered in California to have at least one director "_who self-identifies her gender as a woman_ " on its board by December 31, 2019.

So, just weeks apart, Judicial Watch lawyers persuaded _two_ California courts that _two_ different quota schemes were _unconstitutional_ and delivered _two_ stinging defeats to the radical Left.

**The California Secretary of State _appealed both_ rulings...and in December, the California Court of Appeals _upheld both_ rulings... _two more courtroom victories for Judicial Watch_!**

If you support our _continued_ litigation to stand firm __for__ the principle of "equal opportunity and protection under the law" and __against__ illegal discrimination, then [I urge you to join the Judicial Watch team and make a special contribution today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62149&L=27940&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xNjQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX3Rlcm09TWF5)

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62149&L=27940&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xNjQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX3Rlcm09TWF5)
---

The Left's commitment to dividing Americans against each other is playing out in _many_ arenas ...and that means Judicial Watch must continue to fight them on multiple fronts, including:

* Exposing the use of taxpayer dollars to indoctrinate elementary and high-school students with noxious, Marxist and racist **Critical Race Theory** (CRT);
* Filing federal civil rights lawsuits on behalf of public school teachers fired from their jobs for exercising their **First Amendment free speech rights** and criticizing CRT and other extremist programs in their schools (we recently won a great settlement victory on behalf of one of our teacher clients in Massachusetts);
* Filing a lawsuit on behalf of a Minneapolis taxpayer over a teachers' contract that provides **discriminatory job protections to certain racial minorities**.
* Filing friends of the court briefs in support of challenges to **race-based admissions****programs** at both private and public colleges and universities.

All these efforts...research, investigations, filing federal and state open records law requests, and lawsuits...come with [very real price tags attached.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62149&L=27940&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xNjQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX3Rlcm09TWF5)

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62149&L=27940&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xNjQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX3Rlcm09TWF5)
---

Our caseload has never been more important, and it seems we are confronted with increasingly dangerous radical assaults on the rule of law _that only Judicial Watch has the ability to counter through our legal system_.

We want to keep on winning for your values as we seek to educate Americans about corruption of the rule of law by the radical Left, and [we can do more if you will help us today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62149&L=27940&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xNjQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX3Rlcm09TWF5) Thank you!

Sincerely,

Tom Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=62149&L=27940&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xNjQvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX3Rlcm09TWF5)
---

This ruling shook the Left and the state's liberal political establishment to its core! Then in May , another California court delivered yet another victory to Judicial Watch and another blow to the Left when it struck down a 2018 diversity mandate (Senate Bill 826) which required every publicly held corporation headquartered in California to have at least one director "who self-identifies her gender as a woman " on its board by December 31, 2019. So, just weeks apart, Judicial Watch lawyers persuaded two California courts that two different quota schemes were unconstitutional and delivered two stinging defeats to the radical Left. The California Secretary of State appealed both rulings...and in December, the California Court of Appeals upheld both rulings... two more courtroom victories for Judicial Watch! If you support our continued litigation to stand firm for the principle of "equal opportunity and protection under the law" and against illegal discrimination, then The Left's commitment to dividing Americans against each other is playing out in many arenas ...and that means Judicial Watch must continue to fight them on multiple fronts, including: Exposing the use of taxpayer dollars to indoctrinate elementary and high-school students with noxious, Marxist and racist Critical Race Theory (CRT); Filing federal civil rights lawsuits on behalf of public school teachers fired from their jobs for exercising their First Amendment free speech rights and criticizing CRT and other extremist programs in their schools (we recently won a great settlement victory on behalf of one of our teacher clients in Massachusetts); Filing a lawsuit on behalf of a Minneapolis taxpayer over a teachers' contract that provides discriminatory job protections to certain racial minorities. Filing friends of the court briefs in support of challenges to race-based admissionsprograms at both private and public colleges and universities. All these efforts...research, investigations, filing federal and state open records law requests, and lawsuits...come with Our caseload has never been more important, and it seems we are confronted with increasingly dangerous radical assaults on the rule of law that only Judicial Watch has the ability to counter through our legal system. We want to keep on winning for your values as we seek to educate Americans about corruption of the rule of law by the radical Left, and Thank you! Sincerely, Tom Fitton President | | Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 Third Street SW, Suite 800 Washington, DC 20024 (C)2023, All Rights Reserved Judicial Watch is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. Contributions are received from individuals, foundations, and corporations and are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. | |
