disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oregon League of Conservation Voters and authorized by Andrea Salinas for Congress
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58509592/391309875/-462272089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5NWQ3MjAyLWJiYTgtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gw_j6ulmDAtd8l9yeF1XR_2uLMyYVEcGvltILLBBSXU=&emci=32367090-b4a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=a95d7202-bba8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) | | | Dear Peter, From March 21st to 23rd, Oregon’s environmental community is going to make a big, virtual splash! The legislative session is heating up, and that means it’s time for us to gather (virtually) and meet with Oregon lawmakers! [Can you join us?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58509593/391309876/-462272089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5NWQ3MjAyLWJiYTgtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gw_j6ulmDAtd8l9yeF1XR_2uLMyYVEcGvltILLBBSXU=&emci=32367090-b4a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=a95d7202-bba8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) The Clean Green Lobby Machine is back, with just a few changes this year. But a few things won’t change. You will still get a chance to meet with your lawmakers. You will be able to tell your story and urge decision-makers to prioritize the environment and climate change this legislative session. And, it will be a great time with your fellow environmental and climate advocates! What’s different? Rather than an entire day on Zoom, we are breaking it up over three days. We hope this will reduce the Zoom fatigue, and increase the effectiveness and fun! **OLCV/OCN Virtual Lobby Days – March 21st to 23rd**
The Virtual Clean Green Lobby Machine Returns (via Zoom) to Support 2023 Priorities for a Healthy Oregon
**Tuesday, March 21st, from 6pm-8pm **
Priority Presentations & Training (all participants)
**Wednesday, March 22nd, hold from 9am-5pm**
Lobby Meetings for SDs 1-16
**Thursday, March 23rd, hold from 9am-5pm**
Lobby Meetings for SDs 17-30
[You can look up your senate district (SD) here](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58509594/391309877/1765198759?appid=fd070b56c975456ea2a25f7e3f4289d1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5NWQ3MjAyLWJiYTgtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gw_j6ulmDAtd8l9yeF1XR_2uLMyYVEcGvltILLBBSXU=&emci=32367090-b4a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=a95d7202-bba8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)
Place: Entirely on Zoom (links sent to RSVPs a few days prior)
[**RSVP today!**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58509595/391309905/-462272089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5NWQ3MjAyLWJiYTgtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gw_j6ulmDAtd8l9yeF1XR_2uLMyYVEcGvltILLBBSXU=&emci=32367090-b4a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=a95d7202-bba8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) On March 21st, we will kick it off with an evening training and presentations on all our priorities. Then, your lobby day meetings will be held either on March 22nd or March 23rd, depending on where you live. You should plan to hold the entire lobby day you are assigned since we don’t know yet the time of your meetings. However, it will end up only requiring two one-hour blocks of time. **[We are starting to schedule your legislator meetings now so RSVP today!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58509596/391309906/-462272089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5NWQ3MjAyLWJiYTgtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gw_j6ulmDAtd8l9yeF1XR_2uLMyYVEcGvltILLBBSXU=&emci=32367090-b4a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=a95d7202-bba8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** At the Oregon League of Conservation Voters (OLCV) and Oregon Conservation Network (OCN) lobby days, we will advocate for the top environmental priorities facing lawmakers in Salem right now: Building Resilience (healthy and climate-friendly homes and buildings), carbon sequestration on forested and agricultural lands, a moratorium on new and expanded factory farms, better protections from toxic chemicals, reducing plastic pollution, and ensuring necessary funding for our natural resource agencies. We will also be a voice to stop some bad environmental bills from passing! For the safety of all involved and because of construction at the Capitol, the entirety of the OLCV/OCN Lobby Day will be held virtually over Zoom. We are committed to always trying to make our lobby day as effective and enjoyable as we can. So, we hope the new approach of spreading it out over three days will make it even more accessible for you to join us. We didn’t let the pandemic stop the return of the Clean Green Lobby Machine, and we won’t let Capitol construction stop it either! **[RSVP today for the OLCV/OCN Virtual Lobby Days on March 21st to 23rd!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58509597/391309907/-462272089?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5NWQ3MjAyLWJiYTgtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gw_j6ulmDAtd8l9yeF1XR_2uLMyYVEcGvltILLBBSXU=&emci=32367090-b4a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=a95d7202-bba8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** Sincerely, Julia DeGraw
Coalition Director, OLCV | |
---|---|---

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Exposing the Great Reset
body:
Turning Point USA is LEADING THE CHARGE against the World Economic Forum and its radical Great Reset agenda
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7cjvftblh84574vfb0ur1ujfonk0pgvto4mvpe8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjjm6o35c5h2bs)
---
Friend, This is one of my biggest fights yet. Turning Point USA is LEADING THE CHARGE against the World Economic Forum and its radical Great Reset agenda -- and I want to make sure America-loving patriots like YOU know how you can help STOP this dangerous scheme.
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z06l9jmu45fj30r90mlmi25n238p943v5drosjo8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjjm6o35c5h2bs)
---
I wrote a new book, _The American Response to the Great Reset_ , for YOU, and I want to send it to you RIGHT NOW. [**Please claim YOUR COPY of _The American Response to the Great Reset_. All I'm asking for in an exchange is a gift of ANY AMOUNT (even just one dollar!) to help Turning Point USA cover the shipping.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8d7fq1jdntncgfisvq8ph4kd57v1q8i1t0hsth0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjjm6o35c5h2bs)
---
[Get your book now](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrck8vnp3qbhar3h5qv0bd7hi4f0bub933jkiq70_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjjm6o35c5h2bs)
---

body:
| | |

name: Emilia Sykes
subject: This Black History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
This month, and every month, should serve as a reminder that Black history is American history. Because the Black American story is deeply – and inseparably – woven into the fabric of our nation itself.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58490238/391265230/-1657784636?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTM0N2JlOC05M2E4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MjhqvQAzqxNJ27DV4_6CI9F-Ga4inGUawlQaq7W8Q18=&emci=918602f8-8aa8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=a1347be8-93a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=11703046)
Peter,

This Black History Month, I want to take a moment to celebrate and uplift the stories of the generations of Black Americans who have advanced our country, contributed to our communities, and shaped our culture.

**This month, and every month, should serve as a reminder that Black history is American history.** Because the Black American story is deeply – _and inseparably_ – woven into the fabric of our nation itself.

Our centuries-long fight for civil rights, equity, and freedom is central to this ever-evolving story of our history. And while this fight for equal opportunity is far from over, I want to honor the Black leaders who opened doors that were previously closed, shattered glass ceilings, and proved the breadth and boundlessness of Black excellence.

_To every Black leader, artist, entrepreneur, and revolutionary who has helped make this nation a better place: Thank you._

And finally, as the first Black person ever elected to serve Ohio’s 13th District, I would be remiss to not mention trailblazers like Shirley Chisholm and Stephanie Tubbs Jones who paved the way for women like me. I strive to carry on your legacy, fighting for equity, justice, and representation, in the Halls of Congress.

In celebration and solidarity: Happy Black History Month.

_Emilia_
---

| Emilia Sykes is running for re-election in Ohio's 13th Congressional District. To learn more, please visit [EmiliaSykesForCongress.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58490250/391265240/-1657784636?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTM0N2JlOC05M2E4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=MjhqvQAzqxNJ27DV4_6CI9F-Ga4inGUawlQaq7W8Q18=&emci=918602f8-8aa8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=a1347be8-93a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=11703046)

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: I just got fired
disclaimer_text: Paid For By The Future Forum Political Action Committee And Not Authorized By Any Candidate Or Candidate's Committee
body:
In the middle of the night, Kevin McCarthy removed me from the House Intelligence Committee.

Peter:
It actually happened.
In the middle of the night, Kevin McCarthy removed me from the House Intelligence Committee.
Kevin McCarthy is obsessed with me. Why? Because I have worked tirelessly to bring the American people the truth about the January 6th attack on our democracy.
Kevin McCarthy has a personal vendetta against us and is using his new power to attempt to silence us. But I will never back down. That’s why we're working to fight back against these attacks. Can you split a donation between my campaign and Future Forum PAC today so we can continue telling the truth about McCarthy’s corrupt, anti-democracy party? body:

name: Liberty Alert (via Rand)
subject: 🚨IDENTIFIED: billions in fraud
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
We all knew there was fraud associated with the CARES Act, but none of us knew just how deep it ran.
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhmqad3a9dqfsn1fkihqrhqip7nkmfj8m0dopn60_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjjmepb4cth2bs)
---
| | Friend – We all knew there was fraud associated with the CARES Act, but none of us knew just how deep it ran. Joni Ernst and I led an investigation to uncover the truth about pandemic fraud. _And what we learned was shocking:_ ✔️ Roughly 222,000 fake SSNs were used on EIDL and PPP loan applications.✔️ Almost 70,000 of those applications were approved. **✔️**** _And taxpayers are on the hook for all_**** _$5.4 BILLION._** What makes this even worse, friend, is we have _no idea_ how many of these people “qualified” for PPP loan forgiveness. _[**_HOLD FRAUDSTERS ACCOUNTABLE >>_**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdqp4j9kno1bbc4g5spcchqluc1mji472egclij0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjjmepb4cth2bs)_ Friend, the Small Business Association failed to protect taxpayers from fraudsters looking to game the system. It’s time for the agency to conduct an internal audit, identify those that stole from their neighbors, and work with the DOJ to prosecute these offenders. _[**_Stand with Joni and me to ensure the SBA and DOJ prosecutes these scammers to the fullest extent of the law._**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjcqtnaj93otjhgfc21o2a3db28m13rk3cijd2e0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjjmepb4cth2bs)_

name: Claudia Tenney
subject: Hochul is coming for your gas stove
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:
Your power goes out, your heat shuts off, and the temperature starts falling...| | | [](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=353ef3efb6314b31b0f9dd06db66f048&_e=iATkYsz6T0-kO9QzQXsoTX4sCGv1xlnBQvHo-wIyDJF2gpWWmV0xu3r2BzTmSmeJxCQ3oZ5GG2WWytfZ92Pe5kB2AuaOayeJbinNpf-3a8YNbJj1uT3Mn4Ep0I8F1n9InuAtZWdlMTPWChOxaMNWx6AQKZ5HzQxr89TPIXLq46TLD4RxYpryTSr7zEQXHu2G_SvEAxHSp1Ay0OXuXGGtQ7A7Grqivr1TsP9nOvL8THWQJ9scJoD5cVfXqy3DNUmkxDNYLmfFPF5bVAJAf-4mE6uzGCu-kjNqEDwAibGSz7QkHHAquVRgWwXDexgNHEKRKwGF_ltFIxIV-wkDcKSw1NC-Pu9s3NAJbocOrRkoeePXYvB68iyUjcdVs7VUENx3jt73A1p2TKduWis8eo5OiAu33q_jbPuf6djmU0w7cGtLFPTtfOUIEj5DE4zOQUYWa_G4uymyN_Klkv0S7RD0kw%3D%3D)
---
Peter, it’s Claudia. Imagine this scenario – we’re in the middle of an intense winter storm like the many we’ve _already_ seen this year in Upstate New York **when suddenly your power goes out. ** The temperature starts falling in your house, and you wait for your backup generator to kick on **but remember that Democrats banned the sale of any new generators. ** You head to the kitchen to heat up something to eat **but remember that you were forced to replace your broken gas stove with an electric one. ** As you stand there cold and hungry, you realize that the natural gas energy you need is just below you. This isn’t some dystopian future. **This is the future that Kathy Hochul and Joe Biden wish to create by 2030.** [**Peter, I’m asking you to stand with me and stop this reckless proposal to ban gas stoves and appliances by signing my petition today >>**](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=353ef3efb6314b31b0f9dd06db66f048&_e=iATkYsz6T0-kO9QzQXsoTX4sCGv1xlnBQvHo-wIyDJF2gpWWmV0xu3r2BzTmSmeJxCQ3oZ5GG2WWytfZ92Pe5kB2AuaOayeJbinNpf-3a8YNbJj1uT3Mn4Ep0I8F1n9InuAtZWdlMTPWChOxaMNWx6AQKZ5HzQxr89TPIXLq46TLD4RxYpryTSr7zEQXHu2G_SvEAxHSp1Ay0OXuXGGtQ7A7Grqivr1TsP9nOvL8THWQJ9scJoD5cVfXqy3DNUmkxDNYLmfFPF5bVAJAf-4mE6uzGCu-kjNqEDwAibGSz7QkHHAquVRgWwXDexgNHEKRN25u2sgUzts8X8H92W9fDaywznrAQ0dFxRSgULnNu-IVYm000crobcCAbybrwr9mHC1z62qwClXv-cdnrsz1to1Xiequtljj9e2jp1A_RvfKzx_i9QTdxPGTNbIzxE7k4SFPL1vXD3X3SbHl40OVRg%3D%3D)

clean_body: Your power goes out, your heat shuts off, and the temperature starts falling...| | | Peter, it’s Claudia. Imagine this scenario – we’re in the middle of an intense winter storm like the many we’ve already seen this year in Upstate New York when suddenly your power goes out. The temperature starts falling in your house, and you wait for your backup generator to kick on but remember that Democrats banned the sale of any new generators. You head to the kitchen to heat up something to eat but remember that you were forced to replace your broken gas stove with an electric one. As you stand there cold and hungry, you realize that the natural gas energy you need is just below you. This isn’t some dystopian future. This is the future that Kathy Hochul and Joe Biden wish to create by 2030. | | These proposals are more than just Big Government going too far – they will leave real people out in the cold. I refuse to let that happen. If you agree, please take a second to sign this incredibly important petition: | | Thank you, Claudia Tenney | | | | | Paid for by Claudia for Congress | | PO Box 378, Victor, NY 14564 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | | | | |

subject: My guest at the State of the Union
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58491691/391270854/553882890?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2I4MjcxYS05OGE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TwxvmFaBSItMgrO8Ic4aaTF63qca1HN2RD9CPIx12nw=&emci=ea54aa26-1da8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=63b8271a-98a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=9636579)
---

| | Peter – My first State of the Union address in Congress was also **the most pro-worker State of the Union I can remember, and I was honored to have Jeff McGillivray, a union plumber and long time labor organizer, as my guest.** With the Inflation Reduction Act's key provisions kicking in, we're going to be breaking ground on critical (and overdue) infrastructure projects around the Fourth Congressional District and the country. That means jobs. And thanks to the labor movement, it means _good_ jobs. And because we're finally going to follow the "Made in America" policy, we'll see even more jobs to supply all those projects. _But there's still more to do._ **I agree with the President that we need to pass the Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act, which strengthens unions and workers' ability to negotiate for fair wages, safer workplaces, and quality, affordable health care for their families.** Fighting for workers' rights has always been a priority for me because union membership in my own family opened the doors that got me here, Peter, and I believe that other families should clean_body: | | | | Peter – My first State of the Union address in Congress was also the most pro-worker State of the Union I can remember, and I was honored to have Jeff McGillivray, a union plumber and long time labor organizer, as my guest. With the Inflation Reduction Act's key provisions kicking in, we're going to be breaking ground on critical (and overdue) infrastructure projects around the Fourth Congressional District and the country. That means jobs. And thanks to the labor movement, it means good jobs. And because we're finally going to follow the "Made in America" policy, we'll see even more jobs to supply all those projects. But there's still more to do. I agree with the President that we need to pass the Protecting the Right to Organize (PRO) Act, which strengthens unions and workers' ability to negotiate for fair wages, safer workplaces, and quality, affordable health care for their families. Fighting for workers' rights has always been a priority for me because union membership in my own family opened the doors that got me here, Peter, and I believe that other families should have the same opportunity. name: Karen Greenhalgh
subject: House Republicans Pass Legislation to Curb Crime, Make our Neighborhoods Safer
body:
| | |
---
| | |
---
| | **House Republicans Pass Legislation to Curb Crime, Make our Neighborhoods Safer** _\-- Legislation also enacts significant Parole Board reforms \--_ RICHMOND — When Virginians elected a Republican-controlled House of Delegates, they said public safety was one of the biggest concerns they wanted addressed. House Republicans today advanced a package of bills focused on making communities safer for every Virginian, sending the legislation to the Senate for further consideration. “During their two years in control of the General Assembly, Democrats acted as if police were the enemy and criminals were victims, while victims of crime were ignored. Predictably, violent crime in our cities skyrocketed," **said Speaker Todd Gilbert, R-Shenandoah.** "Voters are tired of not feeling safe in their own neighborhoods. Working with Attorney General Jason Miyares, our Republican majority has passed multiple bills that will give law enforcement the tools they need to keep our communities safe, and keep dangerous criminals where they belong – behind bars,” **Gilbert said.** “Our House Republican team has sent a strong message to the Commonwealth with this session’s public safety legislation. We’ve told police that we have their back and will ensure they have the tools they need to do their job," **added Del. Tony Wilt, R-Rockingham, chair of the House Public Safety Committee.** We told criminals that if they break the law to hurt their fellow Virginians, they’re going to prison for a long time. And we told the public that we heard them, and we’re going to keep working until every Virginian can be safe in their own neighborhoods,” **he said.** “The legislation we’ve passed in the first half of this session will, if passed into law, save lives," **said Del. Rob Bell, chair of the House Courts of Justice Committee.** "Our legislation holds fentanyl dealers accountable for the lives they take. Our bills tell the Parole Board that they must at least give prosecutors a chance to be heard before releasing violent offenders. And we put those who 'swat' -- who falsely summon law enforcement to harass others -- that when we catch them, they will go to jail. Republicans can and will make Virginia’s communities safer,”**he added.** Bills passed today include the following: [House Bill 1455](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/ec6b654a99a3c352/bc484d11b609513fc3d6b838967d376c/37923 "http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/f8f1d008816ce76066a6b3c4b83ff292/41713/5541830c78792684/08bb0e9631a5bf30c3d6b838967d376c/41713") ensures someone who knowingly distributes a substance containing two milligrams or more of fentanyl – a lethal amount – can be charged with attempted murder.

[House Bill 1458](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/ec6b654a99a3c352/6c34e01bcd5e257cc3d6b838967d376c/37923 "http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/f8f1d008816ce76066a6b3c4b83ff292/41713/5541830c78792684/9d3432e3eae7cb4dc3d6b838967d376c/41713") prohibits the conditional release of a geriatric prisoner who committed specific heinous crimes.

[House Bill 1572](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/ec6b654a99a3c352/7c184070cd7623f6c3d6b838967d376c/37923 "http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/f8f1d008816ce76066a6b3c4b83ff292/41713/5541830c78792684/419f4352ff579540c3d6b838967d376c/41713")[](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/ec6b654a99a3c352/0ef577c7038711b9c3d6b838967d376c/37923 "http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/f8f1d008816ce76066a6b3c4b83ff292/41713/5541830c78792684/dfdc80cd0032d926c3d6b838967d376c/41713") prohibits maliciously sending false information via a device related to the imminent threat of a person’s safety that leads to an unnecessary emergency response.

[House Bill 1682](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/ec6b654a99a3c352/ab6b1502a67648b5c3d6b838967d376c/37923 "http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/f8f1d008816ce76066a6b3c4b83ff292/41713/5541830c78792684/6069c7e7174ebf4bc3d6b838967d376c/41713") designates a substance containing fentanyl as a weapon of terrorism.

[House Bill 2412](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/ec6b654a99a3c352/3b28ce80b5ce645ec3d6b838967d376c/37923 "http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/f8f1d008816ce76066a6b3c4b83ff292/41713/5541830c78792684/563c9cf7c14c0ca3c3d6b838967d376c/41713") directs the Parole Board to review all petitions for geriatric conditional release on an annual basis and condenses the review that may otherwise require two identical meetings into one meeting.

[House Bill 1673](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/ec6b654a99a3c352/f93d93f68075e21ac3d6b838967d376c/37923 "http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/f8f1d008816ce76066a6b3c4b83ff292/41713/5541830c78792684/4046734ca42b78c1c3d6b838967d376c/41713") would expand Virginia’s felony strangulation law to cover defendants who smother their victims.

[House Bill 1897](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/ec6b654a99a3c352/a82927ea009472cfc3d6b838967d376c/37923 "http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/f8f1d008816ce76066a6b3c4b83ff292/41713/5541830c78792684/bf2d1e5ab59a537ec3d6b838967d376c/41713") would make it easier for victims to renew protective orders. The bill also will make it easier for victims to avoid gaps when they do seek renewal.

[House Bill 2398](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/ec6b654a99a3c352/c12c39e09ba31183c3d6b838967d376c/37923 "http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/f8f1d008816ce76066a6b3c4b83ff292/41713/5541830c78792684/f3a6401a8ef2c4c3c3d6b838967d376c/41713") addresses the issue of sexual extortion and would allow prosecutors to bring felony charges against someone who threatens to release the victims photos on social media to coerce sex. As your delegate, I am grateful for the opportunity to work with fellow Delegates in support of curbing crime, and can proudly say I voted on your behalf in support of these bills.
---
| | Your Delegate, Karen **Delegate Karen S. Greenhalgh****House of Delegates** 1-804-698-1085[karengreenhalgh.com](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/ec6b654a99a3c352/2ef7c9287791833ac3d6b838967d376c/37923)
---
|
---

This email was sent by: Karen Greenhalgh For Delegate
P.O. Box 62945 Virginia Beach Virginia 23466
[Unsubscribe](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/unsubscribe1.cfm?eid=23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93&c=37923&jid=ec6b654a99a3c352) | [Profile Center](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/procenter/procenter.cfm?action=profile&eid=23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93&c=37923&jid=ec6b654a99a3c352)

clean_body: | | | | | | | | House Republicans Pass Legislation to Curb Crime, Make our Neighborhoods Safer \-- Legislation also enacts significant Parole Board reforms \-- RICHMOND — When Virginians elected a Republican-controlled House of Delegates, they said public safety was one of the biggest concerns they wanted addressed. House Republicans today advanced a package of bills focused on making communities safer for every Virginian, sending the legislation to the Senate for further consideration. “During their two years in control of the General Assembly, Democrats acted as if police were the enemy and criminals were victims, while victims of crime were ignored. Predictably, violent crime in our cities skyrocketed," said Speaker Todd Gilbert, R-Shenandoah. "Voters are tired of not feeling safe in their own neighborhoods. Working with Attorney General Jason Miyares, our Republican majority has passed multiple bills that will give law enforcement the tools they need to keep our communities safe, and keep dangerous criminals where they belong – behind bars,” Gilbert said. “Our House Republican team has sent a strong message to the Commonwealth with this session’s public safety legislation. We’ve told police that we have their back and will ensure they have the tools they need to do their job," added Del. Tony Wilt, R-Rockingham, chair of the House Public Safety Committee. We told criminals that if they break the law to hurt their fellow Virginians, they’re going to prison for a long time. And we told the public that we heard them, and we’re going to keep working until every Virginian can be safe in their own neighborhoods,” he said. “The legislation we’ve passed in the first half of this session will, if passed into law, save lives," said Del. Rob Bell, chair of the House Courts of Justice Committee. "Our legislation holds fentanyl dealers accountable for the lives they take. Our bills tell the Parole Board that they must at least give prosecutors a chance to be heard before releasing violent offenders. And we put those who 'swat' -- who falsely summon law enforcement to harass others -- that when we catch them, they will go to jail. Republicans can and will make Virginia’s communities safer,”he added. Bills passed today include the following: "" ensures someone who knowingly distributes a substance containing two milligrams or more of fentanyl – a lethal amount – can be charged with attempted murder. "" prohibits the conditional release of a geriatric prisoner who committed specific heinous crimes. "" "" prohibits maliciously sending false information via a device related to the imminent threat of a person’s safety that leads to an unnecessary emergency response. "" designates a substance containing fentanyl as a weapon of terrorism. "" directs the Parole Board to review all petitions for geriatric conditional release on an annual basis and condenses the review that may otherwise require two identical meetings into one meeting. "" would expand Virginia’s felony strangulation law to cover defendants who smother their victims. "" would make it easier for victims to renew protective orders. The bill also will make it easier for victims to avoid gaps when they do seek renewal. "" addresses the issue of sexual extortion and would allow prosecutors to bring felony charges against someone who threatens to release the victims photos on social media to coerce sex. As your delegate, I am grateful for the opportunity to work with fellow Delegates in support of curbing crime, and can proudly say I voted on your behalf in support of these bills. | | Your Delegate, Karen Delegate Karen S. GreenhalghHouse of Delegates 1-804-698-1085 |

body:
**[Derek, this is a long email, but I hope you’ll read the whole thing. Then, I hope you’ll chip in a few bucks to help keep our team going strong as we get ready for some tough fights ahead. Any amount makes a difference.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58511597/391317539/-2084059834?refcode=email_020923_longemail&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjk5Nzg5Ni1jMmE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rC7cPo4C_4NUv4QiEECmzdp9EbGoXImhfblB_paIBt0=)**

I want to take a moment to talk about how we won in 2022 – and why I’m so proud of it.

We knew that we’d need to run a different kind of campaign — and wake up every day ready to defend the fundamental freedoms of Pennsylvanians. And with so much on the line, we knew we had to bring more people into the fold of our campaign than ever before.

So what did we do? We showed up everywhere.

I visited Pennsylvanians in their homes and in their union halls. I went to our places of worship and our community centers. I walked our main streets and I visited our big cities and our farms. And most importantly, I listened and I learned from the good people of Pennsylvania.

We treated everyone with respect, and people from all walks of life, all areas and all political parties united under the vision that we laid out for the commonwealth.

**As a result, we didn’t just earn a record number of votes, but we won in places where Democrats had not competed effectively for far too long.** We won in places that the pundits had written off. We proved that if we show up, Democrats can win again.

And most importantly, we showed that when everything is on the line, we can all come together to resoundingly reject extremism in Pennsylvania.

**[Showing up. Listening. Working together. That’s how we got here and that’s how we’re going to continue to win big fights ahead. And just as I knew I could count on before, I hope I can count on your support now as we keep moving forward. That’s why I’m asking: will you chip in $5 or whatever you can to power Team Shapiro?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58511598/391317540/-2084059834?refcode=email_020923_longemail&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjk5Nzg5Ni1jMmE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rC7cPo4C_4NUv4QiEECmzdp9EbGoXImhfblB_paIBt0=)** | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58511599/391317541/-2084059834?refcode=email_020923_longemail&amount=5&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMjk5Nzg5Ni1jMmE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rC7cPo4C_4NUv4QiEECmzdp9EbGoXImhfblB_paIBt0=)

name: Brent Bozell
subject: 10 biggest lies from Biden's State of the Union
body:
Did you see the State of the Union the other night? If you did, I’m sure you’re as disgusted by all the lies Biden told duri
[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zg5o3aa3ba2stptspmad07dpfhn5anp859amn0hg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjjm1pr0s5h2bs)
Friend,

Did you see the State of the Union the other night?

If you did, I'm sure you're as disgusted by all the lies Biden told during the speech. And if you didn't, you can find **The 10 Biggest Lies Biden told in the State of the Union below.**

Let me introduce myself. My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC).

**MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media and holding them accountable for their corruption and lies.**

[_**I 've set a goal to raise $10,000 this week to support our fight to END media corruption. Can you join the fight with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to send your urgent support >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zka0j0p590ist28fpgenjk7kumc00eispq94bbc8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjjm1pr0s5h2bs)

As promised, here are **The 10 Biggest Lies Biden told in the State of the Union:**

1. **LIE:** The most jobs ever created under a president.

**Fact:** Under Biden's poor economy, more people are working two jobs. It was people going back to work after the lockdowns that caused the rise in jobs.

2. **LIE:** Unemployment is at its lowest rate in 50 years.

**Fact:** They manipulated unemployment statistics by no longer tracking young, healthy men who gave up looking for work and removed themselves from the workforce.

3. **LIE:** Inflation is falling.

**Fact:** Inflation statistics don't often include everyday items like groceries and energy bills.

4. **LIE:** The COVID vaccine saved millions of lives.

**Fact:** Countries that didn't force the vaccine on their citizens are doing just as well, if not better, than those that did.

5. **LIE:** The pandemic caused a spike in crime.

**Fact:** Antifa and BLM radicals destroyed cities and police departments while Democratic mayors encouraged the madness.

[_**Click here to END Government and Media corruption >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zmm6bhvknoafmhg2shslill6phqvjkggtvfdkbcg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjjm1pr0s5h2bs)

6. **LIE:** Biden is cracking down on the border and border security.

**Fact:** We are seeing more illegal immigrants crossing the border now than ever under President Trump.

7. **LIE:** Biden thinks bipartisanship is important.

**Fact:** The country is more divisive than ever since Biden enacted his policies for the vaccine mandates, energy and ESG, and radical trans ideology.

8. **LIE:** The attack on Paul Pelosi was Trump's fault.

**Fact:** His attacker was a crazy, drugged-out nudist living in San Francisco.

9. **LIE:** Hate and extremism are coming from the right and Republicans,

**Fact:** Biden and the Democrats fueled radical Antifa to burn down cities -- and I'd call that a show of hate and extremism.

10. **LIE:** Debt decreased by $1.7 trillion in two years.

**Fact:** According to the U.S. Treasury, during Biden's first two years in office -- Jan. 20, 2021, through Jan. 20, 2023 -- the federal debt increased by approximately $3.7 trillion.

[_**Help hold the media accountable for their corruption with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount.**__**Click HERE**_ _**to send a gift >>>**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3itnda804rk7ifrnj9i6p2gplmlhuhhsqvdqieo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjjm1pr0s5h2bs)

And there were more lies than I could keep track of in the rest of Biden's speech, Friend.

**It 's outrageous to see how the radical Left media perpetuates government corruption!**

Unfortunately, many people believe Biden and these lies while he continues to further hate, corruption, and division.

name: Brent Bozell
subject: State of the Union? More like the State of Corruption
body:
Did you see the State of the Union the other night? [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7946%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=mgSBR%2f%2fR%2b5V4bhZo9hLoPw&sysid=1)
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c05181%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Q3976x%2bMgeRypS6UyVQeBw&sysid=1)
Friend,

Did you see the State of the Union the other night?

If you did, I’m sure you’re as disgusted by all the lies Biden told during the speech. And if you didn’t, you can find **The 10 Biggest Lies Biden told in the State of the Union below.**

Let me introduce myself. My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC).

**MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media and holding them accountable for their corruption and lies.**

[_**I’ve set a goal to raise $10,000 this week to support our fight to END media corruption. Can you join the fight with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to send your urgent support >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c05182%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tyT%2fdRm76zEOKlTzv3mfTA&sysid=1)

As promised, here are **The 10 Biggest Lies Biden told in the State of the Union:**

1. **LIE:** The most jobs ever created under a president.

**Fact:** Under Biden’s poor economy, more people are working two jobs. It was people going back to work after the lockdowns that caused the rise in jobs.

2. **LIE:** Unemployment is at its lowest rate in 50 years.

**Fact:** They manipulated unemployment statistics by no longer tracking young, healthy men who gave up looking for work and removed themselves from the workforce.

3. **LIE:** Inflation is falling.

**Fact:** Inflation statistics don’t often include everyday items like groceries and energy bills.

4. **LIE:** The COVID vaccine saved millions of lives.

**Fact:** Countries that didn’t force the vaccine on their citizens are doing just as well, if not better, than those that did.

5. **LIE:** The pandemic caused a spike in crime.

**Fact:** Antifa and BLM radicals destroyed cities and police departments while Democratic mayors encouraged the madness.

[_**Click here to END Government and Media corruption >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c05183%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qBftKuJkkQX%2bYPIDROyksg&sysid=1)

6. **LIE:** Biden is cracking down on the border and border security.

**Fact:** We are seeing more illegal immigrants crossing the border now than ever under President Trump.

7. **LIE:** Biden thinks bipartisanship is important.

**Fact:** The country is more divisive than ever since Biden enacted his policies for the vaccine mandates, energy and ESG, and radical trans ideology.

8. **LIE:** The attack on Paul Pelosi was Trump's fault.

**Fact:** His attacker was a crazy, drugged-out nudist living in San Francisco.

9. **LIE:** Hate and extremism are coming from the right and Republicans,

**Fact:** Biden and the Democrats fueled radical Antifa to burn down cities -- and I’d call that a show of hate and extremism.

10. **LIE:** Debt decreased by $1.7 trillion in two years.

**Fact:** According to the U.S. Treasury, during Biden’s first two years in office -- Jan. 20, 2021, through Jan. 20, 2023 -- the federal debt increased by approximately $3.7 trillion.

[_**Help hold the media accountable for their corruption with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount.**__**Click HERE**_ _**to send a gift >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c05184%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wWSlfPhKYJ1hExsebuZeJQ&sysid=1)

And there were more lies than I could keep track of in the rest of Biden’s speech, friend.

**It’s outrageous to see how the radical Left media perpetuates government corruption!**

Unfortunately, many people believe Biden and these lies while he continues to further hate, corruption, and division.

That’s why MRC’s mission to expose corruption and hold those accountable is so important. **Can you help us reach our goal by clicking any link below to help reach our goal of $10,000 this weekend?**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c05195%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2XCpitgp7AS2UIrJJnN7aw&sysid=1)

[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c05199%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=H0APbkg9Eqn%2b5b%2bUAXA0AQ&sysid=1)

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Democrats are climbing out of their defensive crouch, where we were as they accused us of "killing babies" and tried to overthrow our government. Rep. Swalwell is one of those leading the way.
body:
How to deal with the GOP.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T20fa17ef-2c16-4f33-91a7-48c1d126a5be/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_" When they're sinking, throw 'em an anvil." It's an old saying that describes what Rep. Eric Swalwell and other Democrats have come to understand._** _You may have seen the outstanding speech Swalwell gave in defense of his colleague Rep. Ilhan Omar the other day. He delivered it as Kevin McCarthy removed her from House committees "anti-Semitism," while putting Marjorie Taylor Greene, believer in Jewish lasers and Soros conspiracy theories, back on her committees._ More hypocrisy, lies and conspiracy from Republicans, what's new, right? **_BUT...something very important is changing, and Rep. Swalwell is one of those leading the way. Democrats are climbing out of their defensive crouch, where we were as they accused us of "killing babies" and tried to overthrow our government. Too worried about decorum, not worried enough about democracy._** **No more.** **Swalwell, just to pick one of this new breed, hits back hard and hits back often. He gets this isn't about *revenge,* but what people hear. If you let bullies walk all over you, the media and public get the mistaken impression these sniveling GOP cowards are tough (which is laughable), and Democrats are not.** [**_Will you join the Blue Amp Community in rewarding/supporting Rep. Swalwell, letting him know we appreciate his fighting for us and calling out lies? Will you give him $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to continue fighting hard for all we hold dear?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T45be313f-84fe-4fcb-b94e-06a598770d44/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4fbae5b9-49a0-4b6a-b7dd-030dfbb1a3c7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T92c7b142-4f7c-415c-bc01-e6ac71643901/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _Look, this wouldn't be our first choice, that would be a functioning democracy with a Republican Party that hadn't gone insane the past generation. **But, it's the only way we beat those whose very nature is to not play fair, because they don't believe in democracy. We must support and provide incentives for more of this. Because holding into our democracy is too important for niceties**_**. ** [**_So, will you join the Blue Amp Community in rewarding/supporting Rep. Swalwell, letting him know we appreciate his fighting for us and calling out lies? Will you give him $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to continue fighting hard for all we hold dear?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0534d23e-cb6d-473f-83b4-57e6b3081110/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Thank you_ for helping get Democrats into fighting shape to beat back fascism. On this State of the Union day, supporting Swalwell is the way to ensure we strengthen it.** Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T81d23b72-18eb-494d-b064-703b22d4b7a0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. clean_body: How to deal with the GOP. | | | | | | | | | | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | | | | | | | | Peter, " When they're sinking, throw 'em an anvil." It's an old saying that describes what Rep. Eric Swalwell and other Democrats have come to understand. You may have seen the outstanding speech Swalwell gave in defense of his colleague Rep. Ilhan Omar the other day. He delivered it as Kevin McCarthy removed her from House committees "anti-Semitism," while putting Marjorie Taylor Greene, believer in Jewish lasers and Soros conspiracy theories, back on her committees. More hypocrisy, lies and conspiracy from Republicans, what's new, right? BUT...something very important is changing, and Rep. Swalwell is one of those leading the way. Democrats are climbing out of their defensive crouch, where we were as they accused us of "killing babies" and tried to overthrow our government. Too worried about decorum, not worried enough about democracy. No more. Swalwell, just to pick one of this new breed, hits back hard and hits back often. He gets this isn't about revenge, but what people hear. If you let bullies walk all over you, the media and public get the mistaken impression these sniveling GOP cowards are tough (which is laughable), and Democrats are not. | | | | | | | | Look, this wouldn't be our first choice, that would be a functioning democracy with a Republican Party that hadn't gone insane the past generation. But, it's the only way we beat those whose very nature is to not play fair, because they don't believe in democracy. We must support and provide incentives for more of this. Because holding into our democracy is too important for niceties. Thank you for helping get Democrats into fighting shape to beat back fascism. On this State of the Union day, supporting Swalwell is the way to ensure we strengthen it. | | | President Biden delivered a great State of the Union address this week – even as he was heckled by several of the looniest Republicans in Congress. These Republicans, including Marjorie Taylor Greene, had absolutely zero respect or decorum as they shouted and jeered at President Biden on the floor of the House of Representatives. Even Kevin McCarthy told Republicans before the speech to act in line with the congressional “code of ethics” – which they clearly did not. Democratic Rep. Hakeem Jeffries suggested that these Republicans are unfit to serve in Congress – and we couldn’t agree more! At the very least, they must be disciplined for their awful behavior, or this is just going to get worse and worse. [Add your name to demand the Republicans who heckled Biden at the State of the Union be kicked out of Congress, or at least punished! >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T70c721c6-01ac-404b-9338-d799627919bf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

body:

Fellow conservative, it’s Jessica Anderson.
I want to give you a quick progress update on the _Stop ESG Initiative._****
---
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zpm09ta89t3pqtjujho5tn27ahchji2fbjchbie0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjjm9ob4c5h2bs)
---
| | It doesn’t matter if you’re a customer, investor, small business owner, employer, or employee - ESG punishes conservatives and all Americans are forced to pay. As we like to put it at Heritage Action, “Go Woke, Go Broke”! **_Our fight against ESG is making a difference._** We saw record divestment by states from BlackRock last year. CEO Larry Fink even said the company **lost $4 billion due to the conservative backlash against ESG.** That’s all thanks to conservatives like you, Fellow conservative. Woke corporations are on defense while Heritage Action and states across the country continue to lead the charge against woke ESG standards. **But we NEED your help to keep up the pressure and help pass laws to block ESG.** [**Fellow conservative, we want to expand the fight against ESG massively in 2023. Your crucial donation will help us do it – chip in $20.23 now >>**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zrbcsi1o3ku27as9sbatchj4r9q3ab1ttlt0ldcg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjjm9ob4c5h2bs) Thank you,Jessica AndersonExecutive Director | Heritage Action

name: Adrastos, Campaign Manager for Team Cori
subject: Making sure you didn’t miss this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
We want to hear your favorite ways to celebrate Black joy, including books, songs, movies, and Black-owned businesses.
#
Hey Peter,
Our team emailed you last week regarding Black History Month and Black joy. If you haven’t had a chance to read it yet, it’s shared below.
[**We’re collecting folks’ favorite ways to celebrate Black joy and excellence, from music and art to small businesses and food. How do you celebrate Black joy, Peter?**](https://act.coribush.org/survey/email-black-joy/?source=em20230209-2148&t=1&akid=2148%2E1082990%2Ea54I6D)
**[SHARE »](https://act.coribush.org/survey/email-black-joy/?source=em20230209-2148&t=2&akid=2148%2E1082990%2Ea54I6D)**
Thanks for taking the time to share your answers with us! Cori and our team are excited to see your response.
—Adrastos
Campaign Manager, Team Cori
_\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Team Cori [info@e.coribush.com]
Date: Sun, Feb 5, 2023 at 10:44 AM
Subject: What’s your favorite song?
To: Peter [dpwillis67@gmail.com]_
Peter,
Black people built this country. Throughout history, Black leaders have turned the tides of our country, and every day we see examples of Black history makers who continue to do just that.
From the organizers who marched on the Ferguson frontline to save Black lives and sent a message that our lives matter. To government leaders who are working to transform our politics and enact legislation to address the harm that centuries of racist policies have caused. And, leaders like Cori — the first Black woman elected to represent Missouri in Congress — who are advocating for the bold, anti-racist policies St. Louis and communities like it need.
We know that Black history is being made day-in and day-out — and it deserves to be celebrated every single day.
Which is why, in the name of honoring Black history and celebrating Black joy, Cori and our team wants to hear from you:
[**What do you think of when you think of Black joy? What are your favorite books, movies, songs, artists, or businesses that help you celebrate Black joy?**](https://act.coribush.org/survey/email-black-joy/?source=em20230209-2148&t=3&akid=2148%2E1082990%2Ea54I6D)
**[SHARE »](https://act.coribush.org/survey/email-black-joy/?source=em20230209-2148&t=4&akid=2148%2E1082990%2Ea54I6D)**
Throughout the month we’ll share your recommendations and some of Cori’s favorite ways to celebrate Black joy. But in order to do so, we need to hear from you, Peter!
**[So please, share how you celebrate Black joy here.](https://act.coribush.org/survey/email-black-joy/?source=em20230209-2148&t=5&akid=2148%2E1082990%2Ea54I6D)** Then, forward this email to three of your friends so they can share their recommendations with us, too.
Thanks for your help,
Team Cori

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230209?refcode=em20230209-2148-footer&t=6&refcode2=2148_1082990_a54I6D&akid=2148%2E1082990%2Ea54I6D) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.coribush.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.coribush.org/signup/update-your-information?t=7&akid=2148%2E1082990%2Ea54I6D)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.coribush.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=2148%2E1082990%2Ea54I6D)

name: Ruben Gallego for Arizona
subject: We got this letter from a World War II vet, along with a $250 donation
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Please read.
#

Peter -
Here’s a letter we received along with a $250 donation from a World War II veteran shortly after Ruben Gallego announced his campaign for Senate.
[**Please read the letter and if you’re so-moved join him by adding a contribution of your own today.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-feb23.mRGPOt&refcode=em230209-1-7-3&t=1&akid=372%2E734936%2EkYtnHV)
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-feb23.mRGPOt&refcode=em230209-1-7-3&t=2&akid=372%2E734936%2EkYtnHV)
_Congressman Gallego,_
_I am a 97 year old W.W. II vet, served in the Central Pacific on Saipan and Guam. I appreciate your service in the military and in government too. You ran for the House of Rep. in Arizona when I was District Democratic Chair in 2010 and remember your stance on important issues._
As you can imagine, this letter meant a lot to Ruben.
Your support today would as well.
[**Please contribute $5, $10 or whatever you can afford. It all adds up when we’re all chipping in toward a shared goal.](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-feb23.mRGPOt&refcode=em230209-1-7-3&t=3&akid=372%2E734936%2EkYtnHV)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1045?c0=ruben-em-feb23.sph-To&refcode=em230209-1-7-3&t=22&akid=372%2E734936%2EkYtnHV)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1046?c0=ruben-em-feb23.4c1q91&refcode=em230209-1-7-3&t=23&akid=372%2E734936%2EkYtnHV)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1039?c0=ruben-em-feb23.EBks4w&refcode=em230209-1-7-3&t=24&akid=372%2E734936%2EkYtnHV)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1040?c0=ruben-em-feb23.8_Mc_3&refcode=em230209-1-7-3&t=25&akid=372%2E734936%2EkYtnHV)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1041?c0=ruben-em-feb23.1vLWg1&refcode=em230209-1-7-3&t=26&akid=372%2E734936%2EkYtnHV)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-feb23.CFC4vE&refcode=em230209-1-7-3&t=27&akid=372%2E734936%2EkYtnHV)**
---
****
Thank you,
Ruben Gallego for Arizona

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=28&akid=372%2E734936%2EkYtnHV). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=29&refcode2=372_734936_kYtnHV&akid=372%2E734936%2EkYtnHV)

You ran for the House of Rep. in Arizona when I was District Democratic Chair in 2010 and remember your stance on important issues. As you can imagine, this letter meant a lot to Ruben. subject: 2023 Republican Action Conference
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Come and join us for a day of learning and fun in Kennewick Washington on May 5th and 6th!

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

name: Brent Bozell
subject: From the mouth of Bide: corruption
body:
Did you see the State of the Union the other night?
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs4qnviij2c8ciormsefm2tnsffu0v2g2alahuo8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjge8o74cdh2bs)
Friend,

Did you see the State of the Union the other night?

If you did, I'm sure you're as disgusted by all the lies Biden told during the speech. And if you didn't, you can find **The 10 Biggest Lies Biden told in the State of the Union below.**

Let me introduce myself. My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC).

**MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media and holding them accountable for their corruption and lies.**

[_**I 've set a goal to raise $10,000 this week to support our fight to END media corruption. Can you join the fight with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to send your urgent support >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl2ehe2qe4kikghoh3ubnnpftk4lhqec3db0dfog_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjge8o74cdh2bs)

As promised, here are **The 10 Biggest Lies Biden told in the State of the Union:**

1. **LIE:** The most jobs ever created under a president.

**Fact:** Under Biden's poor economy, more people are working two jobs. It was people going back to work after the lockdowns that caused the rise in jobs.

2. **LIE:** Unemployment is at its lowest rate in 50 years.

**Fact:** They manipulated unemployment statistics by no longer tracking young, healthy men who gave up looking for work and removed themselves from the workforce.

3. **LIE:** Inflation is falling.

**Fact:** Inflation statistics don't often include everyday items like groceries and energy bills.

4. **LIE:** The COVID vaccine saved millions of lives.

**Fact:** Countries that didn't force the vaccine on their citizens are doing just as well, if not better, than those that did.

5. **LIE:** The pandemic caused a spike in crime.

**Fact:** Antifa and BLM radicals destroyed cities and police departments while Democratic mayors encouraged the madness.

[_**Click here to END Government and Media corruption >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl0hcfd350j79e2998gt7j0m36v5o1oojcfdka8o_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjge8o74cdh2bs)

6. **LIE:** Biden is cracking down on the border and border security.

**Fact:** We are seeing more illegal immigrants crossing the border now than ever under President Trump.

7. **LIE:** Biden thinks bipartisanship is important.

**Fact:** The country is more divisive than ever since Biden enacted his policies for the vaccine mandates, energy and ESG, and radical trans ideology.

8. **LIE:** The attack on Paul Pelosi was Trump's fault.

**Fact:** His attacker was a crazy, drugged-out nudist living in San Francisco.

9. **LIE:** Hate and extremism are coming from the right and Republicans,

**Fact:** Biden and the Democrats fueled radical Antifa to burn down cities -- and I'd call that a show of hate and extremism.

10. **LIE:** Debt decreased by $1.7 trillion in two years.

**Fact:** According to the U.S. Treasury, during Biden's first two years in office -- Jan. 20, 2021, through Jan. 20, 2023 -- the federal debt increased by approximately $3.7 trillion.

[_**Help hold the media accountable for their corruption with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount.**__**Click HERE**_ _**to send a gift >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztjkp9f10b18ae79rkt9h9cmcuk4bqpvn9jrqq38_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjge8o74cdh2bs)

And there were more lies than I could keep track of in the rest of Biden's speech, friend.

**It 's outrageous to see how the radical Left media perpetuates government corruption!**

Unfortunately, many people believe Biden and these lies while he continues to further hate, corruption, and division.

That's why MRC's mission to expose corruption and hold those accountable is so important. **Can you help us reach our goal by clicking any link below to help reach our goal of $10,000 this weekend?**

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5b27jin9gbnjnqg9lk7ivmd7iqq9p6io0bsqtmg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjge8o74cdh2bs)

[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ziem8g1ei1a0e7rsem2crkoi6dh9tduv2frh4udo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjge8o74cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp145c7ohvdrtda01j8mtl1ji1hu94qbcha021uo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjge8o74cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z24hr62e74ov989476ite11ae4m53cljmiuvc2ag_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjge8o74cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcjjgigv4j7jgcbk8hfvfgc63ferpeeprfd6li4g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjge8o74cdh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo8q6f2ti3135k5ibdmf4qf8emjlib8eb45jdnp8_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjge8o74cdh2bs)

[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjq0qc2h43nnold72gukl6u9njtushpojvh3u89g_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjge8o74cdh2bs)

Thank you,

Brent Bozell
Founder and President of MRC

name: Coach Tuberville
subject: Staggering small business numbers [MUST-READ]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
Add your name to show where you stand >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/a17ed0a7e92e89a4/d2af5307ab205406c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Peter, Joe Biden and his Democrat pals have been a disaster for our country. Our border is under siege, crime is out of control, and spending is through the roof.
More than 200,000 businesses had permanently closed as of April 2021 due to pro-lockdown and anti-business pandemic policies implemented by the left – **and a recent survey shows that 65 percent of small businesses left standing say it’s “very likely” or “likely” they’ll be forced to close if the inflation we’ve seen in the Biden era continues.**
I know what we need to do and I know you do too.
We need a return to a **MAGA ECONOMY** – we need _PRO-GROWTH_ economic policies that will empower our nation’s small businesses and help American families thrive!
I’m a proud supporter of President Trump. Under his leadership, our economy was on fire. Job numbers were through the roof and middle-class family incomes were on the rise.
It’s hard to believe how much things have changed in two short years.
**[If you agree we need a return to pro-growth policies, sign my petition HERE>>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/a17ed0a7e92e89a4/9e741a681fbb6ebdc3d6b838967d376c/33013)**
I’m leading the charge in Washington and I’m grateful to have you standing behind me.
\- Coach Tuberville
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ralph?=
subject: Join Pastor Ralph Rebandt at the Grand New Party's Washington Day Dinner - February 23!
body:
| | | |
---
| | | _**[Check out this special message from Pastor Ralph Rebandt on the Grand New Party PAC!](https://ralphrebandtforgovernor.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ea173c4dcce2de1707ba16641&id=f780bf3ae9&e=2aac2d782b)**_ **Join Pastor Ralph Rebandt at the Grand New Party's Washington Day Dinner event in Wayne County, Michigan!** Thursday, February 23rd, 2023 Stefan's Banquets at St. Michael's Cultural Center 26355 W. Chicago Redford, MI 48239 Doors Open at 6pm Tickets available here: [https://tinyurl.com/gnpdinner](https://ralphrebandtforgovernor.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ea173c4dcce2de1707ba16641&id=3c199e1960&e=2aac2d782b)
The Grand New Party PAC's Washington Day Dinners are aiming to unite the grassroots behind our core constitutional America First principles!
After the upcoming State Republican Party convention, there needs to be unity among the factions of the America First movement in Michigan. There are many strong conservative candidates, and one of them is likely to win, considering the current makeup of galvanized patriotic precinct delegates. We will need to unite behind whoever is the victor at the Michigan Republican convention. Our state's victory in 2024 depends upon nothing less.

**These Washington Day Dinner events are about coming together and overcoming our differences, uniting behind strong constitutional conservatism and the legitimate champions for our cause, ahead of the most important election cycle in our lifetime in what may be our last chance to save our state and our country.**

Members of the newly-formed Michigan Freedom Caucus will be in attendance at the Washington Day Dinner as well. The Grand New Party hopes to inspire you, bring much-needed comradery to the movement, and help pave the way for a better Republican Party that will actually defend liberty in Michigan moving forward! See you there! [Buy tickets now!](https://ralphrebandtforgovernor.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ea173c4dcce2de1707ba16641&id=5971875012&e=2aac2d782b) For more information on the Grand New Party PAC, visit [gnppac.com](https://ralphrebandtforgovernor.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ea173c4dcce2de1707ba16641&id=a7fbd25c0b&e=2aac2d782b).

clean_body: | | | | | | | Join Pastor Ralph Rebandt at the Grand New Party's Washington Day Dinner event in Wayne County, Michigan! Thursday, February 23rd, 2023 Stefan's Banquets at St. Michael's Cultural Center 26355 W. Chicago Redford, MI 48239 Doors Open at 6pm Tickets available here: The Grand New Party PAC's Washington Day Dinners are aiming to unite the grassroots behind our core constitutional America First principles! After the upcoming State Republican Party convention, there needs to be unity among the factions of the America First movement in Michigan. There are many strong conservative candidates, and one of them is likely to win, considering the current makeup of galvanized patriotic precinct delegates. We will need to unite behind whoever is the victor at the Michigan Republican convention. Our state's victory in 2024 depends upon nothing less. These Washington Day Dinner events are about coming together and overcoming our differences, uniting behind strong constitutional conservatism and the legitimate champions for our cause, ahead of the most important election cycle in our lifetime in what may be our last chance to save our state and our country. Members of the newly-formed Michigan Freedom Caucus will be in attendance at the Washington Day Dinner as well. The Grand New Party hopes to inspire you, bring much-needed comradery to the movement, and help pave the way for a better Republican Party that will actually defend liberty in Michigan moving forward! See you there! For more information on the Grand New Party PAC, visit . | | Let's Get Started | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2023 Mission:Lighthouse, All rights reserved.

Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius have been creating successful businesses since college. Now they lead hear.com, the fastest growing hearing aid company in the world. This is their story.

Let's be honest, very few people want to wear hearing aids. Although there have been huge breakthroughs in technology, most people don't use them simply because they are still big and ugly. However, Dr. Marco Vietor and Paul Crusius wanted to change this perception with **a revolutionary device developed with top German hearing aid engineers** formerly from Siemens. After many years of research and development, this team of engineers came up with a game-changing hearing aid that's completely crushing the market with powerful German technology.

**The result:** A hearing device that packs cutting-edge technology in a design so small, it completely disappears inside the ear. It's called the Horizon Mini by hear.com.
[ Check if you qualify ](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxtUU1vhCAQ_TV60yCg6MHDds02PWx62d0eCQIqWVCjWOO_77g1PXXCR-a9x2MYdJlkLC2yFJEkVCXFImlkaEqMMEEYFQmjeUpjrCSjMilyhgqmGAoo0k4YGzeT1r4z_VNPCvItloMLu7JoaoYTAoHyXGmMVV1kMlNIFHUhkzq0Zef9OAfkFOALjHVd406LyfRtJIyKhPo2Uu9uQCqYtZ49PxQcFDMXTYPofppchPQBqU7nG9qDMoYpJAHOFu_4PCyT1MB7Jw7IaWUWBxB4GGuE1wchhRuFaXuglpnrngvLOyH4n46DyY5EzbD0Sk9zpIaltoATxP8pYATSzJ2e-EcFpp92c6ORV7h_r2Ve6l_8cqvCqVTjaizIMwb9bV_93dsJNVnTbGXA3gKMO3g7bK_O4cWTh7jfr9MWfa3P6D194HYn8RlWv436T3mYxK9v21FW_QCsFJ_-)
[ ](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxtUU1vhCAQ_TV60yCg6MHDds02PWx62d0eCQIqWVCjWOO_77g1PXXCR-a9x2MYdJlkLC2yFJEkVCXFImlkaEqMMEEYFQmjeUpjrCSjMilyhgqmGAoo0k4YGzeT1r4z_VNPCvItloMLu7JoaoYTAoHyXGmMVV1kMlNIFHUhkzq0Zef9OAfkFOALjHVd406LyfRtJIyKhPo2Uu9uQCqYtZ49PxQcFDMXTYPofppchPQBqU7nG9qDMoYpJAHOFu_4PCyT1MB7Jw7IaWUWBxB4GGuE1wchhRuFaXuglpnrngvLOyH4n46DyY5EzbD0Sk9zpIaltoATxP8pYATSzJ2e-EcFpp92c6ORV7h_r2Ve6l_8cqvCqVTjaizIMwb9bV_93dsJNVnTbGXA3gKMO3g7bK_O4cWTh7jfr9MWfa3P6D194HYn8RlWv436T3mYxK9v21FW_QCsFJ_-)
Horizon Mini comes with smartphone connectivity, allowing you to control the device with your iPhone or Android. In addition, this new device uses a unique algorithm that is clinically proven to deliver better than normal hearing. You will notice remarkable improvements in your ability to clearly understand speech, even in noisy environments like a busy restaurant.

Limited no-risk trials now available

It's really no surprise that this level of innovation is changing lives all over the world. People are experiencing the everyday benefits of this amazing device with hear.com's **45-day no-risk trial.**
[ Check if you qualify ](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxtUU1vhCAQ_TV60yCg6MHDds02PWx62d0eCQIqWVCjWOO_77g1PXXCR-a9x2MYdJlkLC2yFJEkVCXFImlkaEqMMEEYFQmjeUpjrCSjMilyhgqmGAoo0k4YGzeT1r4z_VNPCvItloMLu7JoaoYTAoHyXGmMVV1kMlNIFHUhkzq0Zef9OAfkFOALjHVd406LyfRtJIyKhPo2Uu9uQCqYtZ49PxQcFDMXTYPofppchPQBqU7nG9qDMoYpJAHOFu_4PCyT1MB7Jw7IaWUWBxB4GGuE1wchhRuFaXuglpnrngvLOyH4n46DyY5EzbD0Sk9zpIaltoATxP8pYATSzJ2e-EcFpp92c6ORV7h_r2Ve6l_8cqvCqVTjaizIMwb9bV_93dsJNVnTbGXA3gKMO3g7bK_O4cWTh7jfr9MWfa3P6D194HYn8RlWv436T3mYxK9v21FW_QCsFJ_-)

name: Jessica Anderson, Executive Director
subject: We’re taking the fight against ESG to the next level

body:
We’re making 2023 the year we secure and protect America from the woke, ESG agenda. | | | |
---
|
---
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ef7b4842278e4045b20dd1b187e0346b&_e=lW8ZyL_HsrpCg9Zt8U65-fO0kFLyeFv-R7CFXHpJskAC-BQueWCd6FeZvfHEcOC9OK-dxF9ssiCJgtXeyJucgr7eGtxzriKwrQ6JmKTy7oxhJXf2JLzwCaNhdSY-rOzg41VRiHcTjOGAToKQwUogeqUZHyJ5173EPWMJywXO_UYvkSNQfVhjgFjTJdcvx8rl3nkhfKY3uI9p9I5jC9C64n2WrUDdBIiCgvpkbjRysUoBbVzI4_fgijhHNtIvVHDrs-JrptbaMSWZSAYIkRmX2tWlcoN6GKRWTTcAXO3wLOqq-jbb0P4pn1FFzJYqhcvcOorsavxJPSm3ug4U421n-qByq9c8bYTDjo9FBHCNzsKMEMYRcWGFmYdXuFkCYkVr)

Fellow conservative, We're making 2023 the year we secure and protect America from the woke, ESG agenda. We're taking our _STOP ESG Initiative_ to the next level to make this happen. ESG is a form of a Chinese Communist social credit score that is designed to inject woke policies into our workplaces and weaponize all of corporate America into the Left's footsoldiers. **ESG hurts everyone.** We have a growing list of states who have introduced legislation to ensure woke ESG standards are defeated in 2023, but we're just getting started. name: Becca Balint
subject: Here’s what I heard at this week’s State of the Union:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont, P
body:
“We are the United States of America and there is nothing, nothing beyond our capacity if we do it together.” | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58496250/391287706/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjNmYTBkOC1hM2E4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xljZUREfo21mr91zl_RrMmHhJk9lBRiNBhaSw_FZRB4=&emci=2a646dd1-92a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=663fa0d8-a3a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) | Peter, This week, I attended President Biden’s State of the Union address. Here’s what I heard: **I heard President Biden’s assessment that our union — because of its people and soul — is _strong_. ** **I also heard President Biden’s vision for America.** An America where our economy works for everyone. An America where prescription drugs are affordable. An America where public schools are funded and teachers are paid what they deserve. An America where mental health and substance abuse crises are addressed. An America where people have full rights over their own bodies, to be their authentic selves, and to love. **But I also heard — by way of yells, boos, and even a shout of “Liar!” — a very different vision of America from some of my Republican colleagues.** An America where rich people get richer, Big Pharma gets stronger, unions get weaker, our democracy becomes more vulnerable, and so much more. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58496251/391287707/-412511982?refcode=E20249-20230209-SOTUFollowUp-graphic-Biden-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjNmYTBkOC1hM2E4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xljZUREfo21mr91zl_RrMmHhJk9lBRiNBhaSw_FZRB4=) We saw Republicans disgrace and disrespect the President, dismiss attempts to reach across the aisle, and work to advance their extremist agenda. But like President Biden said, _“We are the United States of America and there is nothing, nothing beyond our capacity if we do it together.” _ **I’ll work with whoever I can to make progress for Vermonters and for our country, and I won’t let those deadset on division and right-wing extremism derail our nation.** [_**I’m doing my part in the House to make our vision for America a reality. Will you join me in this fight for a better, stronger America by making a contribution of any amount to support my work in Congress?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58496253/391287709/-412511982?refcode=E20249-20230209-SOTUFollowUp-SL-Biden-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjNmYTBkOC1hM2E4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xljZUREfo21mr91zl_RrMmHhJk9lBRiNBhaSw_FZRB4=) **[Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58496254/391287710/-412511982?refcode=E20249-20230209-SOTUFollowUp-SB-Biden-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjNmYTBkOC1hM2E4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xljZUREfo21mr91zl_RrMmHhJk9lBRiNBhaSw_FZRB4=)** Yours, Becca Balint
