name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Progressives on the move.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We won't remain on the sidelines.
#
Peter,
**Progressives are on the move.** Just listen to this:
[](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/34293?refcode=em20230209-2142&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2142%2E420207%2EMfgNkk) _“After the November 2022 midterms, the [progressive] caucus now claims an all-time high of**103 members — nearly half of all House Democrats.** ”_ _“Along with such policy wins as including $1,400 stimulus checks and expanded unemployment benefits in 2021’s American Rescue Plan,**the CPC has helped shape the Democrats’ national priorities and economic playbook under the leadership of Rep. Pramila Jayapal...”**_ **[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/34293?refcode=em20230209-2142&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2142%2E420207%2EMfgNkk)**
---
We passed the Inflation Reduction Act because we pulled out all the stops and leveraged our collective power — successfully lowering prescription drug costs for millions of Americans, taxing the rich, and kickstarting real climate action. We know how to win, and even though we may not hold the House right now, you can bet that our progressive coalition will continue to fight with everything we have.
Despite the GOP gaining control of the House, the midterms proved that our bold and progressive agenda resonates with the people. **We will not stand by while Republicans try to overturn our fundamental rights, gut life-saving policies, and undermine our democracy.**
Our strategy to build a more progressive and inclusive movement has been successful in delivering results for working class families across the country. [**Now we will defend these hard-fought victories. Can we count on your support to pitch in $3today as we continue to build our progressive coalition?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/34293?refcode=em20230209-2142&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2142%2E420207%2EMfgNkk)
**[Chip in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/34293?refcode=em20230209-2142&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=2142%2E420207%2EMfgNkk)**
Our movement is sustained from the ground up, with support from people like you all over the country, proving every day that there’s a better future worth fighting for. We have to maintain the pressure, or else our movement won’t be able to achieve the wins on healthcare, childcare, labor, immigration, and more that we desperately need.
The road ahead will be challenging and difficult but my determination to push our progressive agenda will never slow down. **Our grassroots campaign will continue to grow, as long as you believe in our work and stay in this fight with me.** [**Will you stand with me today, and chip in to power our movement?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/34293?refcode=em20230209-2142&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=2142%2E420207%2EMfgNkk)
In solidarity,
Pramila

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230209-2142-footer&t=24&refcode2=2142_420207_MfgNkk&akid=2142%2E420207%2EMfgNkk)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

Friends,

I hope this email finds you well. As you may have heard, Kari Lake is leading the charge to Save Arizona. **Her recent rally brought attention to the serious concerns we have about the integrity of our elections.**

[ ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=79ef95ea014f4f4684fbd7c2ed28416c&_e=DPbvhkShF84hCKVcu_msTP8c5Nb_kRIR194edViwVUcbXJA0O-udeOyjNiA6atR3Goif1_d98j-w_QCu7zW0blit9RdawQdrzK51-iSfpCFwtu2kD-FVva7HE6l3NFnW1jQQf47_CifbiAVFym6hguUdmL5eBAHjuK2BwufIUjbCYV8sP3SuNBZWEQzfM-VeuKydwaHbZbZBt0YPx_QIEseTkm4j1neT0SADQd2q717O_ChmM5BctbcpR_ydJUxLpUvKPDLAt6XOUrZ7nnFYiUQpCwLJImKZGzlp0ZkKw9mZybfUByCAdX1Iv2mc60ZRkelpRLfNeoFek_kI1TqawpARk0zBXSomaFMQ6A9gHR9xaitsZ-jjaWLsrEJCEmoG3OdBMlgaULKIiZfRdjlcS383rkkC5VO6bu7rsjpzkcVV7LTrwvTt6LSx0LGkHEwte9q7Ux8FfV7FYkp8qGAI-YbHiOGjdtfPCQlxqzfXe5OXnw_5bwLEcfLJGGSKeyirZF_Qy2N68kk5JwsUoTxH3Op_LVjh3CDjKagsV5YxKjbNKH6zk91RW0I6SADmN5HG0Z27n8LHQsY196ZnASJWZw%3D%3D) | [**WATCH THE RALLY HERE** ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=79ef95ea014f4f4684fbd7c2ed28416c&_e=DPbvhkShF84hCKVcu_msTP8c5Nb_kRIR194edViwVUcbXJA0O-udeOyjNiA6atR3Goif1_d98j-w_QCu7zW0blit9RdawQdrzK51-iSfpCFwtu2kD-FVva7HE6l3NFnW1jQQf47_CifbiAVFym6hguUdmL5eBAHjuK2BwufIUjbCYV8sP3SuNBZWEQzfM-VeuKydwaHbZbZBt0YPx_QIEseTkm4j1neT0SADQd2q717O_ChmM5BctbcpR_ydJUxLpUvKPDLAt6XOUrZ7nnFYiUQpCwLJImKZGzlp0ZkKw9mZybfUByCAdX1Iv2mc60ZRkelpRLfNeoFek_kI1TqawpARk0zBXSomaFMQ6A9gHR9xaitsZ-jjaWLsrEJCEmoG3OdBMlgaULKIiZfRdjlcS383rkkC5VO6bu7rsjpzkcUArXlKDC-RKh-2UTk6TxYlU41fMJO5VwStYXM8rwayv7uk-kUzByi2wvCbqjW710j8blISVQrdXPCXIWtKqI9DvMTFNYGWpRuTEYADZMrJEGw1T4abCCj759fJT1JhUfsf9hcx5a2-yDI-7jwyVEWJp5PQyUKaNdCHo-1oYZ_PoOytwQwBzS3iP9KS9d5EC80%3D)
---

As Kari pointed out, imagine boxes filled with ballots, representing the number of rejected ballots in Maricopa County on Election Day. This is unacceptable and must be addressed.

That's why we're reaching out today to ask for your support in protecting the integrity of our elections. We need your help to raise the funds necessary to fight against those who are trying to undermine the will of the people and steal our election.

**[ Every donation helps us take one step closer to victory, and every dollar counts. So, I urge you to show your support for our cause by donating to the Save Arizona fund today. ](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=79ef95ea014f4f4684fbd7c2ed28416c&_e=DPbvhkShF84hCKVcu_msTP8c5Nb_kRIR194edViwVUcbXJA0O-udeOyjNiA6atR3Goif1_d98j-w_QCu7zW0blit9RdawQdrzK51-iSfpCFwtu2kD-FVva7HE6l3NFnW1jQQf47_CifbiAVFym6hguUdmL5eBAHjuK2BwufIUjbCYV8sP3SuNBZWEQzfM-VeuKydwaHbZbZBt0YPx_QIEseTkm4j1neT0SADQd2q717O_ChmM5BctbcpR_ydJUxLpUvKPDLAt6XOUrZ7nnFYiUQpCwLJImKZGzlp0ZkKw9mZybfUByCAdX1Iv2mc60ZRkelpRLfNeoFek_kI1TqawpARk0zBXSomaFMQ6A9gHR9xaitsZ-jjaWLsrEJCEmoG3OdBMlgaULKIiZfRdjlcS383rkkC5VO6bu7rsjpzkcVV7LTrwvTt6LSx0LGkHEwteU8aWnCAHhEIkDnQoy2TejnDWUV4UhB35R-N1TkhVz0EPlPYWv_-4iFhyIJql1405VlpioQQcf7O_Z9HQE9a9KS-6Ex712MVa8xvFxFyPctA2Eqd0Rc0FdTNwwf9uAcgSZvZMQHNrz6q2DlxQGwHuw%3D%3D)
**
Together, we can protect our state, our democracy, and our future.

Thank you for your support,
The Save Arizona Fund Team

name: 1600 Daily
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin

| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8qhfpri17b18b8df1ts01uhaqcchb2ulteq7pr0_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjgecob6c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zif48m2qn7f7mijve2nb2dakqfug1vg0vmplgn60_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjgecob6c5h2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvlihrq4ui7thta5h1ku01qistseu6j3tom5rqhg_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjgecob6c5h2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhqf679lje4n3gg9fn00l582uecl1gp1n16gf8fo_rp22sh2s8i66pr5cjgecob6c5h2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

clean_body: C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivatin | | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century. That's why we produced "" which you can now own on DVD. | | | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including: good and evil, conversion and faith, prayer and the Bible, suffering and death, * heaven and hell, and much more. Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis and After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man, and the co-editor of The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns! This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity. That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with . Best regards, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, . 625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Friend, **Today, I’m reaching out to ask for your support to enshrine the right to abortion in Maryland’s state constitution. [If you’re on board, add your name here >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58514898/391329006/534357688?refcode=fl_email_pt_20230209reproductivefreedom_wm_90da_SLA_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmI0MzJiMi1kMWE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1sQJ1dGn4ysQcDH7-SCgSSIWJOqKETENB0xER4WcjxQ=&emci=933501ac-d1a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=22b432b2-d1a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=24635485)** Last year, we witnessed the U.S. Supreme Court deal a shocking blow to reproductive rights when they overruled _Roe v. Wade_ , a 50-year old decision that protected the right to abortion nationwide. When this attack on reproductive choice happened, Aruna and I promised to defend Marylanders’ right to access safe and legal abortions if elected as your next Governor and Lt. Governor. In January, we released $3.5 million in funding for abortion care access that was previously withheld by the former governor. Now, we’re supporting a state constitutional amendment to enshrine the right to choose across Maryland. State House Speaker Adrienne Jones just reintroduced her constitutional amendment to affirm reproductive freedom for all, and I fully support it. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58514899/391329007/534357688?refcode=fl_email_pt_20230209reproductivefreedom_wm_90da_SLA_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmI0MzJiMi1kMWE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1sQJ1dGn4ysQcDH7-SCgSSIWJOqKETENB0xER4WcjxQ=&emci=933501ac-d1a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=22b432b2-d1a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=24635485)
---
**[Abortion is healthcare. If you agree and want reproductive rights protected in Maryland, add your name to support this constitutional amendment now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58514900/391329008/534357688?refcode=fl_email_pt_20230209reproductivefreedom_wm_90da_SLA_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMmI0MzJiMi1kMWE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1sQJ1dGn4ysQcDH7-SCgSSIWJOqKETENB0xER4WcjxQ=&emci=933501ac-d1a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=22b432b2-d1a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=24635485)**

House Republicans just announced their plans to cut Social Security and Medicare with their new Majority. [**Let me repeat that, Peter: Republicans just made it clear that they’ll put their political agenda over the livelihoods of millions of Americans.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58497350/391291447/-1810142053?refcode=20230209_em_fr_b1_raja_30_op_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTI4NGNiZC1hN2E4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sJxB91eOcSNFGcO90gP6mlTyY-mLnJiu1W9rsqw94-Y=) [_**Peter, I need an immediate response -- 1,868 gifts in the next 11 hours -- to stop Republicans from cutting critical spending to our healthcare system and harming the financial security millions of Americans rely on. Together, we can create an undeniable wave of support for our beloved retirement programs. Will you chip in $14 before midnight? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58497351/391291448/-1810142053?refcode=20230209_em_fr_b1_raja_30_op_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTI4NGNiZC1hN2E4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sJxB91eOcSNFGcO90gP6mlTyY-mLnJiu1W9rsqw94-Y=) I’ll tell you what I told Joy Reid, Peter: \-- Over 20 million Americans would fall into poverty without Social Security. \-- My Democratic colleagues and I are working to ensure Social Security and Medicare is safe for the next generation. \-- But now, House Republicans want to cut spending on these crucial social programs that so many rely on. [**Hear me, Peter: I made a sacred promise to protect Social Security and Medicare for my family, my constituents, and for every American.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58497352/391291449/-1810142053?refcode=20230209_em_fr_b1_raja_30_op_rs&amount=14&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzE2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTI4NGNiZC1hN2E4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sJxB91eOcSNFGcO90gP6mlTyY-mLnJiu1W9rsqw94-Y=) [_**That’s why I’m working relentlessly to put an end to these Republican attacks against these vital social programs. But I can’t do this alone -- which is why I’m asking you to step up in this defining moment. I need to raise 1,868 gifts in the next 11 hours to protect our Social Security and Medicare. And if we keep up the momentum, we can replicate these wins in New Hampshire – but we need you with us. Can we count on you today? subject: BREAKING: A blatant attempt by right-wing radicals to take over our public schools
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Right-wing politicians are turning our schools into a battlefield for their culture war.
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58497841/391292556/823540626?refcode=ea.6ff02982-aba8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ms=ea.6ff02982-aba8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmYwMjk4Mi1hYmE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pvf_Vh1CgaZ6QHanoiIwNFLbIraabtbUsFHJ_xYdoms=&emci=ea6472d6-05a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=6ff02982-aba8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)
Peter — _our public schools are under attack._ Republicans in Raleigh are working to push through a dangerous constitutional amendment that would alter our state Board of Education system. It’s a blatant attempt to have radical right-wing politicians run our public schools. **The only people who should be determining how our teachers teach and our students learn are educators and experts. Extremist legislators have no place calling the shots.** **[This amendment is an IMMEDIATE threat to our schools. Republicans could try to pass it as soon as this week. We need 500 supporters to take a stand against it before midnight — sign on to tell GOP legislators to leave public school governance to the experts!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58497842/391292557/-547359402?refcode=ea.6ff02982-aba8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ms=ea.6ff02982-aba8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmYwMjk4Mi1hYmE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pvf_Vh1CgaZ6QHanoiIwNFLbIraabtbUsFHJ_xYdoms=&emci=ea6472d6-05a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=6ff02982-aba8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)** It’s clear that right-wingers are intent on turning our public schools into the next battlefield for their culture war. It’s dangerous political pandering, and it’s just plain wrong. But Republicans know that public school takeovers by right-wing extremists play well to their base — that’s all there is to it. **[Peter, our schools and teachers deserve to learn and teach free of ideological restraints. Let GOP legislators know you agree by adding your name to Roy’s petition now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58497843/391292558/-547359402?refcode=ea.6ff02982-aba8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ms=ea.6ff02982-aba8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmYwMjk4Mi1hYmE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pvf_Vh1CgaZ6QHanoiIwNFLbIraabtbUsFHJ_xYdoms=&emci=ea6472d6-05a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=6ff02982-aba8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)** | ******[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58497844/391292559/-547359402?refcode=ea.6ff02982-aba8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ms=ea.6ff02982-aba8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmYwMjk4Mi1hYmE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Pvf_Vh1CgaZ6QHanoiIwNFLbIraabtbUsFHJ_xYdoms=&emci=ea6472d6-05a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=6ff02982-aba8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=1049176)******

_I am honored to serve you as the new Congressman for the 16th District of Illinois. During my time in Congress, I have been proud to stand up for our Midwest conservative values, fighting for lower taxes, supporting law enforcement, backing Illinois farmers, standing up to China, and advocating for parents’ rights. Americans sent a Republican majority to Congress to place a check on the Biden Administration, reduce inflation, curb violent crime, and secure the border. As this Congress begins, I will continue to keep regularly updated on how I am working to serve our district and the accomplishments of House Republicans in 2023._ \- Congressman Darin LaHood

clean_body: | | | | | KEEP UP WITH DARIN | | | | | Congressman LaHood had a great night in Dixon with the Lee County Republicans for their Reagan Day Dinner with State House GOP Leader Tony McCombie and Lee County GOP Chair Brett Nicklaus. | As House Republicans work to fulfill our promises to the American people, I am proud to be appointed to serve on the Select Committee on China by Speaker McCarthy. The Chinese Communist Party poses generational challenges that Congress must address. I will work on this Committee to counter the CCP’s malign influence and strengthen American competitiveness around the globe. | | | DARIN JOINS LELAND VITTERT ON NEWS NATION | NATIONAL FREEDOM DAY SURVEY Did you have a chance to take Darin's National Freedom Day Survey? ⬇️ ⬇️ ⬇️ | HAPPY BIRTHDAY PRESIDENT REAGAN! | ON A PERSONAL NOTE I am honored to serve you as the new Congressman for the 16th District of Illinois. During my time in Congress, I have been proud to stand up for our Midwest conservative values, fighting for lower taxes, supporting law enforcement, backing Illinois farmers, standing up to China, and advocating for parents’ rights. Americans sent a Republican majority to Congress to place a check on the Biden Administration, reduce inflation, curb violent crime, and secure the border. As this Congress begins, I will continue to keep regularly updated on how I am working to serve our district and the accomplishments of House Republicans in 2023. \- Congressman Darin LaHood | Until Next Time, Team LaHood | | | What to help fuel Darin's fight against the radical left? name: Maggie Hassan
subject: campaign bills are due and I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
Can I count on your help today?
| | |
---
_Hi – GOP spending against us SKYROCKETED in the last few weeks of the campaign. Polls tightened to within a point or two, and pundits doubted whether we could win. In order to win, my (victorious!) campaign took on a bit of debt and now we have a bit of a hole to fill to get our last bills paid.**[Before I go on, will you please donate $3 or as much as you can to help close the gap?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58498448/391295063/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2206-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzM3OTllZS1hYmE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jp08GPmHb3VcArhvitGyCzuz1tkcgB0X2Cg_qZAK1Qg=)**_
|
---
Look – in the final days of the 2022 election, pundits were seriously doubting whether we could pull off a win in the Granite State.

GOP spending against us SKYROCKETED. Polls tightened to within a point or two. Outside spending was through the roof.

My team put our heads down and focused on making the final advertising investments necessary to win. We were making quick decisions with the information we had, hoping that the additional funding we needed would come through.

Despite our best efforts, the necessary funding _didn’t_ come through and now my campaign has some debt to make up to pay the last of our bills. We made a pretty good dent in it the last few weeks, but we’ve still got a little more to go. Since you’re one of my most important supporters, I’m hoping that I can count on you to help:

**[Will you please donate $3 or as much as you can to help us retire our debt? I’d be grateful for anything you can give, and it’ll really help me focus on legislating (not fundraising!).](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58498449/391295065/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2206-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzM3OTllZS1hYmE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jp08GPmHb3VcArhvitGyCzuz1tkcgB0X2Cg_qZAK1Qg=)**

I’m proud of you and our campaign team and the work we did together. Now, we just have to finish this thing off once and for all.

If you’re able to help, you can donate here: **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_email_mw](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58498450/391295066/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk2206-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzM3OTllZS1hYmE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jp08GPmHb3VcArhvitGyCzuz1tkcgB0X2Cg_qZAK1Qg=)**

Thank you for your help.

With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
| If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, **[donate now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58498451/391295067/-1829049351?refcode=email-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNzM3OTllZS1hYmE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jp08GPmHb3VcArhvitGyCzuz1tkcgB0X2Cg_qZAK1Qg=)**. name: Ron Wyden
subject: Building on progress
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58498862/391296734/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTU1YjdkMC1hY2E4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R0TK0GWZHqM_n1NDSJpU9LdNi9UEe4o1xoT7lS0nkmo=&emci=e937fbb0-a6a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=e555b7d0-aca8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=9818364)

| | As we reflect on the state of our union, we must remember to celebrate our victories and recognize the important work that remains. Democrats promised big, bold action on the challenges facing American families. I'm proud that we've made great progress on clean energy, prescription drug costs, infrastructure, and much more. Democrats have **lowered prescription drug costs for seniors** , provided badly-needed**funding to the IRS** , and passed historic **investments in clean energy** – providing new jobs and securing a clean energy future. We **protected the right to marriage equality** for all, defending our LGTBQ+ community members, no matter what the Supreme Court does. **I'm grateful for our grassroots movement, which made all of this possible, but our work isn't done yet. There is more to be done to build on our progress in 2023 and beyond.** That includes the fight to guarantee every American **paid leave** so that families and workers are no longer forced to make impossible choices. We need to close tax loopholes and **finally ensure that billionaires pay their fair share** in taxes. For too long, hard-working Americans have dutifully paid taxes out of each paycheck, while billionaires don't pay a dime. We must **strengthen data privacy**. Protecting Americans' personal data – especially in the wake of the overturning of _Roe v. Wade –_ must remain a top priority, so we can safeguard data from being misused and abused. We must **tackle the mental health crisis** head-on by providing additional support and enhancing mental health care coverage. Our nation's young people and veterans are particularly vulnerable, and as a nation, we must do better when it comes to mental health. **I know that Republican obstructionism will make it difficult to achieve these goals – but not impossible. These are priorities worth fighting for, and I'm all in to get it done. Know that I will continue to stand tall for Oregonians in the Senate and fight for what really matters.** [**Will you join me in the fight?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58498863/391296735/-2044921950?refcode=2023-02-09-sotu&recurring=0&amount=4&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=e555b7d0-aca8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNTU1YjdkMC1hY2E4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R0TK0GWZHqM_n1NDSJpU9LdNi9UEe4o1xoT7lS0nkmo=) clean_body: | | | | As we reflect on the state of our union, we must remember to celebrate our victories and recognize the important work that remains. Democrats promised big, bold action on the challenges facing American families. I'm proud that we've made great progress on clean energy, prescription drug costs, infrastructure, and much more. Democrats have lowered prescription drug costs for seniors , provided badly-neededfunding to the IRS , and passed historic investments in clean energy – providing new jobs and securing a clean energy future. We protected the right to marriage equality for all, defending our LGTBQ+ community members, no matter what the Supreme Court does. I'm grateful for our grassroots movement, which made all of this possible, but our work isn't done yet. There is more to be done to build on our progress in 2023 and beyond. That includes the fight to guarantee every American paid leave so that families and workers are no longer forced to make impossible choices. We need to close tax loopholes and finally ensure that billionaires pay their fair share in taxes. For too long, hard-working Americans have dutifully paid taxes out of each paycheck, while billionaires don't pay a dime. We must strengthen data privacy. Protecting Americans' personal data – especially in the wake of the overturning of Roe v. Wade – must remain a top priority, so we can safeguard data from being misused and abused. We must tackle the mental health crisis head-on by providing additional support and enhancing mental health care coverage. Our nation's young people and veterans are particularly vulnerable, and as a nation, we must do better when it comes to mental health. I know that Republican obstructionism will make it difficult to achieve these goals – but not impossible. These are priorities worth fighting for, and I'm all in to get it done. Know that I will continue to stand tall for Oregonians in the Senate and fight for what really matters. = Ron | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. [**Survey: Do you trust Democrats to tell the truth -> **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=a39feb401b834ef3b443dd2781e4f69c&_e=wAMk5E8wQogrPW9hmlcwzvq4OIqUf3gm9WxSaW-Y-3XFbDJhBXPymdGeXH_NRPEX6iZpz2KU5WzpJ7E9NW2-3zm5_9tKc0nMVF61lXQW1PhaSXmK8XcX0EQnqBRATrSBJjepRFQfvOdhaAnsTAMSs1fuJV29SO7MXo03rRsVw6riVjAa3xM6zaaPyWHmccQa00-DvOvSxOIR2lVl2iZu3ypZf59ITgPrhFu4-8Z5fvNyMzUfny5KxRrupFzHplcRYuEaWT1UdmVnkj17lIxm4TZJmrOaicG8C_wlg6qLPxIoqtV4f-m-olHXkP7GlvMvLSAKlwU7QMksBKZUzR7-FIXX9k1aOKYoUuxkL5Qy1oaotRd4jGA7xjvLcgoLDLN2Tbtwdt11olJsWn0SXU96bHyHqaM6-20dNqwyLJoOhw7BC0llwty8lIM5UgJIfRtaqYJGbJ9OMHiK6fKV6P1C7mb2uUzrzHMY9-Jlhr9j8Bs%3D)
Fellow Conservative,

President Biden’s speech to Congress was disappointing, dangerous, and at times, downright _bizarre_.

I hate to break the bad news to him, but 70% of Americans believe our country is headed in the wrong direction. They believe the economy is weak, that energy prices are too high, and the federal government wastes the hard-earned tax money they send to Washington.

They believe Biden’s open border has contributed to a dangerous increase in crime, and that for the past two years, America has projected an image of weakness to the world when we should be projecting strength and leadership.

Contrast that reality with what we heard in Biden’s speech, where he had the nerve to say the economy was booming, the border was secure, and he was standing up to China.

Really? Does he define “standing up to China” as letting a Chinese spy balloon hover over American military assets for only a week, instead of a month?

If Biden and the Democrats had a record to run on, they would! But they don’t, so instead they dodge, distract, and deceive...and hope the mainstream media lets them get away with it.

What you won’t hear from the mainstream media are the crazy policies they DO support, like:

* letting biological boys compete against girls in sports
* believing men can get pregnant
* open borders, and
* sending free money to able-bodied people who don’t work, while defunding the police who put their lives on the line every day to protect us

They’re hiding their real agenda, but I’m glad to say our House Republican majority is stepping up to stop it.

**[What I’m very curious to know – and why I’m emailing you today – is to find out whether you trust the government. clean_body: President Biden’s speech to Congress was disappointing, dangerous, and at times, downright bizarre. | | Fellow Conservative, President Biden’s speech to Congress was disappointing, dangerous, and at times, downright bizarre. I hate to break the bad news to him, but 70% of Americans believe our country is headed in the wrong direction. They believe the economy is weak, that energy prices are too high, and the federal government wastes the hard-earned tax money they send to Washington. They believe Biden’s open border has contributed to a dangerous increase in crime, and that for the past two years, America has projected an image of weakness to the world when we should be projecting strength and leadership. Contrast that reality with what we heard in Biden’s speech, where he had the nerve to say the economy was booming, the border was secure, and he was standing up to China. Really? Does he define “standing up to China” as letting a Chinese spy balloon hover over American military assets for only a week, instead of a month? If Biden and the Democrats had a record to run on, they would! But they don’t, so instead they dodge, distract, and deceive...and hope the mainstream media lets them get away with it. What you won’t hear from the mainstream media are the crazy policies they DO support, like: letting biological boys compete against girls in sports believing men can get pregnant open borders, and sending free money to able-bodied people who don’t work, while defunding the police who put their lives on the line every day to protect us They’re hiding their real agenda, but I’m glad to say our House Republican majority is stepping up to stop it. I’m worried that we could be losing support for our movement. My team tells me that folks aren’t opening our emails as often as they once did or even engaging with the content we send. I implore you to remain involved. God Bless, Jim Jordan About Jim Jordan: | Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable. name: Hendrell Remus
subject: Short email, I promise
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee Democratic Party
body:
Hey Peter - I needed to reach out again so I’m writing this quick email to you.
We are off to a good start in our 2023 fundraising, but we're still behind our goal. Defeating Marsha and breaking up the Republican supermajority in the legislature are crucial goals in 2024, but we've got to have strong numbers to get over the finish line.

We need a boost, so we've set a goal of reaching $5,000 by midnight tonight. Can you donate $25, $10, or even just $5 to help us get there?

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndemocraticparty

Together, we will create a better Tennessee for all.

Thank you,

Hendrell Remus
Chair
he/him

name: Jason Miyares
subject: the stark reality behind 100K deaths
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
This is a crisis and it needs to be treated as such. | | | [](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=399a5b1c3b0b42b1954cd8245846deb1&_e=T7SW8-khfCeaEoDp3P58AFulLvGyxKYBbcuDqbPOvKx7OdDCJ8wDBZ_XyPxDwN9TUnED67AUtgSB9GQegcjOrLt17UDOhZ2ilBhxXSwL0Mx7_6mEC3KxuezNWP7cx1uMQXP34llarQMyMEVlt3T0aVCW4HuiJyp0rtPnTZ7vkixzMsevpQ1yoh-TU7VUxCHgsgbu_rZ6W4H2BXdu81o4rM8bAkjAGNMK7Mojb1pKkT15FM0oJQe1YZMWT5iThjM_ZaTUSMmaOVPYGouJL17ITGPfvVwvrpPNh7Zdsi6wdqA%3D)
---
Friend, Over the past year, more than **100,000 Americans died** due to drug overdoses, with _66% of those deaths_ related to synthetic opioids like fentanyl. In the Commonwealth alone, fentanyl-related deaths have skyrocketed 40% since 2021. _And all of this stems back to Mexican drug cartels trafficking fentanyl over our southern border. _ **Friend, this is a CRISIS, and it needs to be treated as such.** We need to provide law enforcement agencies with every tool available to fight against this public health and national security crisis, which starts with the important first step of designating drug cartels as Foreign Terrorist Organizations. __But that’s something only President Biden can do.__ **My job is to protect the people of Virginia, which is why I’m leading a coalition of 21 Attorneys General calling on the Biden administration to designate cartels as Foreign Terrorist Organizations.**
---
[**READ THE LETTER**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=399a5b1c3b0b42b1954cd8245846deb1&_e=T7SW8-khfCeaEoDp3P58AFulLvGyxKYBbcuDqbPOvKx7OdDCJ8wDBZ_XyPxDwN9TUnED67AUtgSB9GQegcjOrLt17UDOhZ2ilBhxXSwL0Mx7_6mEC3KxuezNWP7cx1uMQXP34llarQMyMEVlt3T0aVZrwSq-fTOwaTN3FL_Kp4y4TPve2epQHmWdaUv9BtadA7ytLJl11lX9Uqr7JLQIyAeEYYP1X_K13-a4iCQNRLTbBQtbnIsGfWkdbIgCAgD0caCqyfE_ekkbYhREMxonO3g9GCW3dtjRVGpMSU6aRl4%3D)
---
I hope President Biden will see this the same way we do. All the best,Jason Miyares
---

---
[](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=399a5b1c3b0b42b1954cd8245846deb1&_e=T7SW8-khfCeaEoDp3P58AIMqEkfr_DsyauQBSSiydkMN0AYi120sSoRMQoBLiMFpcgqqU1bjvHDowt9BDpug5PLwM3oO9vFxYaPEfGERO1gvfVdSKTwEQzbwkHZAq8BtfCCuWC9eDoVPGqraHnUZSjOOQWWMzPj7tALEEck17mD2hhdeQE7_SQfXlZOI07HpPUQ83sI8tviec7IHXvW44tU4_hMFMv2ArXPaIw6Vma2o5qC8rQli0I_Jw8BSQARx)
---
50 years ago, my mother escaped Cuba and Fidel Castro’s socialist regime with just the clothes on her back. By the grace of God, she overcame unimaginable odds to become an American. Because of her courage, I went to school, became a prosecutor, served in the Virginia House of Delegates, and made history by becoming Virginia’s first Latino-American Attorney General. **Now, the radical socialist ideas my mother escaped in Cuba are uprooting our laws and freedoms, but I will never stop fighting to protect the American Dream.**
---
[**FIGHT FOR THE AMERICAN DREAM**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=399a5b1c3b0b42b1954cd8245846deb1&_e=T7SW8-khfCeaEoDp3P58AIMqEkfr_DsyauQBSSiydkMN0AYi120sSoRMQoBLiMFpcgqqU1bjvHDowt9BDpug5PLwM3oO9vFxYaPEfGERO1hs8g4EMkvetRv-GUkxEoRFcEqXXGougD4TDSTRj2PQ9cgzT2d4MY3vEKdd0TaZX1jTwF8x48oydch9pmrp2EECgXXDe2HQUn53g9g8GqEWL6ilIHkHDrEg8HrbajmBWW-wbBHlOH89wLBK3IVQGH6w)

Hi friend, it's Congresswoman Yadira Caraveo. I wanted to share a little bit about my story, and why I’m in this fight. [**I hope you’ll take a moment to read this message, but if you’re already with me, will you split a donation between my campaign and Michael Bennet?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58502972/391299348/-553819468?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20230209_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2Y4YTQzNC1iMWE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J1AxpdE9SqyhDCHcpQ5D8iGPCH2X-sIZzECmRBsUP7g=) **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58502973/391299349/-553819468?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20230209_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2Y4YTQzNC1iMWE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J1AxpdE9SqyhDCHcpQ5D8iGPCH2X-sIZzECmRBsUP7g=)****Family means everything to me.** My parents came to Colorado from a small town in Mexico, looking for a better life. They knew that hard work and caring for others are the values that build strong communities and family. They raised me and my siblings with those values — on a construction worker’s pay in the Adams County home they still live in. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58502974/391299350/-553819468?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20230209_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2Y4YTQzNC1iMWE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J1AxpdE9SqyhDCHcpQ5D8iGPCH2X-sIZzECmRBsUP7g=)****I put myself through undergrad and medical school, becoming the first person in my family to graduate from college.** But even before I finished my medical training, advocacy became an important part of my life. I helped organize my fellow medical residents for better working conditions, and became a union representative with SEIU. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58502975/391299351/-553819468?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20230209_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2Y4YTQzNC1iMWE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J1AxpdE9SqyhDCHcpQ5D8iGPCH2X-sIZzECmRBsUP7g=)** I chose to be a pediatrician in Adams County to give back to my community – to the folks that raised me. **But I quickly understood that truly helping children required a lot more than what I was able to do as a doctor.** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58502976/391299352/-553819468?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_TAN_AC_20230209_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Y2Y4YTQzNC1iMWE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J1AxpdE9SqyhDCHcpQ5D8iGPCH2X-sIZzECmRBsUP7g=)****That’s why I ran for the state legislature.** In that time, I worked to pass legislation to force drug companies to lower the cost of prescriptions, expand funding for preschool, ensure all Coloradans have access to paid family leave and sick days, and protect renters from eviction during the pandemic. **And**********,** that’s why I’m running for re-election to Congress in 2024. **I promise you that I will continue my commitment to the families I see every day in Colorado. I will build on my work to lower health care costs, address the high cost of living, and protect a woman’s right to choose. [**I will continue this fight in Washington, but I can’t get there alone. subject: The fight isn’t over. The fight has only just begun.

| |

| | Friend, **The fight isn’t over. The fight has only just begun. ** As we welcome the Republican controlled house, we undertake an era of divided government. The Democratic rule is officially over, and house Republicans have promised to hold the out-of-touch Democrats accountable by launching major investigations. YET, this won’t stop the Democratic-controlled Senate from taking advantage of their majority and passing restrictive gun bills that harm law-abiding gun owners like **YOU** – as they continue to do nothing to prevent the rising crime rates facing our major cities.

This is why 2A Task Force was created, to protect our constitutional rights and to stop the Democrats that are hell-bent on taking away our freedoms. The Second Amendment ensures that we can keep our communities and the ones we love safe from harm, but also protects us from tyrants using the power of government to take away our liberties. There are now actual checks and balances, but it's not an excuse to **STOP** building an army of 2A Task Force warriors, who are devoted to ensuring that Senate Democrats fail to disarm American citizens. What do you say, Friend? Join the fight and support 2A Task Force.

The Democratic rule is officially over, and house Republicans have promised to hold the out-of-touch Democrats accountable by launching major investigations. YET, this won’t stop the Democratic-controlled Senate from taking advantage of their majority and passing restrictive gun bills that harm law-abiding gun owners like YOU – as they continue to do nothing to prevent the rising crime rates facing our major cities. | | This is why 2A Task Force was created, to protect our constitutional rights and to stop the Democrats that are hell-bent on taking away our freedoms. The Second Amendment ensures that we can keep our communities and the ones we love safe from harm, but also protects us from tyrants using the power of government to take away our liberties. There are now actual checks and balances, but it's not an excuse to STOP building an army of 2A Task Force warriors, who are devoted to ensuring that Senate Democrats fail to disarm American citizens. What do you say, Friend? Join the fight and support 2A Task Force. | | | Paid for by 2nd Amendment Task Force

name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: BREAKING: Bill Introduced to Allow Illegal Aliens to Vote in Illinois School Board Elections
body:
The school board elections on April 4, 2023 may be open to more than just registered citizens in Illinois. Democrats want illegal aliens to vote.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/ea7920dcc9ec/breaking-bill-introduced-to-allow-illegal-aliens-to-vote-in-illinois-school-board-elections?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b38c98b8a7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_09_07_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b38c98b8a7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b38c98b8a7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_09_07_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b38c98b8a7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

BREAKING: IL Democratic State Senator Introduces Bill to Allow Illegal Aliens to Vote in School Board Elections (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/breaking-il-democratic-state-senator-introduces-bill-to-allow-illegal-aliens-to-vote-in-school-board-elections.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b38c98b8a7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_09_07_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b38c98b8a7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

Earlier this week, Illinois Democratic State Sen. Celina Villanueva, Dist. 12, introduced legislation to allow “non-citizens of the United States” to register (https://www.ilga.gov/legislation/BillStatus.asp?DocNum=1345&GAID=17&DocTypeID=SB&LegID=145645&SessionID=112&SpecSess=&Session=&GA=103&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b38c98b8a7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_09_07_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b38c98b8a7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) to vote in school board elections. The Democrats maintain a comfortable supermajority in the state Senate, 40-19.
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/breaking-il-democratic-state-senator-introduces-bill-to-allow-illegal-aliens-to-vote-in-school-board-elections.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b38c98b8a7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_09_07_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b38c98b8a7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

The legislation was referred to the Assignments Committee where it will be reviewed – and if the committee decides to proceed with the bill, it will then be assigned to a specific committee.

The Democrats have a 4-2 majority on the Assignment Committee and the committee is chaired by Senate Majority Leader
Kimberly Lightford (https://www.ilga.gov/senate/Senator.asp?MemberID=3023&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b38c98b8a7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_09_07_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b38c98b8a7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , D.

The legislation states,

“The State Board of Education shall create a voter registration affidavit that shall be the exclusive means by which a noncitizen of the United States may register to vote in school board elections.”
https://www.ilga.gov/legislation/BillStatus.asp?DocNum=1345&GAID=17&DocTypeID=SB&LegId=145645&SessionID=112&GA=103&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b38c98b8a7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_09_07_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b38c98b8a7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
The Illinois General Assembly has introduced legislation to allow illegal aliens to vote in school board races. Source: Illinois General Assembly website

Villanueva cites the Illinois Constitution, Article III, Section 1 – that school board races are considered “non-State elections” and therefore they are not subject to a “citizenship requirement.”

On Tuesday, Gov. JB Pritzker went on the attack against conservative grassroots groups and school board candidates during a press conference.

“There are organizations that are anti-LGBTQ, that are racist, that are anti-Muslim, that are supporting candidates for these local [school] boards, and they’re trying to take over at a local level and build up candidates at the local level that they can then run for the state legislature.”
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=5FPkUhtMAs0&t=3s&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b38c98b8a7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_09_07_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b38c98b8a7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
IL Gov. JB Pritzker attacks conservative grassroots organizations and school board candidates during a press conference on Feb. 7.

Pritzker then ended his attacks by stating that,

“We are supporting candidates that are standing up for freedom.”

A quick glance at his record over the last two years – how he’s abused his executive power, forced children to wear masks in schools, shut down our economy during the pandemic – proves that he is for anything but freedom.

The school board elections will be on April 4, 2023.
https://youtu.be/bt8KBGMpxjI?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b38c98b8a7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_09_07_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b38c98b8a7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Awake IL Founder and President Shannon Adcock joined Mark Vargas on “Mark My Words with Mark Vargas” on AM 560 The Answer to discuss the upcoming school board elections and the challenges facing conservative candidates (Feb. 6, 2023).
https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=b38c98b8a7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_02_09_07_21&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-b38c98b8a7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

name: Team Schrier
subject: [POLL] Do you support Republicans' proposed 30% national sales tax?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Last month, Republicans introduced their plan to cut taxes for corporations and the ultra-wealthy – and it's at the expense of hard working Americans. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58507589/391303137/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGJmNTU1MC1iNGE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fovufk-DNn3XnztuUUN9HqTQH0KkgirrSL8g1dvJE9I=&emci=164a63db-04a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=74bf5550-b4a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)

Peter,

Last month, some extreme House Republicans introduced their plan to cut taxes for corporations and the ultra-wealthy, abolish the IRS, and potentially slash Social Security and Medicare.

Have you heard how they want to pay for it?

**They introduced the "Fair Tax Act of 2023," which would implement a _30% national sales tax_. If passed into law, everything from gas to groceries would rise in price. **

This bill would dramatically raise taxes for 90% of Americans. That's unacceptable.

With Washingtonians and people across the country already feeling the pinch, we can't afford this outrageous sales tax. That's why Kim is fighting back against this legislation and standing up for Washingtonians – not corporations. But now, she wants to hear from you.

**[Do you support the Republicans' plan to create a 30% national sales tax?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58507591/391303138/513899270?ms=em23_230209_tax_engg_gq_act___ts_ettx&refcode=em23_230209_tax_engg_gq_act___ts_ettx&source=em23_230209_tax_engg_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230209_tax_engg_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=Iel0LGGJ3MMLvZOe6hvx/oWd8WUqA79aQXr2P4/46p4m+BtQKYCqD2kFx6e/ysPBYbEB/I1WdtqCUTXVj6jSjTqqPKh8fWz7YldBs+BdASpV49GD39Bm3wGONt340cpV56ZMIaecOUAMac7Bsb/YkHwFdq3ZMYW3Mui+LTgCFPQ=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGJmNTU1MC1iNGE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fovufk-DNn3XnztuUUN9HqTQH0KkgirrSL8g1dvJE9I=&emci=164a63db-04a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=74bf5550-b4a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)** | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58507594/391303139/513899270?ms=em23_230209_tax_engg_gq_act___ts_ettx&refcode=em23_230209_tax_engg_gq_act___ts_ettx&source=em23_230209_tax_engg_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230209_tax_engg_gq_act___ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=Iel0LGGJ3MMLvZOe6hvx/oWd8WUqA79aQXr2P4/46p4m+BtQKYCqD2kFx6e/ysPBYbEB/I1WdtqCUTXVj6jSjTqqPKh8fWz7YldBs+BdASpV49GD39Bm3wGONt340cpV56ZMIaecOUAMac7Bsb/YkHwFdq3ZMYW3Mui+LTgCFPQ=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGJmNTU1MC1iNGE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Fovufk-DNn3XnztuUUN9HqTQH0KkgirrSL8g1dvJE9I=&emci=164a63db-04a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=74bf5550-b4a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=15820338)

name: WFP Election Alert
subject: Brandon Johnson has the momentum
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Did you see the latest out of Chicago, Peter? **According to a new poll, Brandon Johnson, who received the WFP endorsement in his bid for Chicago Mayor — is currently ahead of the incumbent Lori Lightfoot!** [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zfh-ljwx9RuYYFFGz5HiYUovYnQm02wWYH14ihv8eja_egpz1ThKgRKr8ylWkDVXCR4fJ5-HM4-uRXQ7fAPVsDnQ9p4nSNhte1PfPJueQm3MaV5uYruOjKexUy5zTOjuo6P8HXXzZFnBpyFsznNIfFY68AxhYAfDHqolyBCxYq1bUeKbE_iPvZaqwe6R0FXkgq0XX3gdfHQWRaT00GMUJW555eQ1XiTqu8-9lwVmVQKV26ZL0BpAROLHBKMyy_fmJSNX7kmu2F3u4zxgg6kesUfxrZxsHyOf6mwLJrUFny9shncBMkI7HJsCq-hoqRcMo96G1-hEuayrafWdQAQT58Cal5A3-OPRyZXu9vb2omoIh3YH3OWaTp3wlleeZsCbl1VfYi1TfVX2jJdw9KA-30zeATSVNz0RgT46s8W3228eBcuwT4L4yuNQWw5oYxXh4/3tk/rfvp6ch7T1ulSLSDiEm9BQ/h0/Ee55QdP45oHvSYG46Bbrad201VAFp6M6wvF8dHCh09U) With the mayoral election just 19 days away, Brandon needs to get in first or second place to proceed to an expected runoff. And this latest poll shows that anyone can win. But in order to defeat Lori Lightfoot and the police union’s darling Paul Vallas, he’ll need support from grassroots supporters like you, Peter, so he can reach critical voters ahead of Election Day. **[Will you chip in $10 to push Brandon over the edge? But in order to defeat Lori Lightfoot and the police union’s darling Paul Vallas, he’ll need support from grassroots supporters like you, Peter, so he can reach critical voters ahead of Election Day. When it comes to the top issues facing Chicago voters — public safety, housing, and education — Brandon is lightyears ahead of Lightfoot. Despite promising to invest in our neighborhood schools, reopen mental health centers, and tax the rich to fund affordable housing, Lightfoot has flip-flopped on nearly every campaign promise she’s made. 1 Since becoming Mayor, she’s been at war with the Chicago Teachers Union over class sizes, COVID precautions, and teachers’ pay. And she spent much-needed federal COVID relief money on increasing police funding instead of investing in community health. This stands in stark contrast to former public school teacher, union organizer, and current Cook County Commissioner Brandon Johnson, who: Secured $75 million in violence prevention funding for the West Side of Chicago, Passed Medicare for All legislation to provide health care coverage for 40,000 additional Cook County residents, And was instrumental in organizing the 2019 Chicago Teachers Union strike to increase funding for Chicago public schools. With Lightfoot’s approval ratings hovering in the mid 20s, it’s clear that the people of Chicago are ready for change. name: Dick Durbin
subject: What the President had to say Tuesday night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
It’s time to finish the job.
#
Peter,
On Tuesday night, I joined my colleagues, our guests, and many others at President Biden’s annual State of the Union address.
In reflecting on the successes of the past two years, President Biden highlighted what we accomplished and our goals for the future – as well as exactly how we can work together to achieve them.
To maintain the strongest economy in the world, we need the strongest infrastructure in the world. Currently, the United States isn’t even in the top 10. **It’s time to finish the job.** We must continue passing historic legislation like the _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act_ to build a stronger future.
**[Can you chip in $5 so we can continue delivering results that matter to the American people?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58508504/391305521/1250877347?refcode=dd_em_230209_1_t1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWUwYjFmZi1iNGE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kF2P4-dpHxmTwmKb_AELYgCdhDKwusnELZuPW9ZW2Dg=)**
We’ve come a long way in the past two years, from historic investments in our national infrastructure, to tackling climate change, to ensuring the right to marriage equality.
**But we still have work to do.** Democrats are fighting to extend the cap on insulin prices to cover every American. We are working to codify _Roe v. Wade_ and restore the right to the full range of reproductive care. And we need an assault weapons ban, universal background checks, and red flag laws to ensure the safety of our families.
It’s past time to finish the job – and I know that together, we can.
**[I hope you’ll join me in this fight by chipping in right now – with your support, we’ll continue fighting to build a brighter future for our country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58508505/391305522/1250877347?refcode=dd_em_230209_1_t1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWUwYjFmZi1iNGE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kF2P4-dpHxmTwmKb_AELYgCdhDKwusnELZuPW9ZW2Dg=)**
My best,
Dick Durbin

clean_body: It’s time to finish the job. Peter, On Tuesday night, I joined my colleagues, our guests, and many others at President Biden’s annual State of the Union address. In reflecting on the successes of the past two years, President Biden highlighted what we accomplished and our goals for the future – as well as exactly how we can work together to achieve them. To maintain the strongest economy in the world, we need the strongest infrastructure in the world. Currently, the United States isn’t even in the top 10. It’s time to finish the job. We must continue passing historic legislation like the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act to build a stronger future. = We’ve come a long way in the past two years, from historic investments in our national infrastructure, to tackling climate change, to ensuring the right to marriage equality. But we still have work to do. Democrats are fighting to extend the cap on insulin prices to cover every American. We are working to codify Roe v. Wade and restore the right to the full range of reproductive care. And we need an assault weapons ban, universal background checks, and red flag laws to ensure the safety of our families. It’s past time to finish the job – and I know that together, we can. = My best, Dick Durbin ** **** ****=**** Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin

name: Adam Schiff
subject: re: Elon’s Twitter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=1772%2E5257348%2EtaurG8 ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, people who have power are obsessed with keeping it. The
more they are threatened, the more aggressively they lash out.

Just like Kevin McCarthy and the man liking his tweet, Elon Musk:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=feb2023_abs_em.QMw6L4&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230209_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=1772%2E5257348%2EtaurG8 ]Elon Musk liked Kevin McCarthy @SpeakerMcCarthy I have rejected the
appointments of Adam Schiff and Eric Swalwell for the House Intelligence
Committee. I am committed to returning the @HouseIntel Committee to one of
genuine honesty and credibility that regains the trust of the American people.

They hate the scrutiny. They would rather go about their business in the
dark — where basic principles like oversight and accountability, in
government and business, wither and die.

Well I won’t let Kevin McCarthy stop me from doing my job, or let
billionaires like Donald Trump and Elon Musk get a pass.

Our democracy is at risk because people like McCarthy have forgotten what
their oath of office means. Others like Trump never cared about any oath
or fealty to the Constitution. And Elon Musk seems all too intoxicated by
the power of his wealth to remember that it was his workforce and the
opportunities this country provides that made it possible.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=feb2023_abs_em.QMw6L4&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230209_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=1772%2E5257348%2EtaurG8 ]If you agree that accountability should ALWAYS be a top priority in
Congress, then chip in $10 to this fight. Because you and I are going to
hold Kevin McCarthy accountable no matter what Elon Musk or any other
right-wing billionaire wants.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: The problem with our politics
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

In the six years we’ve been fighting to transform our political system,
we’ve helped elect working class, progressive champions to form the Squad.
We’ve won against some of the most powerful, entrenched, corporate-backed
Democratic incumbents Congress. And we’ve made more than a few enemies
doing it.

In 2018, the DCCC blacklisted us for daring to challenge their authority
on behalf of the people they’re supposed to represent.

In 2022, far-right, warhawk groups like AIPAC drowned our candidates in
millions for daring to speak up for Palestinian human rights.

This week, GOP Speaker Kevin McCarthy unseated Squad member Ilhan Omar
from the Foreign Affairs Committee for daring to interrogate human rights
abuses as a Black, Muslim woman.

Peter, the
political establishment has thrown everything they have at us.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/126765?refcode=em20230209-27446&t=1001&akid=27446%2E1203867%2EGmekBH ]We’re not going anywhere. But to keep fighting against the power of
entrenched corporate Democrats, far-right Super PACs, and extremist
Republicans, we need support from our grassroots base. Can you chip in
$3 today?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/126765?refcode=em20230209-27446&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=27446%2E1203867%2EGmekBH ]Contribute $3

The very people and organizations who made a point to single out Justice
Democrats are working on behalf of interests that actively undermine our
democracy and hurt our communities.

Former DCCC Chair Cheri Bustos, who oversaw the blacklist against JD and
groups like us, has joined a firm that profits from clients in defense,
pharma, and big oil. Under her leadership, the Democratic establishment
outlawed us, smearing us as divisive and problematic. But at least we know
that our number one priority is the people — not corporate special
interests.

AIPAC and its Democratic Majority for Israel PAC dropped millions of
dollars against our candidates, including new Squad member Summer Lee.
They attacked a working class Black woman as being not a “real” Democrat,
while endorsing over one hundred election-denying MAGA extremists.

Kevin McCarthy and his Republican cronies have targeted Ilhan Omar because
she threatens their far-right foreign policy and the interests of the
military-industrial complex. They’ve removed Ilhan from her committee
because they couldn’t stand to see a progressive, Black, Muslim woman in a
position of power.

Justice Democrats actually stand for something — which means we’re a
threat to the system. It’s the grassroots movement behind us that keeps us
going, so we can take on the establishment again and again.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/126765?refcode=em20230209-27446&t=1021&akid=27446%2E1203867%2EGmekBH ]We’re relying on your donations to power our work this
cycle, Peter.
Can we count on your $3 contribution today?

Thank you so much for your support,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230209-27446-footer&t=1022&refcode2=27446_1203867_GmekBH&akid=27446%2E1203867%2EGmekBH

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=27446%2E1203867%2EGmekBH

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

To win again, we need to build the strongest grassroots movement possible – as early as possible – and we're counting on people like you to help us hit the ground running. That's why we're asking 10,000 top Democrats to activate their Blue Nevada Membership before our crucial midnight deadline. But with only a few hours left, we're still falling short of our goal – so please, friend: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Team Rosen | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. **I grew up the son of hardworking farmworkers.**

In order to afford the cost of college, I walked in the desert heat to different businesses asking them to invest in our community by investing in me.

And I made a promise to those businesses I would come back to the Coachella Valley to serve our community as a physician. **I can’t imagine where I would be if my family or my community didn’t have my back.**

**But I’m worried.** National Republicans are threatening to slam the door shut on the American Dream that uplifts communities like mine.

Their plans to upend crucial student debt relief, implement a 30% national sales tax, and give handouts to the wealthy will make it near-impossible for hard working Americans to get by, much less go beyond their station in life.

**This isn’t an accident, friend. It’s a policy choice.**

It happens when National Republicans would rather work for high dollar donors and corporate Super PACs than their own communities. It happens when they bail out the mega-rich at the expense of hardworking people like my parents.

**I’m sick of it.** I’ve spent my life seeing the people of my community be left out and overlooked by people in power. And I’ve spent my career as an emergency physician and in public service fighting to change that.

[**But I need your help, folks. Together we can defeat the National GOP agenda that aims to shred the American Dream and our best line of defense is our grassroots team. Can you pitch in $10 (or anything you can afford today) toward our 1,000 donation goal today and help strengthen our Democratic agenda?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/4PfL751D8g4IfLXFw3QfXV5Wo_6TP_ujTmJFoO05AE3qXXBxga9GlnVdvLc2VObKISx9q3hczezXKIybUDoad5yVaA_CImPVuTdzGTYQn8f0bEpl1ylhzbQNCFjgZwH4TKrq3PfmPb-oCTNq22lHmBjHO14Fm048dCJ093UZcI7b39MSaBUa5Ma5XsNDCjDyJV9y6l_AJE1IEb3v9l2qb1mjjEpEhhThx0muovnBk8Y63zkCS7rr2ZJGXP_PWdKDpkUTXi8JlBVQ52YQCECZ2E5VY5wpfuyi6iMtldQ-eoUQNZMsmn15ppaJwOhhT3zqu1v42IjTG-iTCNx6qvioLbfssRt62Z8Aybk_xsRIpZBtG6b5kcwbqtZ-gajxPCz-6_daPGwceJsh7KWn7vcmw_D2Hla0_83F3bqYpmh26jlPDLEzTEnkA5pKgv05WDtU/3tk/MSPycA_0QdKbLhYT2X4axg/h5/jxgmzErrM6CnSIoLJ3y2NWkNz0vFA2ault00tX6vK6E)****

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: With a heavy heart
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | | I write to you with a heavy heart. Not sure if you saw my briefing Tuesday night - but I'll be blunt. I come bearing some bad news:

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Rick Scott is still coming for Medicare and Social Security, and we need to get this malevolent fraudster out of our Senate.
body:
Anyone But Rick Scott 2024
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1242c888-24cc-466a-80ef-94948a6c9497/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **_Rick Scott already came for Medicare. Now he's coming for our Medicare & Social Security._** [**_Donate now: Anyone But Rick Scott For Florida 2024_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2ecb4eb7-8cc1-45aa-9c95-fa0f119b9bb7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _There was a lot of booing from Republicans during the State of the Union, when Joe Biden rightfully shared their plans--specifically Rick Scott's plan, which he's discussed, committed to paper and tweeted--to sunset Social Security & Medicare every five years._ ** In Other Words: To End Them. ** **_Scott oversaw the largest case of Medicare fraud in U.S history. When he was CEO of Columbia/HCA hospitals they got a $1.7 billion fine._****_ His company robbed the American people of funding for our healthcare. Then, i_**** _n the civil trial, he took the 5th Amendment a ridiculous 75 times, _****and** _** parlayed his ill-begotten wealth into a political career. **It's stomach-turning._ _**Now Scott wants to take our Social Security & Medicare, using the GOP sunset trick. It's how they make programs disappear they lack the courage to demolish.** __In 1994, to get Republicans to support an assault weapons ban, President Clinton agreed to a 10-year sunset. When 2004 arrived, George W. Bush was President, and this life-saving law just went away. How many have suffered and died because of it?_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T292ee31c-09e5-4d11-8d4e-f949aca1eb57/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T99522224-364a-46db-a093-213e22b48409/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **_Don't let Scott rob our Social Security & Medicare. He's running for reelection in 2024 and a Democratic fund's been set up to beat him._** Sure, Florida's become tougher, but Scott's so unlikeable and scandal-tainted, he's only won his statewide races by 1.2%, 1% and .12%. **_He 100% can be beaten, and he must. Because, again, he's coming for our Social Security and Medicare, and he has practice._** [**_Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to beat scoundrel Rick Scott and stop him from ripping away our Medicare and Social Security?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0d130601-15c1-4222-acfe-060a4d3ff79b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you, Blue Amp Action community. Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tba45eba0-244d-4e89-9770-79010f607f2e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/rickscottiscomingformedicare-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfa5064c0-afab-4152-a982-f0a2c02b9f5a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---

name: Team Baldwin
subject: Can you keep a secret?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
#
This Saturday is a big day for our team, Peter — **it’s Tammy’s birthday!** Our team is putting together a surprise birthday card — signed by her most dedicated supporters — to show our gratitude for all the work she’s doing for families in Wisconsin and across the country. Throughout her career serving Wisconsin, Tammy has been a champion for us all. She spends each day fighting for working families, members of the LGBTQ community, small business owners, and every single one of us. That’s why we want to make sure she knows just how much we appreciate her on her special day, celebrating not only her accomplishments and her outstanding work in the Senate, but also her dedication and commitment to public service. [**Peter, we’ll be sharing this card with Tammy on her birthday this Saturday, and we just know it’d mean the world to her to see your name on it. Will you take a moment to sign Tammy’s birthday card?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58509655/391310054/-1956108720?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230209_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njk1MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTBjMmY1Yi1iYmE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c1aeR06nORKOgLlpiHQ7ymhEwEkyVlkbet5IT3B0BBQ=&emci=c091a054-bba8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=310c2f5b-bba8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=35007871) | | [SIGN THE CARD](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58509656/391310055/-1956108720?refcode=AU_STB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20230209_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Njk1MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTBjMmY1Yi1iYmE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=c1aeR06nORKOgLlpiHQ7ymhEwEkyVlkbet5IT3B0BBQ=&emci=c091a054-bba8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=310c2f5b-bba8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=35007871)

— Team Baldwin
