This week, it was my honor to attend President Biden’s State of the Union address. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58509844/391311010/-1295403277?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDMxNmNhOC1iY2E4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kbBRoWxAvLH27uGho31Sm_8Q8hIC60QyelfmwCPuxaQ=&emci=8298f8d6-9aa8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=64316ca8-bca8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=15529135) | Team, This week, it was my honor to attend President Biden’s State of the Union address. My guest last night was Niko, a college student at Western Connecticut State University who works at the college radio station WXCI 91 FM. Niko was selected by his peers to represent the school as an emerging leader at the university radio and newspaper. Being able to uplift young talent like this is truly at the center of who I am. The State of the Union was inspiring. We celebrated so much since last year’s SOTU; we passed the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law, reduced healthcare premiums, and capped the cost of insulin to $35 for seniors on Medicare. We cracked down on inflation, passed the PACT Act to support veterans, and passed key gun safety legislation. We created over 800,000 manufacturing jobs, the strongest manufacturing recovery since the 1950s. We have created an economy that works from the bottom up and the middle out to support EVERYONE. There's nothing we can't do when we come together as Americans, and I'm so excited about what we can take on this year. Together, we can commit to made in America supplies as we rebuild and create good-paying American jobs, raise teachers’ pay, fight inflation Together, and ensure that every community has access to affordable, high-speed internet. Together, we can pass the PROAct and support good-paying union jobs, which are the backbone of our economy. Together, we can ensure every single worker has access to paid leave to heal and be with their families without sacrificing financial security. Yes, we can create an America that works for EVERYONE, no matter where you live, what you look like, or what you believe. _**We are a nation that chooses unity over division.**_ We’ve done so much, and together, we have so much yet to accomplish, team. [_**I’m fired up from President Biden's speech, are you? Chip into my re-election fund to ensure that my campaign has all that we need to run in this “frontline” district, one of the most contested in the country!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58509845/391311115/-534997654?refcode=E20250-20230209-SOTUResponse-SL-Biden-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDMxNmNhOC1iY2E4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kbBRoWxAvLH27uGho31Sm_8Q8hIC60QyelfmwCPuxaQ=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58509846/391311147/-534997654?refcode=E20250-20230209-SOTUResponse-SB-Biden-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDMxNmNhOC1iY2E4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kbBRoWxAvLH27uGho31Sm_8Q8hIC60QyelfmwCPuxaQ=)

name: Conservatives Against China
subject: China’s latest threat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaHood for Congress |
body:
the hypocrisy we’re seeing is incredible.| | | Please see a note from our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe, please visit this _[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=9820cb068e18443b9508f881a20546b2&_t=Z8qstd2ycgDxC91p8rc9F3UfEChm5jF6AVkxlUUvsF4sjtpEPvbr_3jMFoZzeh6pdLBsU3vJj97Qgn-OgEwCNtb2Q34_3dnFMVsY8jwtt9o%3D)_.
---
Peter, This is INSANE. Not only did the Biden Administration let a Chinese SPY balloon float into our country... **They allowed the balloon to stay in the air for DAYS, even hovering near military bases!** China has been walking ALL OVER us ever since Joe Biden took office –– _buying up farmland near military bases, operating secret police stations in the heart of New York City, pushing harmful TikTok content to our kids, and now THIS._ **We can’t let this continue for another MINUTE. **
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9820cb068e18443b9508f881a20546b2&_e=-uPAGadbiJZxC-CqDLGzpDYFugL6Nvq4OU52nr-oEfuv1sO7zhTMKGoXsjCA9xJ9-4Q_YzQsjkIlX_tStDCdKN7Y7Ikg0o0xsKeNqbMH4MF-xpucFQem2Ckn8WueLH157SEXqSvpU1ePojBEeQCKj0oJNhEgk8gl8AoDwQgMZnqQ9YGWLP2eccNq1hsMehOLzGUpDTVu3PQu3nY6XaCbp9cSH0M_Ty6AGijbyMhKnpAeHDyBEQmBDoL1jTEkYZDQWP3cv_l7i44wasZ9-dwFN4WrbCR51r8nMGDmDppzMBROTHxsqkc1tbUW8iRbMXyZn7Ac2dKlUjb_nEI6y69lyxVtyZWcRhORQXq5tfRm39Ih73lrbRtTxsBpZW2ujD_tcSgdzE3h9CkgCSc5nMR8sw%3D%3D)
---
Peter, America needs leaders who are loyal to the American people, not owned by Xi Jinping and the Chinese Communist Party. _And that starts by patriots like YOU taking a stand right here, right now._ **China has a plan to weaken and replace America, and they will do WHATEVER it takes to make that happen. They’re going after our military, economy, universities, businesses, and more.**
---
[**STAND UP TO CHINA**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9820cb068e18443b9508f881a20546b2&_e=-uPAGadbiJZxC-CqDLGzpDYFugL6Nvq4OU52nr-oEfuv1sO7zhTMKGoXsjCA9xJ9-4Q_YzQsjkIlX_tStDCdKN7Y7Ikg0o0xsKeNqbMH4MF-xpucFQem2Ckn8WueLH157SEXqSvpU1ePojBEeQCKj0oJNhEgk8gl8AoDwQgMZnqQ9YGWLP2eccNq1hsMehOLzGUpDTVu3PQu3nY6XaCbp9cSH0M_Ty6AGijbyMhKnpAeHDyBEQmBDoL1jTEkYZDQDqcksAxrrIcyv1qYqiw3JSFzEQRxg94YpFDkxiAWrNAolDyl2MIMqIwa-LwQ4rL4oQAsBuvfa3iTdl92Gd5sZPZRf2f3yFVYDyxjXy28KUAHfM4uQjdvVfn_ZQjNAEPdyxIJByJ_BVedcszS6MoTAw%3D%3D)
---
But our liberal “leaders” don’t seem to care, and it’s taking a toll on our country. Peter, we know that TRUE CONSERVATIVE PATRIOTS like you are the only ones willing to take a stand for America’s future. _[**Chip in now to join fellow conservatives holding China accountable and fighting for America’s future >>>**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=9820cb068e18443b9508f881a20546b2&_e=-uPAGadbiJZxC-CqDLGzpDYFugL6Nvq4OU52nr-oEfuv1sO7zhTMKGoXsjCA9xJ9-4Q_YzQsjkIlX_tStDCdKN7Y7Ikg0o0xsKeNqbMH4MF-xpucFQem2Ckn8WueLH157SEXqSvpU1ePojBEeQCKj0oJNhEgk8gl8AoDwQgMZnqQ9YGWLP2eccNq1hsMehOLzGUpDTVu3PQu3nY6XaCbp9cSH0M_Ty6AGijbyMhKnpAeHDyBEQmBDoL1jTEkYZDQvvzwHpFnCKb_Y49rnVRg0tm8DVDVc1_oEqGoPegtyUALIcDQTQjv3tfDWQK2v9_2iehLK0TieyJ8qZG98Td5-JLfbmOTKfxFWAn-9_lUDFrX7spvRq0MmSldjvuMHEamyPvvfqlrDl4qNI-6igH91w%3D%3D)_ Thank you,Conservative Watch

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: The American response to the Great Reset
body:
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=850895a408444e5f996e88546189ca40&_e=F9U_0dgL1XylNHDfK443z9dKJBBmN9F3HGskH-8rNEYUjUbQtEamEOLBswFRRBUv8qaJtOvajap4fuVnvWil7HDj5hgVbQPQaaQhpd2tRDP5baSEq5dBBdZb7_uozlgmnU2Ak4lOE9Ysy_DMU3TySr-PdjMyMlgFiVwv-TPTnVICrrURVsOxJ7bwG9AzmiiE4LLrQVCWrX27HLRFQrRPTP0zZp4PuhvHZUITTfJ6Wd8s7uP-HLy6X6pNasV8hQDOQS-0q8dYB5rRVpibPUKB6vnKCCfQ2rk19ZCV6BdZoMUrtPbpNqhmbEvRN_FW4Ybb)
---
Friend,

This is one of my biggest fights yet. Turning Point USA is LEADING THE CHARGE against the World Economic Forum and its radical Great Reset agenda -- and I want to make sure America-loving patriots like YOU know how you can help STOP this dangerous scheme.
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=850895a408444e5f996e88546189ca40&_e=F9U_0dgL1XylNHDfK443z9dKJBBmN9F3HGskH-8rNEYUjUbQtEamEOLBswFRRBUv8qaJtOvajap4fuVnvWil7HDj5hgVbQPQaaQhpd2tRDP5baSEq5dBBdZb7_uozlgmnU2Ak4lOE9Ysy_DMU3TySij2MuLr-Tw9HRL3DppaNHkEJqmkO7mDGwjEdIrEEMJ6bX4gZTF6Hdaj_cndHztwONxQ4h1icFA1U7RvMJUcTRg1791s7yMIPFa0JSssT06FuJ5QNxFbjuOOAfaILLAy03rnSEFNA3nAB_n57MtnmqKP2wz3evdbA6bTRFcujRxM)

subject: State of the Union? More like the State of Corruption
body:
[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eab6c4b84b3045da91afde7285f8390a&_e=EgJSiR7qhJPN4goWrz_vsjvT6NX7z2deF5i1pXLHVILu4O3YaFh_9pqxa1tyhe0XIyknfYI2cr9RfutBHBJ8tobT65jUGrXWpTLrnk2ymE8vmC-1F9P-aCt9nK8wZ63HVDbeud9S-JSYdkMajP3OMv4t51M-ZalLPUCn-hnxM49ZY7UV7uuXPlceBt0Ya3wAgUpbDtBD4zN_TOKUOngbXG30GT_B6vvn1tU7GcCPBtYTO7yG53-duQxzgnsgB_zmXqX7CNrFy5GUvKiO6jqL_A%3D%3D)
Friend,

Did you see the State of the Union the other night?

If you did, I'm sure you're as disgusted by all the lies Biden told during the speech. And if you didn't, you can find **The 10 Biggest Lies Biden told in the State of the Union below.**

Let me introduce myself. My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC).

**MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media and holding them accountable for their corruption and lies.**

[_**I 've set a goal to raise $10,000 this week to support our fight to END media corruption. Can you join the fight with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount? Click here to send your urgent support >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eab6c4b84b3045da91afde7285f8390a&_e=EgJSiR7qhJPN4goWrz_vsjvT6NX7z2deF5i1pXLHVILu4O3YaFh_9pqxa1tyhe0XIyknfYI2cr9RfutBHBJ8tobT65jUGrXWpTLrnk2ymE8vmC-1F9P-aCt9nK8wZ63H05nAwMz2WA_nw9ep660gLVscNdSMg9qT-LYxJNWaGtzRE-5DFc5pwqW_owweIKOKARouTveiymu3mShorMwTbaekODUDaLVsHa0KDz4LF8vx1UJxyu3WsEtMHJbaVJ1WUedcjJwtR-rdXpeld8zV_w%3D%3D)

As promised, here are **The 10 Biggest Lies Biden told in the State of the Union:**

1. **LIE:** The most jobs ever created under a president.

**Fact:** Under Biden's poor economy, more people are working two jobs. It was people going back to work after the lockdowns that caused the rise in jobs.

2. **LIE:** Unemployment is at its lowest rate in 50 years.

**Fact:** They manipulated unemployment statistics by no longer tracking young, healthy men who gave up looking for work and removed themselves from the workforce.

3. **LIE:** Inflation is falling.

**Fact:** Inflation statistics don't often include everyday items like groceries and energy bills.

4. **LIE:** The COVID vaccine saved millions of lives.

**Fact:** Countries that didn't force the vaccine on their citizens are doing just as well, if not better, than those that did.

5. **LIE:** The pandemic caused a spike in crime.

**Fact:** Antifa and BLM radicals destroyed cities and police departments while Democratic mayors encouraged the madness.

[_**Click here to END Government and Media corruption >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eab6c4b84b3045da91afde7285f8390a&_e=EgJSiR7qhJPN4goWrz_vsjvT6NX7z2deF5i1pXLHVILu4O3YaFh_9pqxa1tyhe0XIyknfYI2cr9RfutBHBJ8tobT65jUGrXWpTLrnk2ymE8vmC-1F9P-aCt9nK8wZ63HF07uUlgrWPK4HMNcObgL2AR0xKgzBl0FVP5IB1xdOvu2gfKk1OYH3BwC-4qFWmK7oSxGZ0yygsE2hXmBkNYx_7M-fA_qoJnJv_IfWh5aFsr7sOvJt1uzUn3JrlQvWN0P5Rax66ICamWhdKqNlqyWUg%3D%3D)

6. **LIE:** Biden is cracking down on the border and border security.

**Fact:** We are seeing more illegal immigrants crossing the border now than ever under President Trump.

7. **LIE:** Biden thinks bipartisanship is important.

**Fact:** The country is more divisive than ever since Biden enacted his policies for the vaccine mandates, energy and ESG, and radical trans ideology.

8. **LIE:** The attack on Paul Pelosi was Trump's fault.

**Fact:** His attacker was a crazy, drugged-out nudist living in San Francisco.

9. **LIE:** Hate and extremism are coming from the right and Republicans,

**Fact:** Biden and the Democrats fueled radical Antifa to burn down cities -- and I'd call that a show of hate and extremism.

10. **LIE:** Debt decreased by $1.7 trillion in two years.

**Fact:** According to the U.S. Treasury, during Biden's first two years in office -- Jan. 20, 2021, through Jan. 20, 2023 -- the federal debt increased by approximately $3.7 trillion.

[_**Help hold the media accountable for their corruption with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or any amount.**__**Click HERE**_ _**to send a gift >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=eab6c4b84b3045da91afde7285f8390a&_e=EgJSiR7qhJPN4goWrz_vsjvT6NX7z2deF5i1pXLHVILu4O3YaFh_9pqxa1tyhe0XIyknfYI2cr9RfutBHBJ8tobT65jUGrXWpTLrnk2ymE8vmC-1F9P-aCt9nK8wZ63HBw0-eKGwzCX_jhYv7AN-nvr1oHbPJfBdTH8brF2BN9G3t8h9VJqDFQ5F5Di0rvJiPHq5lI4GwFzfscf3qC9jPCBig6c_dEz_8fdSpnRxwMO64yo0dCoe-4hRDWYgfRCh8dF5NYHhHARKcUIJrAFFdg%3D%3D)

And there were more lies than I could keep track of in the rest of Biden's speech, Friend.

**It 's outrageous to see how the radical Left media perpetuates government corruption!**

Unfortunately, many people believe Biden and these lies while he continues to further hate, corruption, and division.

clean_body: Friend, Did you see the State of the Union the other night? If you did, I'm sure you're as disgusted by all the lies Biden told during the speech. And if you didn't, you can find The 10 Biggest Lies Biden told in the State of the Union below. Let me introduce myself. My name is Brent Bozell, Founder and President of the Media Research Center (MRC). MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical left-wing agenda in the media and holding them accountable for their corruption and lies. As promised, here are The 10 Biggest Lies Biden told in the State of the Union: 1. LIE: The most jobs ever created under a president. Fact: Under Biden's poor economy, more people are working two jobs. It was people going back to work after the lockdowns that caused the rise in jobs. 2. LIE: Unemployment is at its lowest rate in 50 years. Fact: They manipulated unemployment statistics by no longer tracking young, healthy men who gave up looking for work and removed themselves from the workforce. 3. LIE: Inflation is falling. Fact: Inflation statistics don't often include everyday items like groceries and energy bills. 4. LIE: The COVID vaccine saved millions of lives. Fact: Countries that didn't force the vaccine on their citizens are doing just as well, if not better, than those that did. 5. LIE: The pandemic caused a spike in crime. Fact: Antifa and BLM radicals destroyed cities and police departments while Democratic mayors encouraged the madness. 6. LIE: Biden is cracking down on the border and border security. Fact: We are seeing more illegal immigrants crossing the border now than ever under President Trump. 7. LIE: Biden thinks bipartisanship is important. Fact: The country is more divisive than ever since Biden enacted his policies for the vaccine mandates, energy and ESG, and radical trans ideology. 8. LIE: The attack on Paul Pelosi was Trump's fault. Fact: His attacker was a crazy, drugged-out nudist living in San Francisco. 9. LIE: Hate and extremism are coming from the right and Republicans, Fact: Biden and the Democrats fueled radical Antifa to burn down cities -- and I'd call that a show of hate and extremism. 10. LIE: Debt decreased by $1.7 trillion in two years. Fact: According to the U.S. Treasury, during Biden's first two years in office -- Jan. 20, 2021, through Jan. 20, 2023 -- the federal debt increased by approximately $3.7 trillion. And there were more lies than I could keep track of in the rest of Biden's speech, Friend. It 's outrageous to see how the radical Left media perpetuates government corruption! Unfortunately, many people believe Biden and these lies while he continues to further hate, corruption, and division. That's why MRC's mission to expose corruption and hold those accountable is so important. Can you help us reach our goal by clicking any link below to help reach our goal of $10,000 this weekend? Thank you, Brent Bozell Founder and President of MRC The mission of the Media Research Center is to create a media culture in America where truth and liberty flourish. If we get enough signatures demanding that Sinema hold a real town hall meeting with constituents, we’ll share the petition with Sinema’s office. **** ******[Add your name here, and please send this to a friend >>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnn3qW0xTUTj3hQnaSC8jjcUkQNoyoKY0tUuyIjlMjYCKNsdR0cqw1YbC5nUxB88Ia9vVz0Ph1hbsIN67G_YiJWniyL0mGLUDqxpglbaJJT2OwDHhybdKgOVGn1RUqnwdQMAPW-0P9SDDzwloF8VeS4rUXL2nRYyZKNqW-kSKoUoMpfImQu9M6rt-f293btCcQ7CReO_66gDLQNx4r8kFXiwuEHsF2jU-m75bQm7adCQYVtidsOvgFVYiB5eXF-TEDY0Fs3BUM4YOoKtwIBAojKlbYz6eopDuD7yXkkoOscyiA/3tk/KttoTwUyTx2UGcv4GhdRgA/h0/O86T3TJ6x9R55sxw5YXLO2zNyQoL16-ly7sNvIWOfE8)** -Team Replace Sinema \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: **Replace Sinema** Date: Sunday, February 5, 2023 Subject: Did you sign our petition? Dinners with Kevin McCarthy.. lunches with private equity... donor spa retreats... trips to Switzerland... weekly massages: it seems like Kyrsten Sinema has all the time in the world for everyone except her own constituents. clean_body: | | Peter, did you see our petition? Kyrsten Sinema hasn’t held a real public townhall with constituents since becoming a Senator, but she has all the time in the world for dinner with Kevin McCarthy, lunch with Wall Street lobbyists, vacations in Paris, and getting weekly massages. If we get enough signatures demanding that Sinema hold a real town hall meeting with constituents, we’ll share the petition with Sinema’s office. ** ** -Team Replace Sinema \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Replace Sinema Date: Sunday, February 5, 2023 Subject: Did you sign our petition? Dinners with Kevin McCarthy.. lunches with private equity... donor spa retreats... trips to Switzerland... weekly massages: it seems like Kyrsten Sinema has all the time in the world for everyone except her own constituents. Sinema has still has NEVER held a real, public town hall meeting since she became a Senator – one that is advertised with advance notice and open to all constituents to ask questions. That’s why we’re demanding she do so now. **** If we get enough signatures, we’ll share the petition with Kyrsten Sinema’s office. (Don’t worry, we will never share your contact information.) Arizona deserves leadership that listens to their concerns and acts in their best interests, and instead Sinema’s done nothing but obstruct important legislation and build her campaign warchest with corporate cash. ** ** -Replace Sinema & Change for Arizona 2024 PAC Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC. | | Sent via . **Never in American history has our right to free speech been under assault and threatened to this magnitude.**

Trump, 45th President of the United States of America | | | ---|---|--- Supporter: Notification Status: Signed Up Donald J. Trump February 7th, 2023 PRESIDENT DONALD J. TRUMP’S RESPONSE TO THE STATE OF THE UNION Transcript: Here's the real State of the Union. Over the past two years under Biden, millions and millions of illegal aliens from 160 different countries have stormed across our Southern border. Drug cartels are now raking in billions of dollars from smuggling poison to kill our people and to kill our children. Savage killers, rapists and violent criminals are being released from jail to continue their crime wave and under Biden the murder rate has reached the highest in the history of our country. | ---|--- Donald J. Trump February 7th, 2023 Never in American history has our right to free speech been under assault and threatened to this magnitude. The Biden White House pressured social media companies to censor users for posting “true, but inconvenient” information about government policy.[[1]]() The Department of Homeland Security was exposed coordinating with Twitter and Facebook to censor legally protected free speech.[[2]]() Joe Biden’s FBI paid Twitter $3.5 million in taxpayer funds to field requests related to Hunter Biden’s laptop scandal.[[3]]() Biden revoked a 2020 Trump order that would have allowed federal authorities to hold online platforms responsible for modifying or infringing on a user’s speech.[[4]]() Biden proposed an amendment to Title IX that would lower the threshold for what constitutes “harassment” that would extend beyond the school environment into personal social media comments.[[5]]() President Donald J. Trump understands that if we don’t have free speech in America, then we will no longer be a free country. . [[1]]() [[2]]() [[3]]() [[4]]() [[5]]() | ---|--- Donald J. Trump February 7th, 2023 In an unprecedented violation of US sovereignty and national security, Joe Biden allowed a Chinese spy balloon to surveil sensitive American military installations. In an effort to distract and deflect from their own weakness and failures, the Biden regime has resorted to peddling disinformation. The Biden Administration allowed the spy balloon to travel across the country, viewing sensitive military installations as it drifted along. If not for local reporting in Billings, Montana, we might have never known.[[1]]() . [[1]]() | ---|--- Donald J. Trump February 7th, 2023 President Donald J. Trump rebuilt America’s military, increased readiness, and destroyed our nation’s enemies. Joe Biden has weakened America’s national security, emboldened our adversaries, and betrayed our allies. Biden presided over a tragic and embarrassing military withdrawal in Afghanistan, which took the lives of 13 U.S. servicemembers. Joe Biden left 10,000 to 15,000 Americans behind in Afghanistan.[[1]]() This was among the most embarrassing acts the United States has presided over. [[1]]() | ---|--- Donald J. Trump February 7th, 2023 President Donald J. Trump secured America’s southern border and will wage war on the deadly cartels once he returns to the Oval Office. Meanwhile, Joe Biden has handed over complete control of the U.S. southern border to the dangerous cartels and put American communities in danger. The U.S. Border Patrol has reported three times as many illegal border crossings under Joe Biden than while Donald Trump was President. The Biden administration continues to break records for historic illegal border crossings, tallying an estimated 5.5 million illegal border crossings since taking office.[[1]]() [[1]]() | ---|--- Donald J. Trump February 7th, 2023 President Donald J. Trump reduced violent crime across the country and stood strongly with America’s law enforcement. On Joe Biden’s watch, violent crime has skyrocketed in virtually every American city. In Joe Biden’s first year in office, twelve major cities broke all-time high murder records.[[1]]() Since Joe Biden has taken office, American cities have become violent crime havens. More than 779 people have been murdered in the city of Los Angeles, a 44% increase from the first two years of President Trump’s term.[[2]]() Robberies, assaults, auto thefts in Los Angeles have increased every year since Joe Biden took office.[[3]]() [[1]]() [[2]]() [[3]]() Ibid. | ---|--- Donald J. Trump February 7th, 2023 Joe Biden’s Education Department is more focused on social justice indoctrination than teaching students. President Donald J. Trump protected the rights of parents and ensured children have every opportunity to receive the best education possible. The Biden administration abandoned their responsibility to parents and students by allowing teachers unions to install policies that delayed school reopening post-COVID. [[1]]() [[1]]() | ---|--- Donald J. Trump February 7th, 2023 President Donald J. Trump achieved American energy independence for the first time in nearly 70 years, lowering costs for consumers, and creating thousands of American jobs. Joe Biden has demolished America’s energy independence through radical policies, excessive regulation, and anti-fossil fuel fiction. In 2020, the U.S. Department of Energy projected that American consumers wouldn’t see gasoline prices over five dollars a gallon until the year 2040.[[1]]() Clearly, their report failed to factor Joe Biden and his energy-killing policies into their projections. In reality, gasoline prices doubled in Joe Biden’s first two years in office[[2]](), and diesel prices increased 75%.[[3]]() [[1]]() [[2]]() [[3]]() | ---|--- Donald J. Trump February 7th, 2023 Americans are experiencing a massive budget crunch with health services, premiums, and essential medications thanks to Joe Biden’s inflation disaster and mangled supply chains. From July 2021 to July 2022, the cost of more than 1,200 medications increased by an average of over 30 percent. Some drugs in 2022 increased by more than $20,000 or 500%.[[1]]() [[1]]() | ---|--- Donald J. Trump February 7th, 2023 Joe Biden has overseen the worst economic decline since the Great Depression. When President Donald J. Trump returns to office, he will deliver economic opportunity and prosperity for Americans of all backgrounds, lower inflation and cut wasteful government spending. He did it before and he will do it again. Through Biden’s energy-crippling policies, Americans suffered the highest national average price of gasoline ever recorded in American history.[[1]]() * [[1]]() | ---|--- Donald J. ## Stories I’m reading...
[New Hampshire Gov. Chris Sununu takes a major step toward running for president ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=7ea659786e&e=f6564bbe3b)— via NBC News[Senator Graham under fire for voting for Biden judicial nominees ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=55c42adf61&e=f6564bbe3b)— via The Hill [AMC Theatres to charge different movie ticket prices depending on the seat ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=b85211f6b8&e=f6564bbe3b)— via Axios [China threatens takeover of our universities unless Biden does more to stop it ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=8723f1119e&e=f6564bbe3b)— via Newt Gingrich in Fox News[Democratic National Committee awarded the party’s first presidential primary to South Carolina, the most significant change in nearly two decades ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=fb83a97e3e&e=f6564bbe3b)— via Wall Street Journal [DNC votes to shake up presidential primary calendar ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=4fa8b93a12&e=f6564bbe3b)— via Politico Key line in this story ... “Georgia Secretary of State Raffensperger has ‘already ruled out splitting the Democratic and Republican primaries into 2 different dates.’” because Georgia is not one of the four Republican early states. They’re NH, IA, NV and SC. [Failure on China Spy Balloon Exposes US Security Policy Hot Air ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=3faf552cf8&e=f6564bbe3b)— via Newsmax[WSJ News Exclusive - Prior Chinese Balloon Incursions Over U.S. Went Undetected, Officials Say ](https://seanspicer.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=c492b412ac&e=f6564bbe3b)— via Wall Street Journal A Biden Administration official acknowledged yesterday that Chinese balloon flights were “discovered after the prior administration left.”

name: Fairness Project
subject: Recapping this year’s State of the Union address >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Fairness Project The Fairness Project
body:
While Congress boos each other, we’re going to keep passing paid leave policies at the ballot box. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58512475/391320905/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzQxMGE3Yi1jNmE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8glsK_krzkudFNuyz_xxikMM78LeBX7uokRxEVU10-M=&emci=20d31eb0-a0a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=9c410a7b-c6a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) | Team: Earlier this week, President Biden delivered his State of the Union address to the 118th Congress. If you didn’t get to catch his speech — don’t worry, we’ll fill you in: On Tuesday night, President Biden called for further protections for America’s working families. One of the policies he called for Congress to pass? **National paid family and medical leave.** And we have to say – we agree! Paid leave is critical to the health and well-being of millions of working people in America. But paid leave is _so critical,_ we can’t afford to wait for Congress to act. That’s why we’ve been working alongside voters since 2016 to pass paid family and medical leave policies directly at the ballot box! [_**If you’re with us in the fight to enact paid leave policies for workers everywhere possible, will you add your name to our petition so that we know we have your backing? >>**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58512481/391320906/-20368797?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzQxMGE3Yi1jNmE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8glsK_krzkudFNuyz_xxikMM78LeBX7uokRxEVU10-M=&emci=20d31eb0-a0a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=9c410a7b-c6a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) [ADD YOUR NAME →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58512484/391320914/-20368797?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzQxMGE3Yi1jNmE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8glsK_krzkudFNuyz_xxikMM78LeBX7uokRxEVU10-M=&emci=20d31eb0-a0a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=9c410a7b-c6a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) Tuesday night’s State of the Union address was _rambunctious_. Across the aisle, members of Congress booed and heckled each other and the president. But we won’t sit by and wait for the life-changing policies we need. Millions of American families would benefit directly from paid family and medical leave here and now. **So while Congress argues, we’re going to do what we do best: Help voters launch _and win_ ballot measure campaigns to enact paid family and medical leave policies in their states directly at the ballot box.** [_**If you’re with us and agree working people in America need paid family and medical leave now, will you add your name to our petition?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58512485/391320915/-20368797?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzQxMGE3Yi1jNmE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8glsK_krzkudFNuyz_xxikMM78LeBX7uokRxEVU10-M=&emci=20d31eb0-a0a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=9c410a7b-c6a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) [SIGN THE PETITION →](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58512486/391320916/-20368797?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzQxMGE3Yi1jNmE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8glsK_krzkudFNuyz_xxikMM78LeBX7uokRxEVU10-M=&emci=20d31eb0-a0a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=9c410a7b-c6a8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=561582) Thanks, friend! clean_body: While Congress boos each other, we’re going to keep passing paid leave policies at the ballot box. | | Team: Earlier this week, President Biden delivered his State of the Union address to the 118th Congress. If you didn’t get to catch his speech — don’t worry, we’ll fill you in: On Tuesday night, President Biden called for further protections for America’s working families. One of the policies he called for Congress to pass? National paid family and medical leave. And we have to say – we agree! Paid leave is critical to the health and well-being of millions of working people in America. But paid leave is so critical, we can’t afford to wait for Congress to act. That’s why we’ve been working alongside voters since 2016 to pass paid family and medical leave policies directly at the ballot box! Tuesday night’s State of the Union address was rambunctious. Across the aisle, members of Congress booed and heckled each other and the president. But we won’t sit by and wait for the life-changing policies we need. Millions of American families would benefit directly from paid family and medical leave here and now. So while Congress argues, we’re going to do what we do best: Help voters launch and win ballot measure campaigns to enact paid family and medical leave policies in their states directly at the ballot box. Thanks, friend! Fairness Project Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, our team at the Fairness Project has won 31 people-powered ballot measure campaigns since 2016, changing over 18 million lives by expanding health care, raising wages, guaranteeing paid leave, and ending predatory lending directly at the ballot box when politicians refuse to act. Your support allows us to make this progress possible.** = = Contributions or gifts to the Fairness Project are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions to the Fairness Project support its many efforts nationwide and any focus is at the Fairness Project’s sole discretion. Contributions will not necessarily be used to support activity in any one state. You can request to get only the most important emails from our team , or you can . name: Laura Loomer
subject: This is what we call Collusion . . .
body:
During a Congressional hearing conducted by the House Oversight Committee yesterday, it was disclosed that Twitter and Facebook executives and employees have been **colluding with officials** from the National Association of Secretaries of State (NASS), Cybersecurity & Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) and the National Association of State Election Directors (NASED) to specifically target, ban, and **censor accounts** on various social media sites in a collaborative manner. | | | | [](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FgwIg75WX3kWrvK892xNT1xtA%2F8yWUTPAo34C6MU8i8Do3AQ/1/010001863845142b-e8cb1bb7-cee4-4a2a-aef8-c5b7cdc0932c-000000/qjdRq7vx4hp8LSy3XqUv_RX5bUo=308) | [](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FgwIg75WX3kWrvK892xNT1xtA%2F8yWUTPAo34C6MU8i8Do3AQ/2/010001863845142b-e8cb1bb7-cee4-4a2a-aef8-c5b7cdc0932c-000000/LwHFr1wd3j9Mv0yjVOeoiWvQtgk=308) Dear Friend,

Democrats were quick to jump on accusations of **" collusion and Russian election interference"** when it suited their purpose against President Trump.

Now, they are putting their head in the sand because they have been **CAUGHT RED-HANDED** colluding with Big Tech to interfere with our elections!

During a Congressional hearing conducted by the House Oversight Committee yesterday, it was disclosed that Twitter and Facebook executives and employees have been **colluding with officials** from the National Association of Secretaries of State (NASS), Cybersecurity & Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) and the National Association of State Election Directors (NASED) to specifically target, ban, and **censor accounts** on various social media sites in a collaborative manner.

And if it's not already obvious, the players from NASS and CISA were government officials who oversee our elections. CISA falls under the Department of Homeland Security, and in November of 2022, they went on the record saying they're taking a "hands off" approach to what they call "election-related disinformation." Well... obviously not.

Congresswoman Anna Paulina Luna questioned Twitter employee Yoel Roth, the former head of **Twitter Trust and Safety**. "Trust and Safety" is the Orwellian term for **censorship.**

Roth has been caught using the **private cloud server, Jira** , to collude with Facebook executives and government officials.

When Roth was directly asked if he communicated with a private entity and government agencies on a private cloud server, he responded, "I don't believe I can give you a yes or no."

Ironically, Roth's communication was printed and displayed right behind Luna's shoulder on an exhibit she then entered as a form of evidence into the Congressional hearing.

In my RICO case against Twitter, Jack Dorsey, Facebook, Mark Zuckerberg, P&G, and entities within the FBI and United States government, this was my ENTIRE argument. As I have been arguing since 2018: THESE BIG TECH TYRANTS ARE STATE ACTORS. And now, I'm thrilled to see members of the United State Congress finally agree with my argument, and show evidence of this state actor collusion in official government hearings.

**Put simply, these joint state actors engaged in blatantly ILLEGAL conduct to directly interfere with state and federal elections in the United States of America!**

If we want to talk about collusion to interfere with elections, it has always been between our own government, Big Tech, the FBI, and the media!

My case has taken on so much more importance now that ABSOLUTELY EVERYTHING I have been saying for the last 6 years is being admitted in Congressional hearings. Despite the fact that Big Tech's deplatforming of me and their illegal election interference and deliberate censorship of both of my Congressional campaigns has destroyed my livelihood, destroyed my business, and has severely damaged my reputation through years of defamation, I have never given up in my fight to **expose the TRUTH** and expose Big Tech censorship and Big Tech election interference.

[**But, I need your continued support so I can keep going.**](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FgwIg75WX3kWrvK892xNT1xtA%2F8yWUTPAo34C6MU8i8Do3AQ/3/010001863845142b-e8cb1bb7-cee4-4a2a-aef8-c5b7cdc0932c-000000/6Rcia76qrdHuBUKkehGY_87mRS8=308)

My legal team and I were just notified this week that Twitter has switched legal teams to bring on board Meryl Conant Governski of Willkie Farr & Gallagher who has direct ties to CNN. This woman who Twitter and Jack Dorsey have retained to fight me in my RICO case was a member of CNN's public relations team.

Obviously, Twitter and Jack Dorsey have retained an expensive CNN affiliated lawyer with experience in public relations given the things that I have been exposing are not only illegal, but they are a public relations NIGHTMARE for Big Tech and their executives. And, that is why they will do all they can to **BURY me in litigation** and bleed me dry of resources. If they lose, the legal consequences for them are massive, and they know it.

So please, [**donate as much as you can today to help me fight back!**](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FgwIg75WX3kWrvK892xNT1xtA%2F8yWUTPAo34C6MU8i8Do3AQ/4/010001863845142b-e8cb1bb7-cee4-4a2a-aef8-c5b7cdc0932c-000000/vLQQQXvWOfL5M77xkMsJQ1E_Z-U=308)

Thanks so much for all that you do!

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

---

Lake Worth, FL 33460

If you’re like me, you’re thinking that most of what Democrats have accomplished is common sense. But that isn’t the case for the far-right GOP members of Congress – who are quickly moving their radical agenda to be commonplace in their Party.
President Biden’s forward-looking speech highlighted the desire to cap insulin costs for everyone, preserve our democracy from political threats, and have billionaires pay their fair share of taxes.
_All of this was met by jeering or deafening silence by the Republican Party._
They’ve shown us that when it comes to taking a stand and doing what’s right, they’d rather shout in defiance or refuse to act.
The forward-looking agenda laid out by President Biden is one that would benefit millions of working families across our country. But House Republicans have made it clear as day that their legislative agenda leaves the middle class behind in the dust.
[**Let’s get serious – House Republicans want to pass legislation that benefits themselves, Donald Trump, and mega-corporations. name: Susan Wild
subject: 2024 Strategy Memo for Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
My goal is to be known for my hard work and to dig deep on issues that matter to the people of my district.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58513260/391323369/-59299736?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230209-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzU2YTRkNS1jOWE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tZR5jOp5g4lYhJ-88ux35j2Q1YzcCspRWwn1kF40dog=)
---
| | | **Below is a PA-07 State of the Race Memo for top supporters like you. If you don’t have time to read it right now, I hope you’ll consider making a contribution to ensure I have the resources to stay in Congress.**
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58513261/391323370/-1109429433?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230209-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMzU2YTRkNS1jOWE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tZR5jOp5g4lYhJ-88ux35j2Q1YzcCspRWwn1kF40dog=)
---
Peter,

As one of my top supporters, I want to tell you a little bit about what I believe is a winning strategy to hold my seat in 2024 – when we will take back the House majority. Here’s the plan:

**First** , we will continue our tradition of outstanding constituent services. I am fortunate enough to have a truly committed and caring team in my district office, and I constantly receive compliments from people about the service they received in navigating federal agencies, getting overdue IRS refunds, applying for all kinds of federal grants, and more.

**Second** , I intend to continue to work in Washington in as bipartisan a manner as I possibly can. It's not easy, but I have forged strong relationships across the aisle with enough Republicans that I am proud to say that I earned a top 12% bipartisan score from the independent Lugar Center, and that 77% of the bills I signed on to last term were bipartisan bills.

**Third** , I intend to work hard on legislation and in my committees. I am not a drama queen or a rabble rouser. In my district, people have a strong work ethic and expect the same of their elected officials. My goal is to be known for my hard work and to dig deep on issues that matter to the people of my district.

There’s one more very important piece of our strategy to win, and that's where you come in. It has consistently been shown that early money is the best way to win a campaign – partly because it encourages others to also give, but mostly because potential opponents are scared off by incumbents who have plenty of cash on hand. [_**That’s why I’m asking you to continue your support for my re-election campaign with an investment of $10 or more right away. clean_body: My goal is to be known for my hard work and to dig deep on issues that matter to the people of my district. | = | | | Below is a PA-07 State of the Race Memo for top supporters like you. If you don’t have time to read it right now, I hope you’ll consider making a contribution to ensure I have the resources to stay in Congress. | = Peter, As one of my top supporters, I want to tell you a little bit about what I believe is a winning strategy to hold my seat in 2024 – when we will take back the House majority. Here’s the plan: First , we will continue our tradition of outstanding constituent services. I am fortunate enough to have a truly committed and caring team in my district office, and I constantly receive compliments from people about the service they received in navigating federal agencies, getting overdue IRS refunds, applying for all kinds of federal grants, and more. Second , I intend to continue to work in Washington in as bipartisan a manner as I possibly can. It's not easy, but I have forged strong relationships across the aisle with enough Republicans that I am proud to say that I earned a top 12% bipartisan score from the independent Lugar Center, and that 77% of the bills I signed on to last term were bipartisan bills. Third , I intend to work hard on legislation and in my committees. I am not a drama queen or a rabble rouser. In my district, people have a strong work ethic and expect the same of their elected officials. My goal is to be known for my hard work and to dig deep on issues that matter to the people of my district. There’s one more very important piece of our strategy to win, and that's where you come in. It has consistently been shown that early money is the best way to win a campaign – partly because it encourages others to also give, but mostly because potential opponents are scared off by incumbents who have plenty of cash on hand. = | = | = Thank you so much for taking the time to read these updates and for believing that Pennsylvania families and workers deserve a strong advocate in Congress. Sincerely, Susan | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. subject: Senate update + special elections + more to know:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
|
---
| | These elections are 12 DAYS AWAY >>> [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58513313/391323594/-258323618?sourceid=1048602&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzg0Zjk2OS1jYWE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=POxRrNiraMwi7h63Hz2r9Zm5GoI_POzPlK9Rh0vg-vE=&emci=c184f969-caa8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=c784f969-caa8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Peter,

Since the anti-choice extremists on the Supreme Court struck down _Roe v. Wade_ and ended the federal right to abortion care last year, **our reproductive rights are in the hands of the states.**

We want to talk to you about the current legal status of abortion in three different deep purple states across the country — and why our community's work electing Democratic pro-choice women is _more important than ever_ looking ahead to elections in 2023 and 2024.

**[But first, will you directly support EMILYs List today so we can expand our recruiting, training, and resources for our incredible endorsed candidates without missing a beat?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58513320/391323601/-258323618?sourceid=1048602&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzg0Zjk2OS1jYWE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=POxRrNiraMwi7h63Hz2r9Zm5GoI_POzPlK9Rh0vg-vE=&emci=c184f969-caa8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=c784f969-caa8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** ✅ **MICHIGAN:** In the 2022 elections, _voters enshrined abortion rights in the state constitution_ , reelected pro-choice fighter Gov. Gretchen Whitmer, AND gained Democratic majorities in the state legislature.

2️⃣0️⃣2️⃣4️⃣: Despite this extraordinary expansion of abortion rights in Michigan, the state will remain _extremely_ competitive and expensive for statewide candidates in '24. With the retirement of Sen. Debbie Stabenow — a proud EMILYs List-backed trailblazer! — we absolutely MUST keep this seat blue and prevent the Senate GOP from gaining another vote for a national abortion ban.

✅ **VIRGINIA:** _Abortion is protected_ , but the state legislature is divided right now and anti-choice Gov. Glenn Youngkin (R) has vowed to sign an abortion ban as soon as possible.

2️⃣0️⃣2️⃣3️⃣: Pro-choice Democrats have to defend their state Senate majority and flip the House of Delegates in critical elections _this November_. And we haven't been waiting, Peter: EMILYs List was thrilled to endorse and help elect Del. Holly Seibold (VA-HD34) in a special election last month, holding a key blue seat!

🚫 **WISCONSIN:** _Abortion is banned statewide_ , except to save the life of the parent. Abortion care became illegal after _Roe_ was struck down.

2️⃣0️⃣2️⃣3️⃣: EMILYs List is proud to back pro-choice champions for state and local office right now in Wisconsin — and each can make a huge difference for abortion rights. We're 100% behind steadfast leaders like Jodi Habush Sinykin (SD-08) for state Senate and Mayor Satya Rhodes-Conway of Madison in her reelection bid. _And these Wisconsin elections are less than TWO weeks away!_

**Peter, with our fundamental reproductive rights in the hands of the states, we have to work year-round to build LASTING POWER at the statewide and local levels, and EMILYs List and our endorsed candidates can _and will_ make it happen — with your help.**

**Donate now to fuel our mission in 2023 & 2024:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Elect-Women-This-February](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58513321/391323602/-258323618?sourceid=1048602&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzg0Zjk2OS1jYWE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=POxRrNiraMwi7h63Hz2r9Zm5GoI_POzPlK9Rh0vg-vE=&emci=c184f969-caa8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=c784f969-caa8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**

Thank you so much,

Madhur Bansal (she/her/hers)
Vice President of Research, EMILYs List [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58513323/391323604/-258323618?sourceid=1048602&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzg0Zjk2OS1jYWE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=POxRrNiraMwi7h63Hz2r9Zm5GoI_POzPlK9Rh0vg-vE=&emci=c184f969-caa8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=c784f969-caa8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58513324/391323605/2030400885?sourceid=1048602&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzg0Zjk2OS1jYWE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=POxRrNiraMwi7h63Hz2r9Zm5GoI_POzPlK9Rh0vg-vE=&emci=c184f969-caa8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=c784f969-caa8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: Marjorie Taylor Greene FIRED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
---
| | I’m absolutely disgusted. – Tuesday night, I watched Republicans like Marjorie Taylor Greene shamelessly slander, heckle, and insult our President. [**– Today, I’m going to make them regret it – by ensuring they NEVER set foot in the halls of Congress again.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58513302/391323554/1694452237?refcode=20230209_em_fr_b2_pelosi_30_op&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGMwOWI0Ni1jOWE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oa7-VfpZgJ8kubjGTCThRSIKNvu5EP78khLQiy79NbI=) [**_I know if we can raise 1,000 gifts before midnight to stand behind President Biden, we’ll turn Republicans’ blatant disrespect into a MASSIVE fundraising day to kick them out of office. So I’m calling for a historic surge of Democratic fundraising strength today to show these right-wing extremists that Democrats are fired up and determined to reclaim our House Majority. Can I count on your immediate $15? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58513303/391323555/1694452237?refcode=20230209_em_fr_b2_pelosi_30_op&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGMwOWI0Ni1jOWE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oa7-VfpZgJ8kubjGTCThRSIKNvu5EP78khLQiy79NbI=) Hear me loud and clear: We CANNOT allow Republicans’ shameful smears to go unanswered. We CANNOT allow the GOP to destroy all of the progress we’ve made. We CANNOT allow them to cement their extremist Majority for the rest of our lives. subject: What do you think about our National Debt?
body:
Tell us! | | | | [ ](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=d045135d17&e=4955722b3e)
---
| | | [ ](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=a1223fd327&e=4955722b3e)
---
| Dear Peter,
The Democrats are pushing to raise our country's debt ceiling. Their goal aligns perfectly with President Joe Biden's agenda...**racking up our national debt while growing the machine of big government.**
The national debt is a critical issue that needs to be addressed. We need to focus on making responsible fiscal decisions on a balanced federal budget while lowering the $31,000,000,000,000 national debt.
---
| [Do you think Congress should raise the debt ceiling? >>>](https://jenforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8dd2850e8f70f37af510b3442&id=b1ee60afa9&e=4955722b3e "Do you think Congress should raise the debt ceiling? >>>")
---
| I will be working with my colleagues in Congress to develop a plan to **responsibly reduce the national debt without putting the American people at risk**. I value your input on this important issue and remain committed to finding a balanced solution that will benefit all Americans. With gratitude, Jen Kiggans

name: Madeleine Foote, LCV
subject: LAST CHANCE: Tell President Biden to cut dangerous methane pollution
body:
We need your help to reach our goal before time runs out. |
---
| | **
FINAL OPPORTUNITY:
Take action to cut dangerous methane pollution **
In just a few days, the Biden administration will close public comments on a proposed rule to cut dangerous methane and other pollutants from the oil and gas industry harmful to our health and climate. This new proposal from the EPA would move our country in the right direction -- but the fossil fuel industry is working hard to protect their profits at the expense of our communities and climate.

President Biden needs to hear that people like you support this critical rule, _but time is running out to add your name._ [We're aiming to deliver another 15,000 signatures before the February 13 deadline -- take action before it's too late.](https://links.messages.lcv.)
|
---
**[**TAKE ACTION**](https://links.messages.lcv.)**

** **
|
Peter -- on February 13, the EPA will close public feedback on a proposed rule to cut methane and other harmful pollutants from the oil and gas industry. [Real quick: could you add your name before time runs out?](https://links.messages.lcv.)

****This new rule -- proposed by President Biden and the EPA -- would crack down on methane pollution that is supercharging the climate crisis and jeopardizing the health of vulnerable communities. **We need the EPA to quickly finalize the strongest possible safeguards to protect public health.******

We must do more to protect communities and our climate from dangerous methane pollution. This proposal is an essential strong step in the right direction. We need to show President Biden that the public backs strong action, but right now, we're 15,000 names short of our goal. [Add your name and show support for strong methane protections before time runs out >>](https://links.messages.lcv.) |
---
**[**TAKE ACTION TO
FIGHT METHANE POLLUTION**](https://links.messages.lcv.)**

From more intense storms to devastating droughts to sea level rise, the impacts of climate change are here now, and we must act quickly to stop the pollution that is contributing to the crisis. Cutting methane pollution is key to slowing the rate of climate change happening now. It's time to put what's best for the health of our families and communities ahead of profits for oil and gas companies.

**We cannot continue to wait. The EPA must quickly finalize the strongest protections now.** Our climate and our communities deserve strong safeguards from dangerous methane and other harmful air pollutants from the oil and gas industry.****

**Time is running out, Peter.** [We need your help to show the Biden administration that our movement will mobilize to fight for climate action and healthy communities. There's still time to help us reach our goal. Add your name today >>](https://links.messages.lcv.)

Thank you for being with us.

Onward,

Madeleine Foote
Deputy Legislative Director
League of Conservation Voters

---

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=9176940&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY4MDIyNjg3MQS2&spReportId=MTY4MDIyNjg3MQS2). Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](mailto:feedback@lcv.org), or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683](https://links.messages.lcv.) |

name: =?utf-8?B?TGluZGEgU8OhbmNoZXo=?=
subject: Black History Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sanchez
body:
I am committed to making progress on these and other issues to build a more equitable future for all.

| Peter,

Black History Month gives us the opportunity to celebrate the many contributions, achievements, and rich history of Black Americans. I am proud to represent California’s 38th district – home to a strong community of Black leaders and trailblazers.

As we celebrate Black history, we are also reminded of the work still ahead of us in the fight for equity.

This month, I am thinking about Tyre Nichols, his family, and every Black man or woman killed or targeted by police in this country. It is clear our fight is far from over.

We must pass the George Floyd Justice in Policing Act to prevent these tragedies from happening and demand accountability in law enforcement.

As state legislatures across the country enact discriminatory policies to disenfranchise Black Americans and other communities of color, we must also take swift action to protect access to the ballot and demand equitable access to healthcare and housing.

I am committed to making progress on these and other issues to build a more equitable future for all.

Sincerely,

Linda
---

* * *
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/58513940/391326103/2116327045?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTNmZjk3YS1jZGE4LWVkMTEtOTk0ZC0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Nd3Bg38GC3XiJZz99Ov6OaKRtpJiIuiMwt-F163h0eE=&emci=51232050-67a6-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&emdi=413ff97a-cda8-ed11-994d-00224832eb73&ceid=6681226)

name: Battleground Update (via the NDRC)
subject: our grassroots movement made history in Michigan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President
body:
now, we can repeat our strategy across the country
|
---

| **This is huge, team: Last November, Democrats won full control of Michigan’s state government for the first time in nearly 40 years. This historic victory was a direct result of our movement’s efforts to secure fair maps.

Will you pitch in now to support the NDRC so we can repeat our successful strategy in more states across the country?**
| [Help Democrats Win: Donate to the NDRC Now](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58513964/391326199/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230209_FR_2E_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM4M2ZmOTdhLWNkYTgtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rzg4AMPBvcxqCrqt6Vcw15n37JskvPWNPA4n5jWCVio=)
---
For almost four decades, gerrymandered maps helped Republicans hold on to power in Michigan state government. They used their influence to restrict workers’ rights, undermine abortion access, and more.

**But now, with control of the governorship, state House, and state Senate, Michigan Democrats have the power to pass legislation on key progressive priorities _for the first time in a generation_. And the NDRC’s work helped make this possible!**
* **In 2018** , the NDRC supported the creation of Michigan’s independent redistricting commission – a reform approved by voters to make map drawing fair and nonpartisan.
* **In 2021** , the commission approved new districts that according to _The New York Times_ is “one of the fairest” maps in the country. Rather than favoring one party over the other, the new maps were designed to favor the winner of Michigan’s statewide vote.
* **In 2022** , the NDRC supported Democracy Defenders running across Michigan – and these candidates were able to compete on fair maps. **Thanks to the help of this grassroots team, many of them won.**

**Attorney General Eric Holder said, “Wherever Democrats can fairly compete, they can win.” Our work in states like Michigan proves exactly that!

With your continued support, the NDRC can replicate this proven strategy to help elect Democrats all over the country who will fight for progress on issues like abortion rights, gun safety, climate action, and more.

[_Will you pitch in today to help the NDRC continue our fight for fairness nationwide?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/58513965/391326212/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230209_FR_2E_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM4M2ZmOTdhLWNkYTgtZWQxMS05OTRkLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=rzg4AMPBvcxqCrqt6Vcw15n37JskvPWNPA4n5jWCVio=)**

clean_body: now, we can repeat our strategy across the country | | This is huge, team: Last November, Democrats won full control of Michigan’s state government for the first time in nearly 40 years. This historic victory was a direct result of our movement’s efforts to secure fair maps. Will you pitch in now to support the NDRC so we can repeat our successful strategy in more states across the country? | = For almost four decades, gerrymandered maps helped Republicans hold on to power in Michigan state government. They used their influence to restrict workers’ rights, undermine abortion access, and more. But now, with control of the governorship, state House, and state Senate, Michigan Democrats have the power to pass legislation on key progressive priorities for the first time in a generation. And the NDRC’s work helped make this possible! In 2018 , the NDRC supported the creation of Michigan’s independent redistricting commission – a reform approved by voters to make map drawing fair and nonpartisan. In 2021 , the commission approved new districts that according to The New York Times is “one of the fairest” maps in the country. Rather than favoring one party over the other, the new maps were designed to favor the winner of Michigan’s statewide vote. In 2022 , the NDRC supported Democracy Defenders running across Michigan – and these candidates were able to compete on fair maps. Thanks to the help of this grassroots team, many of them won. Attorney General Eric Holder said, “Wherever Democrats can fairly compete, they can win.” Our work in states like Michigan proves exactly that! With your continued support, the NDRC can replicate this proven strategy to help elect Democrats all over the country who will fight for progress on issues like abortion rights, gun safety, climate action, and more. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. clean_body: What a joke... Biden thinks he can flip Florida. | | | Friend, Joe Biden is coming to Florida today in one of his first stops since his disastrous State of the Union address. This puppet of the radical Left who is hellbent on destroying our great country actually believes he can win Florida... ...The very state that I flipped back into conservative hands for the first time in over a DECADE. Not only will we run him out of Florida in a landslide – we will CRUSH Biden and Kamala in every last battleground state of 2024! And to PROVE it, I’m counting on patriots like YOU to help kick off a SURGE of grassroots contributions the likes of which Biden and Kamala have never seen. | = | Just think of what has happened to our country in the short time between my final State of the Union address and Biden’s speech the other night... When I was your President, our economy was booming like never before. We were not only energy independent, we were energy DOMINANT. Our border was SECURE. Our streets were SAFE. We were TOUGH on China and Russia. Simply put, we were WINNING! But today, Biden and Kamala have turned the United States into a laughingstock on the world stage, all while hardworking Americans are crushed under their left-wing lunacy. That is the TRUTH that the American people remember, Friend. But right now, I’m counting on YOU to help me PROVE it with a SURGE of grassroots contributions the likes of which Biden and Kamala have never seen. Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: URD HQ
subject: We'll keep saying it: we cannot ignore rural America, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United Rural Democrats](https://click
body:
This crisis is going under the radar. | | | Hi Peter — As you know, Americans are facing a cost-of-living crisis — one of the worst in decades. Rural Americans are particularly vulnerable to this economic pressure, and yet they are largely being ignored by Congress. A main indicator of inflation — the consumer price index — [only looks](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/atcYNHk4Eh2YdGnwBh-YDInBL0MxjyeKSFR2VRPS8CtNAhvZSZioUZ5w2fZ0nWoNYKFx52JlXTDZVvyjDjKjlUUS0xKRB5RcbbO_jRcSybVaxWx2aNgO4CmN2s-aLU46LUxOUR1haiMmlunkZeSFWVDdcPa-XfB724TOp_k8jCn20XXZUsykXTIazn6boyibFASpIfoc5_ZHD9Ervq6BFXh6H-Qavt5YHXE4EyH_ZTHvNCxX8CY2z-0b77d_bcfaQ-KG1tJAEwrVQYyRsOQxTYly5rhJ69nfprCfJym1XlxYJQCjhNjazLhnaXk5izcFWOeBd-4jk2qcfCNzaQUrPLnv45kSYvkFdw-imaK4JBTSZDpmp18h1LB7Yk-fWVAFQDDEMJ8giEF7H-q3D_GfTPqhypTc9mLaFMcfmKovi5MVsY6-F7PDRe-7V6MWkWuOL5d5uW9m19K1TxsIM0KrHn_YkeFqW1Nh-y1snSx9x959jtzYD_HhNNkpxcWzULd14zAROgapNv1g7w4OHmy2cQ/3tk/G78h7ON0T8mQq_hVyoO1YA/h0/ydAIGl-krUJ0s7BrTCVnqz24BlYUE6rVGkhDQZCXW-0) at price changes for urban Americans. **Rural Americans are sidelined.** Rural Americans face extreme costs, including cars, gas, food, and health services. **These items are often made more expensive by the resource deserts that plague rural Americans.** It's high time that politicians cut rural Americans in on the deal — and the solution — toward addressing the cost-of-living crisis. Democrats are the party that can and must win over rural voters. That's the key to our majority. **[Our organization formed to put more of a spotlight on rural issues and elect Democrats who give a damn. Help us support candidates across rural America — the work to retake our majority runs through small-town America.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2Gcab2orcs5W--qheLaG448KbiaOlhYJCehPXyh7oZRRrFstX7C1aiakccX5smMOTxzF6ab6KHkU3TyrYKcWrMapgxkourLJ1Nu1HKWgzCKqje1Dz2r3IshzyvTgsafyKEXzUjZXHoEeI3vcSgLlzNwb3UcG0iJMVSf-eMJUJ2poMSplh1WcFU5v__Vpy-6WA2WbgN-eGM6E1y1SAoBMZrVisbEgVTf-CSerpYx81tsyD8yCCUxmu851rN2qIKP5nR5rfFQTC-w4WhQXl5sgtxSUZ1OnOI5hw7ByT_pPWIpr2VxHobklRp76DOzqyOb5gAmBVKl4HZRo5j1UMvFv3M0puHyf0f5u83xjfTn7I2KJ2L6E0JtkIrmK0fSIWPcWuP9HmM1AIlWJBDbnvKU-570ucNdmiLCvCzNByJNom7tg1aqSKCfAYGHtPxUwPhrTobv/3tk/G78h7ON0T8mQq_hVyoO1YA/h1/a-sjX7YQoF0vdHniMOwCy4hTdeVnvscFWnqz5ks5BuU) ** **[CHIP IN HERE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2Gcab2orcs5W--qheLaG448KdxrcXzvPYkpKn48NyVf5oBubGJ3EZ0Nhg2VrYMaq6RnmxArUj_TLAp_QQC8q_sTHgUPrc3rrbvVmMRMXziSIqxP2pUHlMvFP1N-N6qox92K3AeCtrSyOA_luTsGPVNHjP-ZoH-wCBr7ZxdCqg6FbioPlaP2eeUfLJF_B8f2E9hkhd4EaU88L6BRiI6bTKnMCNBFPW6VL3kuHAfMnMTfGkYOjUebLhD4UMzMms41tRs7ha1ojPujOtoQuVA7TZ311FO206DiJ9a16Oqop5GWjcbSDWC-BI5HIIE3XeX8R6OFrZ12OAABo8RLqx1k_TVjRO0Z_LokAidPwKAs94tQZ79hh25OxQjBTBJ39bEQStJwoqwMtQqEc30h646FBTaUyM-OaqMB_frSIKc92vQGGEDVYUxdpmWFjMijLIdHvrWV/3tk/G78h7ON0T8mQq_hVyoO1YA/h2/8dxU132-0XcsaHZJ2CouRQuylaOZcVWuHuNig3PciFA)** Thank you for all of your support. – United Rural Democrats HQ

name: Amanda Nichols
subject: Survey: executive actions Biden should take
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

President Biden had a lot of great things to
say at the State of the Union, and now it’s time for action.

In his fiery speech, he exposed Republican demands to cut social safety
net programs, unveiled a new Billionaires Minimum Income Tax, supported
Medicare being able to negotiate lower drug prices, called for an insulin
price cap of $35 for all Americans, and more.

But with extreme Republicans eager to block bills in the House, Biden will
need to use the power of the presidency to get things done ahead of 2024.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/executive_action_sv/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230209_SV_EO_0_12MO_AmandaNichols_NA_NA_ExecutiveOrders&t=1015&akid=3994%2E5885482%2EfsNrFA ]That’s why Our Revolution is calling on Biden to deliver concrete
results for working people through executive orders. Take our survey here
to weigh in on what President Biden should prioritize:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/executive_action_sv/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230209_SV_EO_0_12MO_AmandaNichols_NA_NA_ExecutiveOrders&t=1016&akid=3994%2E5885482%2EfsNrFA ]TAKE OUR SURVEY

OR Executive Director Joseph Geevarghese correctly told Politico following
the speech that the President missed a high-profile chance to “up the
ante” on Republicans by threatening to govern by executive action if they
refuse to cooperate — which we know they will.

The American people deserve actual results, and President Biden has the
power to change millions of lives with the stroke of a pen — reducing
health care costs, expanding worker power, and more.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/executive_action_sv/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230209_SV_EO_0_12MO_AmandaNichols_NA_NA_ExecutiveOrders&t=1017&akid=3994%2E5885482%2EfsNrFA ]Let us know what executive actions you think President Biden should
prioritize by taking our official survey!

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America. Last year alone, we elected 74% of our 450 endorsed
progressive candidates by mobilizing on the ground AND in the halls of
power.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5924?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230209_SV_EO_0_12MO_AmandaNichols_NA_NA_ExecutiveOrders.lqysJZ&t=1008&akid=3994%2E5885482%2EfsNrFA ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to a 2022 Movement Builder recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5925?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230209_SV_EO_0_12MO_AmandaNichols_NA_NA_ExecutiveOrders.XTHyey&t=1009&akid=3994%2E5885482%2EfsNrFA ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/5926?c0=EM_NBI_OR_20230209_SV_EO_0_12MO_AmandaNichols_NA_NA_ExecutiveOrders.QxTLNt&t=1010&akid=3994%2E5885482%2EfsNrFA ]GIVE ONCE

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1011&akid=3994%2E5885482%2EfsNrFA ][IMG] [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1012&akid=3994%2E5885482%2EfsNrFA ][IMG] [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1013&akid=3994%2E5885482%2EfsNrFA ][IMG]

name: CaucusRoom
subject: So, who wanted to throw granny off a cliff?
body:
Don't forget to vote in the 2024 straw poll! No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-qhtkjz-trhiujldw-e/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhtkjz-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Here are some recent articles shared by CaucusRoom members. Get active posting content and maybe we will highlight some of what you share!**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhtkjz-trhiujldw-y/) [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhtkjz-trhiujldw-j/) **Gutting Medicare and Social Security.** During Biden's State of the Union address he falsely claimed that Republicans want to do away with these programs. As it so happens, Senator Biden supported legislation to [sunset or freeze spending in ALL federal programs](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhtkjz-trhiujldw-t/). I wonder what changed... **Throw the bum out!** Biden's Director of Homeland Security, Alejandro Mayorkas, faces increasing calls to resign or be impeached. [I'd say the case is pretty clear.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhtkjz-trhiujldw-i/) **Headed to war?** [Is a hot war with China inevitable?](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhtkjz-trhiujldw-d/) Check out AMAC's take on this terrifying prospect. **Vote, vote, vote, vote, vote!!!** Our 2024 GOP Straw Poll is still open. [Make sure to vote for the candidate you are supporting, and we will announce the results later this week! Now vote!](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhtkjz-trhiujldw-h/) **Remember Nord Stream 2?!** A report was released suggesting the the United States (in coordination with Norway) [were the pipeline saboteurs.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhtkjz-trhiujldw-k/) **The Wilsonian Order.** This is a very interesting retrospective regarding [Wilson's "grand plans of scientifically-managed, rules-based, forced order"](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhtkjz-trhiujldw-u/). Spoiler - it didn't work.

**Are You[ Ready to Laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhtkjz-trhiujldw-o/)?**
* [Howling at the moon.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhtkjz-trhiujldw-x/)
* [AI can write a better speech than the pros that work for Biden.](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhtkjz-trhiujldw-m/)
* [This NY Post headline sums up the entire State of the Union](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhtkjz-trhiujldw-c/)
* [About that awkward kiss...](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhtkjz-trhiujldw-q/)

[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhtkjz-trhiujldw-a/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhtkjz-trhiujldw-f/)[](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhtkjz-trhiujldw-z/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-qhtkjz-trhiujldw-v/) | CaucusRoom, LLC
